title: Conversion Specialist (Ecommerce)
description:
We’re looking for a Conversion Specialist who is ready to own product page optimization, improve conversion rates, and maximize average order value across large product catalogs.



Please Do NOT Apply If:

- You don’t have 3+ years experience in e-commerce conversion optimization

- You haven’t worked on large product catalogs (100+ SKUs)

- You don’t understand direct-response copywriting or consumer psychology



We value clarity and efficiency — for both you and us.



Why This Role Matters



Conversion optimization is a core revenue driver at GTE. In this role, you’ll play a key part in scaling brands by improving conversion rates, AOV, and overall product page performance.



This is a hands-on role for someone who wants:

- Full ownership of product performance

- A performance-driven environment

- The ability to directly influence business results



What You’ll Own & Build

- Within your first 90 days, success will be measured by your ability to:

- Optimize 100+ product pages for conversion and AOV

- Identify and fix bottlenecks in product funnels

- Improve page elements (copy, layout, visuals, offers) to increase conversion >50%

- Run A/B tests that move the needle and generate measurable revenue

- Turn basic supplier images into high-converting visuals

- Make data-driven decisions between design vs offer problems



What We’re Looking For

- 3+ years of hands-on e-commerce conversion optimization experience

- Shopify experience is required (running or working with stores)

- Proven track record of increasing conversion rates / revenue

- Strong copywriting / direct-response skills

- Deep understanding of consumer psychology and buying behavior

-Analytical, results-driven, and comfortable being measured on revenue impact



Bonus: Experience with dropshipping, affiliate marketing, or DTC brands



Only apply if you meet the above requirements. We’re building a high-performance team, and this role requires proven experience with direct response marketing.



Compensation & Benefits

- Base hourly rate is negotiable for strong candidates

- Quarterly bonus up to €2,500 (eligible within first 6 months)

- Full-time, flexible schedule (40 hours/week)

- Fully remote



Hiring Process

HR Screening -> Interview -> CEO Interview



???? Ready to Make an Impact?



If you’re driven by performance, optimization, and measurable growth, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Business Operations Associate
description:
We are looking for someone with a proven track record of helping entrepreneurs grow their businesses through execution and measurable results. You are a strong thinker and problem-solver who can take ideas from A to Z and turn them into action independently.



You have a self-starter, entrepreneurial mindset and are excited to help build and grow new initiatives. This role requires adaptability and comfort working in a fast-moving environment where priorities can shift as the business evolves.



This role requires high ownership, clear communication, and a proactive mindset. You don’t wait for instructions — you follow up on tasks, clarify priorities, and ensure nothing is delayed or left unclear.



You are able to think ahead, work independently, and consistently move work forward with minimal supervision, including quickly understanding workflows and improving them where possible.



This role includes both recurring operational tasks and flexible project-based work depending on business priorities and active initiatives.



Position Details:

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET

• Hours: 40 hours per week 



Benefits:

• $960 USD/month ($6 per hour)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• Weekends Off

• Benefits allowance after 6 months ($80/month)



Core Profile:

• Demonstrated ability to support entrepreneurs in growing and scaling their businesses through execution and outcomes

• Self-starter with strong initiative and problem-solving ability

• Fast and reliable execution with strong follow-through

• Structured thinker who can build, improve, and manage systems independently

• Comfortable taking ownership from start to finish with minimal supervision

• Proactive communicator who provides clear and timely updates

• Strong ability to work with ambiguity while still moving tasks forward

• Able to take initiative in managing communication flow, including following up on priorities and ensuring clarity without needing reminders



AI & Digital Competency:

• Proficient in AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Higgsfield, etc.)

• Able to turn AI outputs into clear, brand-aligned content

• Comfortable creating simple AI workflows and prompt templates



Operations & Systems:

• Strong G-Suite skills (Sheets, Drive organization, Docs, workflow management)

• Good digital file organization and naming discipline

• Ability to create SOPs and improve workflows

• Comfortable managing multiple ongoing tasks and projects



Content & Marketing:

• Strong video editing skills (short-form content, reels, clean edits, captions, consistent branding)

• Ability to support social media growth and content execution

• Understanding of branding and audience engagement

• Please include the word “SONDER” in the subject line



Additionally: 

• Preferably has some design ability and understands aesthetic consistency. Can look at older content and pieces we have created and evolve that so the new piece feels on-brand and fits seamlessly with the aesthetic.



Required Qualifications:

• Strong organizational and communication skills

• Experience in operations, administration, or workflow support

• Self-directed and able to work with minimal supervision

• Reliable device and internet connection



Technical Requirement:

• Access to a reliable Apple device



Preferred:

• Real estate, sales, or service-based business experience

• Background in digital operations or system building



To Apply:

• Send your resume and portfolio

• Screenshot showing your computer specs and internet speed.

• Answer: “Why are you a good fit for this role?”

title: Phone-First Customer Experience VA (US Company | Pacific Time)
description:
We’re hiring a confident, phone-savvy professional to become the first voice customers hear at Graham Landscape & Design.



This is not a back-office admin job.



This role is for someone who thrives in live conversations, builds instant trust, and can guide customers with clarity and warmth while managing systems at the same time. 



If you take pride in excellent communication and love helping customers feel taken care of, you will do very well here.



Your performance directly impacts customer experience, booked appointments, and company growth.



Primary Responsibility: Phone Excellence

Your #1 priority is handling incoming customer calls exceptionally well — every time. You will:

- Answer all inbound calls within 30 seconds using approved greeting scripts

- Handle calls via Dialpad with professionalism, clarity, and urgency

- Confidently guide callers through conversations

- Gather critical customer information accurately (Full name, Service address, Phone number, Service need)

- Determine whether the caller is a new customer, a previous or an existing customer, or a new owner of a serviced property

- Verify and update customer records in the CRM

- Book the first sales or service appointment during the call whenever possible

- Clearly explain next steps, expectations, and service policies (including drive-time billing when applicable)

- Handle missed calls by returning them within 30 minutes

- Leave clear, complete, and accurate call notes to ensure seamless handoff to sales or service teams

- Uphold Service Beyond Expectation on every single interaction



This role is accountable for call quality, lead accuracy, and appointment success — not just answering the phone.



Secondary Tasks (When Phones Are Quiet)

When call volume is low, you may assist with:

- Light CRM or QuickBooks data updates

- Appointment confirmations

- Calendar updates

- Follow-ups on missed calls or leads

- Administrative support from the Office Manager



Phone coverage always comes first.



Must-Have Qualifications

- Strong phone confidence and professional speaking voice

- Near-native English fluency (verbal and written)

- Reliable availability: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM US Pacific Time

- Ability to multitask systems while speaking with customers

- Calm, solutions-focused customer service mindset

- Strong attention to detail and documentation habits

- Comfortable explaining policies clearly and confidently

- Willingness to follow structured SOPs

- Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT for efficiency



Bonus (Not Required, But Valuable)

- Landscaping, construction, or home services experience

- Aspire CRM familiarity

- Appointment setting or scheduling experience

- Escalation handling experience

- SOP documentation experience



Compensation & Growth

- PHP 40,000/month base salary

- Pay increase opportunities based on performance and tenure

- Long-term stability with a growing company

- Opportunity to grow into expanded administrative or coordination roles



We value reliability, initiative, and accountability.



This Role Is NOT a Fit If

- You dislike live phone conversations

- You prefer quiet, independent back-office work

- You struggle with multitasking while speaking

- You are uncomfortable following structured processes

- You are not available in Pacific Time consistently



How to Apply (Follow Exactly):

Send one
 only to 



Subject: Phone VA – Your Full Name



Include:

1. Resume

2. 2-Minute Audio Recording (Google Drive link)

    * We use the audio recording so we can hear your communication style — since this is a phone-first role.

    * In the recording:

       - Introduce yourself

       - Explain why you are excellent on the phone

    * File name: FirstName_LastName_Audio

       - Incomplete or misformatted applications will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us

- Clear expectations and structured systems

- Direct impact on revenue and customer experience

- Stable long-term role

- Opportunity to grow as responsibilities expand



If you take pride in professional communication and want to be part of a company that values excellence, we’d love to meet you.

title: Booking & Operations Assistant – Luxury Transportation

We are looking for an enthusiastic, intelligent, and proactive individual to join our growing team within a luxury transportation business.

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply : 
/jobs/
video-editor-dtc-ecommerce

title: Full-Time Virtual Accountant / Controller (US Company | Long-Term | Growth Role)
description:
We are a US-based landscaping and real estate company looking for a high-level Accountant / Controller to fully own our bookkeeping and financial operations.



This is NOT a basic bookkeeping role — we need someone who can think, d
, and take ownership like an accountant or mini-CFO.



What You’ll Do

You will take full ownership of the books across multiple entities:

Daily Accounting

- Manage A/P and A/R (billing, collections, payments)

- Enter and reconcile transactions in QuickBooks Desktop

- Keep records clean, organized, and accurate



Month-End Close

- Prepare journal entries (accruals, reclasses, etc.)

- Produce clean, CPA-ready financials (P&L, Balance Sheet)

- Close books within 2 weeks of the month-end



Financial Oversight

- Monitor cash flow, budgets, and variances

- Identify errors, risks, and inefficiencies

- Recommend improvements to systems and reporting



Support & Growth

- Help transition into Aspire software

- Work closely with leadership on financial decisions



Who We’re Looking For



We want someone who:

- Thinks like an Accountant / Controller, not just a bookkeeper

- Can work independently without constant supervision

- Takes full ownership and accountability

- Is proactive and detail-oriented



Must-Have Requirements

- Strong experience with QuickBooks Desktop

- Full-cycle bookkeeping experience (A/P, A/R, reconciliations, month-end)

- Experience handling multiple entities or complex books

- Strong English communication

- Reliable internet + backup setup

- Willing to work US Pacific Time (8 AM – 5 PM PST/PDT)



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with US clients

- Real estate or service-based businesses

- Familiarity with Aspire software



Compensation & Setup

- Full-time, long-term role

- Stable company with growth potential

- Monthly salary (PHP) – based on experience

  - Please include your expected salary in your application



IMPORTANT

This role requires:

- High accuracy

- Strong ownership

- Consistency month-to-month

If you prefer task-based work with step-by-step instructions, this role may not be a good fit.



How to Apply

Send your application to: 

Subject Line: Full-Time Accountant Application – Your Name



Include:

1. Resume



2. Short cover letter including:

    - Why you're a good fit

    - Confirmation of PST availability

    - Your expected monthly salary (PHP)



3. 2-3 minutes audio recording

    - Your accounting experience

    - QuickBooks Desktop experience

    - Types of businesses you've handled

title: Accountant (QuickBooks)
description:

mber—ensuring all accounting tasks, reconciliations, and financial workflows are managed efficiently while supporting multiple growth initiatives.

title: SEO & Content Specialist (AI-Savvy)
description:
NOTE: Please do not
 the client directly. We will only accommodate applicants who apply through OnlineJobs.



Join a remote team supporting a semi-famous American CEO and his portfolio of websites and clients! As featured in The Wall Street Journal and The New York Times. Your work will directly impact the SEO performance and growth of multiple websites and help real clients succeed online.



WHY IS THIS JOB AWESOME?

Permanent WFH — forever, no commute, no office politics

Great pay

Fun team that genuinely values Filipino staff

No two days are the same: diverse tasks across SEO, content, tools, and client calls

A work culture that actually respects your sleep and rest — we mean it

Flexible split-shift schedule designed around your life

Fun boss (NICK MADE US TYPE THIS)

Nick Gray loves arroz caldo and pork sisig. A true Filipino at heart.





ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for someone who lives and breathes SEO, is comfortable jumping on client calls, and knows how to use AI tools to work smarter — not just faster. You won't be writing articles from scratch, but you will be the person who knows exactly what a great article needs: the right structure, the right keywords, the right headings, internal links, meta descriptions, and everything else that makes content rank.

This is a hands-on, execution-focused role. You'll be working across multiple websites, helping clients improve their search presence, and occasionally talking directly with clients to explain what you're doing and why.





SALARY AND BENEFITS

Pay rate: $7-$10/hour depending on experience

Government dues are the responsibility of the applicant





HOURS AND AVAILABILITY

Core hours: 7:30 AM - 1:30 PM Central Time (includes a 30-minute break)

Remaining 3 hours are async — work them anytime within the same day, on your own schedule

Total of approximately 6 hours of live overlap + 3 hours flexible per day

Split-shift friendly: we respect your time, your rest, and your life outside of work





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

*SEO



Conduct keyword research and on-page SEO optimization for blog posts and web pages

Perform SEO audits and implement improvements across client websites

Set up and monitor Google Search Console, identify issues, and act on data

Write and optimize meta titles and descriptions

Handle internal linking, schema, image alt text, and other on-page best practices

Track rankings and report on SEO progress



*Content & AI-Assisted Writing



Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) to assist with content production

Know what makes a blog post rank: proper structure, headers, keyword placement, word count, readability, and CTAs

Edit and refine AI-generated drafts to meet SEO and quality standards

Brief writers or AI tools with the right inputs so content comes out right the first time



*Client Communication



Join calls with clients to discuss SEO strategy, progress, and recommendations

Communicate clearly and professionally — you're calm, articulate, and easy to talk to

Send follow-up
s summarizing calls and next steps



*Tools & Systems



Use AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or similar IDEs to build or improve small internal tools and automations when needed

Comfortable exploring and adopting new tools quickly





REQUIREMENTS

Proven SEO experience — you've done this before and have results to show

Fluent spoken and written English — strong communicator on calls and in writing

Comfortable on video calls with clients

Familiar with AI tools: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar

Working knowledge of Google Search Console, and ideally other SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, Moz, Yoast, RankMath)

Beginner-to-intermediate writing skills — you don't need to be a novelist, but you understand what good content looks like

50Mbps wired internet connection

Desktop or laptop, plus headset and camera for calls

Quiet working space





Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Gemini in IDEs

WordPress experience

Familiarity with Airtable, Trello, or Google Suite





PERSONALITY OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

Positive, reliable, and genuinely trustworthy

Curious and always learning — especially about AI and SEO changes

Proactive: you don't wait to be told, you spot problems and act

Organized with strong attention to detail

Adaptable — our work evolves fast and you roll with it





SOFTWARE TOOLS USED

Google Search Console

WordPress

Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini

Cursor or Claude Code (a plus)

Google Suite: Docs, Sheets, Gmail

Ahrefs / Semrush / Moz

Yoast SEO or RankMath

Trello

Airtable

Loom






COVER LETTER INSTRUCTIONS

Please answer the following in your cover letter:



1. Describe one specific SEO win you've had — what was the site, what did you do, and what happened to the rankings or traffic?

2. What AI tools do you use regularly in your work, and how?

3. How comfortable are you on client video calls, on a scale of 1-10? Tell us about a time you explained something technical to a non-technical person.



LOOM VIDEO (REQUIRED)

Record a short Loom video (3-5 minutes) and include the link in your application. In your video, please cover:



A quick introduction — who you are and your background

Your past experience with SEO — what kinds of sites or clients you've worked with and what results you've achieved

Your experience with client calls — how comfortable you are and any examples you can share

Any experience with Claude Code, Cursor, or other AI tools — show us or tell us how you use them in your work



Include "SEO + AI" in your subject line so we know you read this far.

title: Electrical Engineer - Project Coordinator
description:
As a premier electrical contracting firm, we are looking for a versatile and driven **Electrical Engineer** to join our team. This role is a hybrid of technical design, project management, and strategic bidding. You won’t just be sitting behind a desk; you will be the bridge between complex electrical blueprints and successful project completion.



      Core Responsibilities  

* **Design & Drafting: : Develop comprehensive **shop drawings** and technical layouts using **AutoCAD** and **Bluebeam**.

* **Project Coordination: :  Read and interpret electrical drawings to create detailed work schedules, ensuring labor and materials align with project milestones.

* **Estimating & Bidding: : Analyze project specifications to prepare accurate and competitive bids for upcoming contracts.

* **Technical Compliance: : Ensure all designs and installations adhere to safety standards and industry regulations.

* **Cross-Functional Collaboration: : Act as the primary point of contact between the field crew, general contractors, and clients to ensure seamless project execution.



---



        **Requirements & Qualifications**

* **Technical Proficiency: : Advanced skills in **AutoCAD** and **Bluebeam** are required for drafting and document markup.

* **Blueprint Literacy: : Mastery in reading and interpreting electrical schematics, one-line diagrams, and architectural floor plans.

* **Regulatory Knowledge: :  A strong familiarity with the **National Electrical Code (NEC)** is a significant advantage and will be prioritized.

* **Organizational Skills: :  Proven ability to manage project timelines, coordinate resources, and meet strict deadlines.

* **Communication: :  Strong verbal and written skills to effectively relay technical information to non-technical stakeholders.



---



       **What We Are Looking For**

* **The "Perpetual Student" Mindset: :  In our industry, no two projects are the same. We need someone who is genuinely excited to learn new electrical concepts and emerging technologies every single day.

* **Problem Solvers: : You should be able to look at a complex electrical challenge and find a code-compliant, cost-effective solution.

* **Contracting Experience: : Previous experience working specifically within an electrical contracting environment is highly preferred.



---



    Why Join Us ?

We offer a fast-paced environment where your work has a direct impact on the skyline. You will gain hands-on experience in the full lifecycle of a project—from the first bid to the final inspection. If you are ready to grow your technical expertise while managing high-stakes projects, we want to hear from you.

title: Executive and Personal Assistant
description:
EXECUTIVE AND PERSONAL ASSISTANT

Toronto-based IT and Cybersecurity Firm | Full-Time | USD $1,200/month | Start: Second week of June 2026



WHO WE ARE

We are a small, five-person IT and cybersecurity firm based in Toronto, Canada. We manage the technology for professional services companies, including law firms, architecture studios, and tech startups.



The CEO you will be working directly with is entrepreneurial and fast-moving. He is not a micromanager. He will give you real responsibility from day one and trust you to run with it. In a team this size, good work is visible and recognized quickly.

We treat remote tea
mbers as real tea
mbers. You will have direct access to the CEO, regular check-ins, and genuine investment in your growth. We want this to be a role you stay in and grow with, not a stepping stone.

This is a role for someone who wants ownership, not a job description.



THE ROLE

This is an Executive and Personal Assistant role with real teeth. You will be the person the CEO thinks out loud with, hands things off to, and trusts to run with them. You will interact with the team, drive follow-through, flag what is slipping, and keep projects moving without being asked twice.

The CEO you support is a high-D, visionary operator who moves fast and thinks big. Your superpower is the opposite. You catch what he misses, maintain what he will not, and bring order to his chaos. If you are energized by being the detail-oriented counterpart to a fast-moving leader, this role was built for you.

This person will be in meetings, on calls, and across documents with the CEO daily. They will retain details, anticipate needs, and have information ready before it is asked for. If the CEO is heading to a client site, the address, suite number, contact name, and reason for the visit are already in his calendar before he asks.

The split is roughly 80% business and 20% personal, with approximately 20% of your time also supporting other tea
mbers.



Hours: 9am to 5pm Eastern Time during onboarding (60 to 90 days), then shifting to 7am to 3pm ET.

This role has no ceiling. The more capable and proactive you are, the more responsibility you will earn.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Execution and Follow-Through



Receive direction and ideas from the CEO and turn them into moving parts

Coordinate with tea
mbers to make sure tasks are assigned, understood, and completed

Track open items, follow up without being asked, and bring back status updates, not problems

Maintain accountability on internal projects and process builds

QA on internal processes to ensure steps are not skipped



Communications and Inbox



Own the CEO inbox, triage, prioritize, and draft replies to near-send quality

Target: CEO clicks send without editing 8 out of 10 times

Screen and route incoming calls as a warm, professional first point of contact

Manage calendar, schedule meetings, and coordinate logistics

Communicate professionally with clients, vendors, and contacts on behalf of the CEO



Business Operations



Maintain and update CRM with new meetings, contacts, and follow-ups

Track client check-ins and coordinate quarterly and 6-month touchpoints

Monitor helpdesk queue and flag CEO-relevant tickets

Support internal process documentation, including SOPs, wikis, and system guides

Light project management, track open tasks, follow up on outstanding items

Coordinate with the internal team on overflow admin tasks



Marketing and Content



Draft and schedule LinkedIn and social media posts based on CEO's direction

Repurpose existing content including recordings and notes, into posts and
s

Light research on competitors, tools, and industry trends



Personal Admin and Property



Research, compare, and execute on personal tasks, including insurance, logistics, vendor negotiations, purchases, and warranty claims

Personal travel booking and logistics every 6 months

Handle vendor and provider calls on behalf of the CEO

Light coordination on investment properties and an Airbnb, including guest communication, cleaner bookings, and annual rental admin



WHO YOU ARE



Business-level English is non-negotiable. Written and spoken communication must be clean, professional, and client-ready. Western business English grammar and fluency is required, not just the ability to be understood.

You are anticipatory, not reactive. You think one step ahead and have what the CEO needs before he asks for it.

You retain details. Clients, addresses, project context, open items. You know where everything is and can retrieve it instantly without attitude.

You are detail-oriented by nature, not by effort. You catch errors, close loops, and do not let things fall through the cracks.

You take initiative. You figure things out and bring back solutions, not questions.

Smart, driven, and someone who pushes back respectfully and gets things done.

You have an entrepreneurial mindset. You have operated with ownership, managed others, or run your own venture.

You are warm, high-energy, and someone people genuinely want to work with.

You are comfortable handling both business tasks and personal admin without treating either as beneath you.

You are discreet. You will have access to personal finances, client relationships, and property matters.

You are comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude to work faster and smarter.

You are available exclusively for this role. You may not take on other clients or employers while working with us.



WHAT WE OFFER



USD $1,200/month, full-time

Start date: second week of June 2026

Fully remote, work from home

Hours: 9am to 5pm Eastern Time during onboarding, shifting to 7am to 3pm ET once ramped

90-day trial with a structured review and compensation increase for strong performers

A role with no ceiling. Responsibilities grow with your capability.

Paid time off

Annual bonus for strong performers



TECH AND SECURITY

As a cybersecurity-focused firm, you will be required to install our standard security suite on your work computer. Your device must be used for work purposes only and not shared with household members. Full details provided upon offer.



HOW TO APPLY

Include a 2-minute video (Loom or similar) answering this question: Tell us about a time you solved a problem that was not your job. What happened, what did you do, and what was the outcome? Include the link in your application.

Also, write a short
 on our behalf using this scenario: You are
ing a client to let them know their server maintenance is scheduled for this Saturday between 10pm and 2am. Reassure them that disruption will be minimal and that the team will be available if anything comes up. Paste this
 directly into your application message.

Applications in which the video does not demonstrate business-level English fluency will not advance, regardless of other qualifications.



We are looking for one person who is exactly right. We will take the time to find them.



One final detail in this posting will tell us you read it carefully. Make sure your application reflects that.

title: Go High Level CRM Trainer
description:
Job Title: Temporary Part?Time White?Label CRM and Operations Trainer (GoHighLevel, Excel, Skip Tracing)



Company: Asset Recovery Agents of America LLC  

Compensation: $2 per hour  

Schedule: 4–6 hours per day, 5 days per week (Temporary: 2–3 months)  

Start Date: Approximately 1–2 weeks from now  



---



# About the Role



Asset Recovery Agents of America LLC is building a white?label surplus?funds CRM platform that can be resold repeatedly to new users as their own business sub?account. We are hiring a temporary part?time trainer who can teach the owner step?by?step how to build, manage, and scale the entire backend system.



This role is focused on training. The goal is for the owner to become fully independent in operating GoHighLevel, managing leads, performing skip tracing, building websites inside the CRM, and preparing the platform for resale.



---



# Responsibilities



## GoHighLevel White?Label CRM Build and Training

Teach and help build:

- A master CRM template for surplus?funds operations  

- Pipelines, workflows, triggers, automations, calendars, and communication systems  

- A tagging and segmentation system that works across all future sub?accounts  

- User roles and permissions for reselling accounts  

- How to clone and duplicate the CRM for each new client  

- How to manage sub?accounts and agency?level settings  

- How to upload and organize course or training content inside the CRM  

- How to structure a membership or course area for future clients  



## Website and Funnel Creation Inside GoHighLevel

Help create a simple website inside GHL that:

- Explains the surplus?funds service  

- Collects leads  

- Connects to CRM automations  

- Can be duplicated and lightly customized for each new sub?account  



Train the owner on:

- Editing text, images, and links  

- Publishing and connecting domains  

- Cloning the website for new users  



## Excel and Lead List Training

Teach how to:

- Clean, format, and organize lead lists  

- Remove duplicates and standardize data  

- Prepare CSV or XLSX files for skip tracing  

- Upload and map fields correctly  

- Prepare cleaned lists for CRM importing  

- Maintain long?term data hygiene  



## Skip Tracing Training  

Teach the owner how to:



### Gather Public Information

- Pull property details from county public records  

- Read foreclosure auction lists  

- Identify owner names, parcel numbers, case numbers, sale dates, and related data  

- Verify property information across multiple public sources  



### Build a Clean Skip?Trace Spreadsheet

- Format names, addresses, and property data  

- Standardize fields  

- Remove duplicates  

- Prepare files for skip?trace companies  



### Upload to Skip Trace Provider

- Choose a skip?trace provider  

- Upload spreadsheets  

- Map fields correctly  

- Download and organize results  



### Import Skip?Traced Leads Into the CRM

- Map fields into GoHighLevel  

- Tag and categorize leads  

- Place leads into the correct pipelines  

- Maintain clean data for automations  



---



# End Goal of the Project



By the end of the training period, the owner should be able to:

- Fully operate the backend of GoHighLevel  

- Clone the CRM and website for each new client  

- Upload and manage course content  

- Handle all lead imports and data hygiene  

- Perform skip tracing from public data to CRM upload  

- Run a white?label CRM platform that can be resold repeatedly  

- Operate independently without outside help  



---



# Requirements



- Strong GoHighLevel experience, including snapshots, sub?accounts, and white?label setups  

- Experience building funnels or websites inside GHL  

- Strong Excel skills  

- Experience with skip tracing and foreclosure or public records  

- Ability to teach step?by?step with patience  

- Reliable internet and consistent availability  

- Must provide:  

  - Resume  

  - Explanation of why you are a great fit  

  - Samples of work (CRM builds, funnels, automations, spreadsheets, etc.)  

  - Voice message or video introduction  



---



# How to Apply



Please send:

- Your resume  

- A short explanation of why you are a great fit  

- Samples of your GoHighLevel work  

- A voice message or video introduction

title: Book Keeping Accountant
description:
## **Job Description: Bookkeeper / Project Accountant**



We are a specialized electrical subcontracting firm seeking a detail-oriented **Bookkeeper/Project Accountant** to manage our financial operations. Because we operate on a project-to-project basis, we need someone who understands the nuances of construction accounting, specifically within the **QuickBooks Desktop** environment.



---



### **Core Responsibilities**

* **QuickBooks Management:** Maintain accurate financial records using **QuickBooks Desktop**, ensuring all entries are categorized by specific project/job.

* **Project Invoice Management:** Oversee the full lifecycle of project billing; receive, verify, and enter all project-related invoices accurately.

* **Contract Administration:** Prepare and review subcontracting agreements and work orders to ensure terms align with project requirements.

* **Pay Applications:** Prepare and submit monthly **Applications for Payment** (Pay Apps), including all necessary lien waivers and supporting documentation.

* **Bid Coordination:** Assist the engineering and management teams by organizing financial data for project bids and tracking estimated vs. actual costs.



---



### **Requirements & Qualifications**

* **Software Expertise:** Mastery of **QuickBooks Desktop** is mandatory. Experience with the "Job Costing" features is a significant plus.

* **Construction Accounting Knowledge:** Familiarity with the subcontracting industry, including an understanding of retainage, overhead, and project-based billing.

* **Document Review:** Ability to carefully review contracts and legal documents for accuracy before execution.

* **Organizational Prowess:** Must be able to juggle multiple projects simultaneously without losing track of individual project budgets.

* **Communication:** Ability to coordinate effectively with project managers, vendors, and general contractors regarding payment status and contract terms.



---



### **What We Are Looking For**

* **Precision:** In the world of sub-contracting, a small error in a Pay App can delay a large payment. We need someone with a "measure twice, cut once" mentality toward data entry.

* **Proactive Problem Solving:** You should be comfortable identifying discrepancies between project bids and actual invoices before they become issues.

* **Industry Savvy:** Someone who understands the flow of a construction project—from the initial bid to the final punch list and closeout.



---



### **Why Join Our Team?**

You will be a vital part of our back-office engine. While our engineers build the systems, you will ensure the business remains financially healthy and organized. We offer a stable, professional environment where your expertise in construction finance will be truly valued.

title: Video Editor
description:
Location: Remote

Type: Full-time

Reports to: Videographer Lead

Travel: N/A



WHO WE ARE

7-Figure Educator® provides high-performing educators — with a particular emphasis on Black educators and educators of color — with the coaching, content, curriculum, and community needed to build six- and seven-figure education consulting businesses.



WHY WE DO WHAT WE DO

We believe deeply that “If anyone deserves to be a millionaire, it’s an educator.”

Our work exists to shift power, expand possibility, and help educators build wealth through ownership, strategy, and scale.



THE OPPORTUNITY

We are hiring a Video Editor  to serve as a member of our in-house media team.

This role sits at the intersection of brand, storytelling, culture, and strategy. You will not only execute high-quality video content editing day-to-day, but also help build the systems, standards, and vision for our media department.

This is an ideal opportunity for a freelance video editor who is ready to trade the unpredictability of entrepreneurship for stability, leadership, and long-term growth inside a mission-driven company.

You will report to our Manager of Marketing & Content Strategy, and Lead Videographer with a clear growth path as our media function scales.



Our Video Style & Content

Video is a core part of our brand, not an afterthought. Before applying, we encourage candidates to review our existing video content to get a clear sense of our visual style, storytelling approach, and production expectations. 



Our content lives at the intersection of:

- Strategic business education

- Upscale, luxury aesthetics

- Culture-forward storytelling

- High-touch events and experiences

This role will build on what exists today while helping evolve and elevate our video strategy as we scale.



Here’s what video actually looks like in our brand today — and where you’ll be building from.










==


==





Candidates should be excited to both execute at this level immediately and elevate our video quality and systems over time.



WHO YOU ARE

You’re the type of person who:

- Believes in the mission. This isn’t “just content.” You care about educators, impact, and wealth-building through ownership.

Own outcomes. You don’t wait to be reminded. You proactively identify what’s missing, what’s next, and what “excellent” should look like.

- Thinks ahead. You have a plan for deliverables before the 
nt arrives (template building, audio plans, backup plans, timelines).

- Works autonomously. You can run your lane without constant supervision, while keeping the team informed.

- Team Player. Loves working as part of a team, collaborating closely with senior videographers and other creative teams.

- Communicates proactively. You communicate needs, tradeoffs, and solutions clearly, without drama or confusion.

Is solutions-oriented under pressure. Fast turnarounds and shifting priorities don’t shake you. You stay calm, understand flexibility and execute anyway.

- Film-Lover. Staying up to date on filmmaking techniques, tools, and styles excites you, and you're constantly looking to improve your workflow with the latest updates.

- Is detail-driven. Audio, lighting, framing, pacing, final edits and organization matter to you and it shows in your work.

- Thrives in a fast-moving environment. Not chaotic, but real: priorities shift, launches happen, and you can adjust without losing quality.

- Has taste and craves artistry. You understand what “premium” looks like, feels like, and sounds like and you know how to consistently deliver it.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Content Creation & Production:

- Professionally edit short-form social content (approximately 3–6 reels per day)

- Edit weekly video podcast episodes (24–48 hour turnaround)

- Cut mid-form podcast clips weekly (10–20 minutes)

- Create event photography, event recap videos, testimonials, and promotional assets from live events and speaking engagements

- Storytell using behind-the-scenes content, course materials, webinars, and live-streamed events

- Execute day-to-day content aligned with brand guidelines while contributing creative direction for special projects, campaigns, and events

- Build and utilize motion graphics, and templates using Premier Pro, Capcut, and Aftereffects



Events:

- Support 8–10 tour stops per quarter (seasonal)

- Download high-quality event footage including testimonials, BTS, and recap content in order to provide fast turnarounds of social media reels, and event recaps. 

- Partner with video and marketing teams to ensure content is captured intentionally and efficiently



Leadership & Media Buildout

- Collaborate closely with Video lead and Marketing teams on content planning and execution

Maintain workflows, file management systems, and editing standards

- Contribute to the long-ter
dia vision, including creating editing standards for podcasts, docuseries, and branded content initiatives



WHAT YOU BRING

Required:

- Minimum 5 years of professional video editing experience, ideally including creative, commercial, and promotional video content.

- Proven experience producing high-volume content across:

Short-form (30–90 seconds)

Mid-form (10–20 minutes)

- Strong portfolio demonstrating:

Event recaps

Live production

- Polished brand storytelling

- Proficiency with professional editing tools (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, or similar)

- Ownership of professional-grade equipment (software and hardware, fast internet speeds) suitable for high-volume edits, uploads, and downloads of 4k video content.

- The company provides a budget for software upgrades and additional hardware as needed for events, podcasts, and special productions.

- Ability to meet fast turnarounds:

Same-day reels

24–48 hour podcast edits

1–5 business days for event recaps depending on scope



Nice to Have

- Experience in education, coaching, or online business spaces

- A strong eye for upscale, luxury, and culturally rich aesthetics

- Have worked with high-end brands/clients

- Familiarity with platform-specific content strategy and social media trends

- Familiarity with AI-powered editing softwares. 



Work Details:

Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST, with flexibility during events

Must have own computer, reliable internet, and phone

title: ORGANIC GROWTH & CONVERSION SPECIALIST|Profit Share Structure | Beauty Education Brand
description:
WHO WE ARE

The Detailist is a fast-growing online beauty education company with 136,000+ Instagram followers 
 75,000+ TikTok followers 
 7,000+ Youtube Followers 
 10,000+
 followers and over 
,000 students worldwide, over 4.7* Trustpilot (
) — a large, engaged audience that has never been fully capitalised on.



We sell accredited digital brow training courses and are scaling rapidly. We have been featured across major platforms and our content regularly hits millions of views per month organically. We are not a startup. We are a proven, revenue-generating business with active paid advertising,
 marketing, and a strong organic presence that has never been fully capitalised on. That is the gap you are here to close.



The Opportunity

We are hiring an Organic Growth and Conversion Specialist — someone who treats every post, every story, every DM, and every comment as a revenue opportunity. This is NOT a content scheduling role. This is a sales-driven organic growth role where your job is to turn our existing audience into daily buyers and our warm leads into paying customers.



We already have ManyChat automations with 50%+ open rate. Organic funnels live and producing sales already. We already have a content pipeline. We already have testimonials, student wins, Trustpilot reviews, and a highly engaged following. 



What we do not have is someone whose full focus is on converting all of that into daily, measurable revenue.



This role comes with a base structure and a profit share arrangement tied directly to organic revenue performance. We want someone who wants to grow with us, not just manage us.



WHAT THE JOB REQUIRES - YOUR ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. DAILY CONTENT EXECUTION

Post minimum 2 times per day per platform:

-Instagram, TikTok,
, YouTube Shorts

-Adapt content per platform (not copy/paste)

-Manage posting using scheduling tools (e.g. Later)

-Writing captions, headlines, copy - all sales driven



2. INSTAGRAM STORIES (HIGH PRIORITY) - at the 
nt we are not posting on our stories this is heavily under-utilised

Post minimum 4+ story sequences per day on instagram 

All stories must be:

Sales-focused, Conversion-driven, Leading to offers or DMs

Use: Trustpilot reviews, Student results, Testimonials, Behind-the-scenes, Direct CTAs

- You will be required to create the instagram stories 



3. CONTENT CREATION (TEAM EFFORT)

-Must be able to create/edit content yourself suitable for instagram,
, youtube etc 

-Use existing content from our library

-Mix, edit, and repurpose content

-Direct and lead us on what content is required for us to create, aligning with a clear testing strategy based on social media analytics and data



We will: Film and provide bulk content

???? You must manage and organise all content inside Google Drive



4. CREATIVE STRATEGY (YOU LEAD)

Tell us exactly what content to create:

Hooks, Headlines, Angles, Formats

You must be able to direct:

What should be filmed, What is working, What needs testing

???? We help to execute — you lead direction. Creatives can be passed back within 24/48hours 



5. AI CONTENT CREATION (IMPORTANT)

We currently are not using AI and this is something we know could help us with content creation and growth on social media. We are looking for someone who can use AI tools to increase content output:

-AI avatars / cloning (e.g. HeyGen), AI-generated videos

So we can create additional content without relying on filming. You must have clear direction and experience to use these tools and will be solely in-charge of this. We will be able to authorise and approve content within 24 hours. 



6. DM SALES & CONVERSIONS (CORE ROLE)

Be active in DMs every single day

You role will include the responsibility to respond to:

Leads, Questions, Comments

Proactively following up warm leads, start conversations and ultimately moving people toward buying



???? This is a SALES role, not just support



7. MANYCHAT MANAGEMENT

We currently have manychat automations in place with a 50%+ open rate. This is heavily under-optimised and needs someone to come in and manage and optimise all ManyChat flows

Actively working to improve Click-through rates & Conversion rates for all funnels and offers 



8. PRODUCT MATCHING & UPSELLING

We have multiple offers. We need someone who can analyse and understand all offers and match the right offer to the right person. Upsell where appropriate, Identify high-value buyers & convert the leads to sales. 



9. COMPETITOR RESEARCH, ANALYTICS & OPTIMISATION (IMPORTANT)

-Conduct ongoing research into competitors and top-performing creators in the beauty and online education space to identify what content, hooks, and strategies are currently driving engagement and conversions with competitors.

-Track and analyse daily performance across all organic channels, including content performance, story engagement, DM conversations, ManyChat metrics, and actual sales generated through ClickFunnels.

-Use a shared tracking sheet to log results, identify patterns, and clearly see what content and actions are leading to revenue.

-Continuously optimise strategy based on real data, doubling down on what is working, adjusting what is underperforming, and proactively suggesting new directions to improve conversions and overall revenue.



???? You are responsible for turning organic content, DMs, and attention into daily revenue 



WHO IS THIS ROLE FOR: 

This is ideal for someone who:

-Someone who has time and attention to commit to this. Please serious applicants only.

-Is hungry for growth, not just a paycheck. Wants to be rewarded based on results, not hours

-Wants to step into a role where they can 10x a channel

-Sales-minded first, creative second

-Obsessed with conversion. Comfortable in DMs selling daily

-Data-driven and decisive

-Proactive (you bring strategy, not wait for instructions) BUT great at communication - This is very important to us. 

-Experienced using multiple platforms and tools

-Hungry to scale with a fast-growing brand

-Someone who understands how to protect and elevate the brand while selling. You will be speaking as the voice of the brand, so communication must feel natural, trustworthy, and aligned not overly aggressive or pushy. We are looking for a nurture-first, conversion-focused approach, where sales are driven through trust, value, and relationship-building rather than hard selling.



**You MUST be highly communicative. Provide updates through whatsapp, weekly reports on performance, insights, and next steps. Be aligned with targets and revenue goals and be motivated by performance and growth.



THE OPPORTUNITY

This is NOT a typical social media role.

This is a ground-floor opportunity to take ownership of a massively underutilised revenue channel inside a proven business.



Right now:

-We are posting inconsistently (around 10–13 times per month)

-We are already generating organic sales

-We have a strong audience, strong offers, and strong brand positioning



???? Which means: The upside here is significant.



THERE IS MASSIVE GROWTH POTENTIAL 

Organic is one of the core pillars of our business, but it has not been fully optimised.

We already have:

-A large audience with proven offers that convert. Testimonials, reviews, and social proof and paid systems that validate what works



What we don’t have yet is someone fully focused on:

???? turning organic into a consistent, scalable daily revenue stream



Pay & Performance-Based Upside (Uncapped)

This role includes:

-A base salary (for consistency and execution) - can be paid weekly, bi-weekly or monthly

-A performance-based profit share tied directly to organic revenue once profit-share target is reached.

As organic revenue grows, your income grows.



If you are the right person, this can become a high-income position very quickly



HOW TO APPLY

Do not send a CV. Do not send a generic cover letter. We will not read them.

What we want to see is simple: proof that you can do this job.



Show us your results. Share accounts you have worked on, what your specific contribution was, and what measurably changed because of your work. Follower counts alone do not interest us. Revenue impact, DM conversion rates, ManyChat performance, funnel traffic from organic — that is the language we speak. Show us you speak it too.



Complete an audit of our accounts. Go 
 on Instagram and TikTok. Tell us what is underperforming and why based on what you can see. Tell us what is missing. Tell us what you would change in the first seven days and what you would expect to happen as a result. Tell us where you see the biggest untapped conversion opportunity. This is the most important part of your application. Do not skim it.



Be honest about your availability. This role requires near full-time hours and daily execution from day one. We move fast and we need someone who can move with us. If you cannot start within the next few days or cannot commit the hours, please do not apply.



Be ready to communicate like a professional. Daily updates via WhatsApp. Weekly structured reports — what worked, what did not, what is being tested, what is next. We do not micromanage, but we do expect clarity. If you cannot give us that, this is not the right role for you.



Applications without the audit will not be considered.

If you are the right person, your application will make that obvious. We are not looking for the most experienced person. We are looking for the most serious one.

Send everything through onlinejobs or 
 with the subject line: Organic Growth Specialist — The Detailist



30-DAY TRIAL PERIOD (Important)

This role will begin with a 30-day trial period.



During this time, we are not simply evaluating results — we are evaluating how you operate.

We understand that in the first 30 days there are multiple moving parts, testing phases, and adjustments required. While revenue impact will be considered, our primary focus is on how you think, communicate, and execute within the role.



What We Will Be Assessing

During the trial period, we will be evaluating you based on:



Proactivity

-Are you identifying opportunities, gaps, and improvements without being prompted?

-Do you bring ideas, direction, and solutions to the table?



Communication

-Are you clear, consistent, and professional in your communication with both the team and customers?

-Do you keep us informed on what is being done, what is working, and what needs to change?



Execution & Consistency

-Are you able to maintain the required posting schedule, manage DMs, and handle daily responsibilities without drop-off?

-Can you keep up with the pace of the role?



Analytical Thinking

-Are you able to identify what content, messaging, or strategies are working and more importantly, why?

-Do you make decisions based on data rather than guesswork?



Customer Interaction (DMs & Comments)

-Are you communicating with leads in a way that is aligned with the brand professional, trust-building, and conversion-focused without being overly aggressive?



Ownership & Initiative

-Do you take ownership of the role, or do you wait for instructions?



We are looking for someone who can step in and lead this area of the business, not just manage tasks.

We are looking for someone whose experience matches their application, and who can demonstrate that quickly.

This is not a short-term position.



If the trial period is successful, this will become a long-term role within the business, with significant responsibility and growth potential. Our goal is to step back from the day-to-day organic operations and place full trust in someone who can take ownership of this function and scale it.

title: (1) Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)
description:
OB TITLE:

Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that works with service-based businesses (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.), primarily in the US market. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can create scroll-stopping content across multiple formats.



You'll be our go-to creative person — editing short-form videos for social media, producing ad creatives for Meta and Google campaigns, and designing graphics for our clients' brands. You'll also work with AI tools like HeyGen and ElevenLabs to produce AI-generated video and voiceover content.



This isn't a "just cut clips together" role. You'll be creating content that directly drives leads and sales for real businesses, so you need to understand what makes people stop scrolling, click, and take action.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) — fast-paced, hook-driven, optimized for engagement

-Create video ads for Meta and Google campaigns (direct response style)

-Produce client deliverables such as testimonial videos, promo videos, and brand content

-Use AI video/voice tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs) to create and enhance content

-Design static graphics — social media posts, ad creatives, thumbnails, banners

-Collaborate with our team on content strategy and creative direction

-Maintain consistent quality and meet turnaround deadlines



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 2 years of experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-Strong graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum; Photoshop/Illustrator is a plus)

-Experience editing short-form, direct-response, or social media content (not just vlogs or cinematic edits)

-Familiarity with AI content tools — HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar platforms

-Good eye for typography, color, and layout

-Understands hooks, pacing, and what performs well on social platforms

-Reliable internet connection and able to work during reasonable overlap hours

-Can manage multiple projects and hit deadlines without constant follow-up



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience designing or building landing pages (using tools like GoHighLevel, WordPress, Unbounce, or similar)

-Background working in or with a digital marketing agency

-Basic understanding of paid ads and what makes a creative convert

-Motion graphics or animation skills



COMPENSATION:

-Full-time position

-Salary is open and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

-Long-term role with room to grow as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY:



Important: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Creative" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:



-A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

-Links to your portfolio or samples of your work (video edits, graphics, landing pages if applicable)

-Which AI tools you've used and how you've used them

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start



We review every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Public Records Data Researcher
description:
HIRING: Public Records Data Researcher / Scraper

Remote | $3 to $5 per hour





HOW TO APPLY



Do NOT apply through this platform. Applications submitted here will not be considered.



Thank you for your interest in the Data Researcher position. To move forward, please complete the following:



Create a screen recording (Loom or similar recording link) (NOT A DOWNLOADED FILE) and send it to 
 with the subject line:



"[Your Name] - Data Researcher Interview Request"



In your recording, choose TWO of the following three counties:



Anderson County, SC

Duval County, FL

Wake County, NC



For each of your two chosen counties, walk us through how you would find the following types of records:



1. Tax Delinquent Records

2. Probate Records

3. Code Violations



If any of these records are not publicly available online for a given county, show us how you would document and initiate their FOIA (Freedom of Information Act) request process instead.



Upon review, we will invite you to do an interview. We want to see your research methodology, resourcefulness, and how you document your findings. Good luck!





ABOUT THE ROLE



We're looking for a sharp, resourceful data researcher who knows how to navigate government websites, county portals, and public records systems to find, document, and organize processes at scale.



This role has two main areas of responsibility.



PART 1: Real Estate Lead Source Research



You'll be responsible for researching and fully documenting the exact processes, online portals, submission
s, and contact information for sourcing distressed property leads across unlimited counties. This includes:



County portals and processes for code violations

Pre probate and probate filing access

Distressed property and vacant property lists

Tax delinquent and lien records

Any publicly available lead sources for real estate wholesaling



For every county we need the exact submission process, the portal URL, the contact
, and step by step documentation so our team can replicate it without guessing. You're building the playbook.



PART 2: Construction Permit and Inspection Research



Same concept, different data. You'll be finding and documenting public portals and processes for:



Building permits (new builds, renovations)

Electrical permits

Strapping and insulation inspections

General inspection schedules and records

Any permit activity that signals active construction projects





WHAT THE DELIVERABLE LOOKS LIKE



This is not just a spreadsheet of URLs and
s. For every county and every data source we need a full detailed SOP that anyone on our team could follow without asking a single question. That means:



If there's an online portal you're documenting exactly what to click, what menus to navigate, what dropdowns to select, screen by screen

The exact filters to use to pull the data we need

If there are patterns in permit numbers or violation numbers or case IDs you're documenting those patterns so we can search efficiently

If it's a FOIA or public records submission you're documenting the exact
, what to write, what to reference, and what format the response comes back in

Any quirks or workarounds or tricks you find along the way that make the process faster or more reliable

Everything organized so we can scale this to any new county and hit the ground running



The standard is simple. Someone with zero experience in that county could sit down, follow your documentation, and pull the right data correctly on the first try. No questions asked.





REQUIREMENTS



Experience navigating government and public records websites

Strong attention to detail and documentation skills

Ability to work independently and figure things out without hand holding

Comfortable working across dozens of counties and varying portal formats

Clear communication in English



We're not looking for someone to just copy and paste URLs. We need someone who can dig, problem solve when a county doesn't make it easy, and deliver clean usable documentation every time.

title: Recruiting Operations & Referral Support Virtual Assistant
description:
Full Time - Long Term - Real Estate Brokerage



We are a fast growing, high performance real estate brokerage operating across multiple states in the U.S. We are hiring a detail-obsessed, process-driven Virtual Assistant to support our Recruiting Department and Referral Operations.

If you love checklists, clean CRMs, accurate reporting, and keeping people on track, you will thrive here. If you miss details or need constant direction, this is not the right fit. 



What You Will Be Responsible For: 



 • Recruiting Pipeline Management - You will manage the administrative side of our recruiting process from initial inquiry through onboarding. This includes sending intake forms, tracking candidate progress, maintaining accurate CRM records, scheduling calls, sending reminders, executing follow up sequences, and ensuring every touchpoint is documented properly. Our leadership team makes hiring decisions. Your role is to ensure the process runs smoothly and cleanly.

 • CRM & Data Integrity - You will maintain strict CRM health and cleanliness. Every candidate must be tagged correctly, placed in the proper stage, and updated in real time. You will flag stalled conversations, protect deadlines, and ensure reporting numbers are accurate. Clean data is non-negotiable.

 • Reporting & Metrics Support - You will assist in preparing monthly recruiting reports by pulling and organizing performance data including appointments, interviews, conversions, onboarding progress, and retention metrics. Accuracy and timeliness matter.

 • Referral Operations & Documentation - You will support referral tracking from intake through payout. This includes logging referrals, maintaining tracking spreadsheets, organizing agreements and W 9s, monitoring key dates, and ensuring compliance documentation is complete. You will also send structured status updates to agents and leadership.

 • Process & SOP Maintenance - You will help formalize and maintain internal processes. This includes organizing Google Drive systems, updating SOP documents, maintaining
 and text templates, and keeping workflows aligned as processes evolve.

 • Quality Control & Escalation - Before marking any task complete, you are responsible for verifying that records are updated, documentation is uploaded, and communication has been sent. You will escalate when deadlines are at risk, responses are missing, or compliance or financial issues arise.



What This Role Is Not - This role does not include interviewing candidates and making hiring decisions. If successful in other areas, there could be room for growth in the future. 



Ideal Candidate

 • Extremely detail oriented

 • Comfortable managing multiple moving parts

 • Strong written English required, strong spoken English preferred 

 • Experienced with CRMs and Google Drive

 • Process driven and structured

 • Able to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours (TBD but able to work an 8-hour shift between 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM) 

Real estate experience is a plus, but operational discipline matters more.



Employment Information

 • Employee will be paid according to our pay periods: For dates 11th - 25th and 26th - 10th, they will receive funds on the 15th and 30th of each month. 

 • Employee will be paid in US currency, via OnlinePH Easy pay. 

 • Employee must have a time tracking set via OnlinePh.



How to Apply

 • Confirm your availability in U.S. Eastern Time.

 • Share your internet speed and computer specifications.

 • Briefly describe a system you’ve managed or maintained long term.



We are hiring for stability and long term growth. If you value structure, clarity, and accountability, this may be a strong fit.

title: HR Generalist
description:
Join Our Remote Accounting Team!

We are a fast-growing, boutique outsourced accounting firm supporting high-growth e-commerce and service-based businesses. We’ve been behind the scenes helping some of the most exciting DTC brands scale with confidence through expert bookkeeping, financial systems, and strategic insights.



We are a remote-first company with a collaborative, client-first culture — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.



About the Role

We are looking for a hands-on HR Generalist who thrives in a startup environment and is excited to help build the HR function from the ground up. This role goes beyond day-to-day HR support — you will play a key role in setting up foundational HR processes, shaping people practices, and supporting the growth of our teams as the company scales.



As a young and fast-growing company, growth opportunities are significant. You will have the chance to help build teams, influence culture, and design systems that will evolve alongside the business. While the team currently operates in a distributed setup, the role is designed to support both remote and future on-site tea
mbers.



You will work closely with the HR and Talent Acquisition Manager and the COO to establish strong HR frameworks, ensure compliance, and deliver a positive tea
mber experience across the U.S. and the Philippines.



Your Responsibilities

** Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

- Manage full-cycle recruitment especially for finance and accounting roles, including Bookkeepers, Senior Bookkeepers, Accountants, and related positions.

- Source, screen, and interview candidates across the U.S. and the Philippines.

- Partner with hiring managers to clarify role needs and support workforce planning as teams grow.

- Build and continuously improve recruitment processes suitable for a startup environment.

- Coordinate interviews, reference checks, and offer processes.

- Maintain the applicant tracking system and ensure a smooth, professional candidate experience.



**HR Setup, Processes & Administration

- Help build and formalize HR processes, policies, and documentation from the ground up.

- Manage onboarding and offboarding processes, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and a strong first and last experience for tea
mbers.

- Maintain and update HR records, templates, and internal guidelines as the company scales.

- Handle HR-related requests, documentation, and internal communications.



**Tea
mber Relations & Benefits Management

- Serve as the primary point of contact for tea
mber questions, concerns, and support.

- Administer benefits programs, including paid time off, leave requests, and other people-related benefits.

- Support a positive, respectful, and compliant work environment for both remote and on-site tea
mbers.



**Performance, Growth & Talent Development

- Coordinate performance review cycles and support the rollout of feedback and development frameworks.

- Partner with leaders to provide guidance on coaching, performance conversations, and growth planning.

- Support career development and internal mobility initiatives as teams expand.



**Process Improvement & HR Partnership

- Identify opportunities to streamline, automate, and improve HR workflows.

- Support HR system implementation and enhancements.

- Act as a strategic HR partner to leadership, offering people insights and recommendations as the organization grows.



Your Skills & Qualifications

- 3+ years of experience as an HR Generalist or in a similar HR role.

- Proven experience managing both contractor and employee relationships, particularly within the U.S.

- Hands-on experience in full-cycle recruitment across the U.S. and the Philippines.

- Proven success in recruiting for finance and accounting roles.

- Solid understanding of U.S. labor laws and HR compliance, including contractor-based models.

- Comfortable working in a startup or fast-growth environment where processes are being built and refined.

- Strong communication, problem-solving, and stakeholder management skills.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a dynamic and evolving environment.



What’s in it for You?

- 100% Remote Work – Support teams from anywhere in the Philippines

- Career Growth – Be part of a growing company with opportunities to help build teams and advance your HR career

- Competitive Pay – $8/hour + benefits as an independent contractor

- Paid Time Off – 7 days of PTO per year + paid holidays (100% extra pay if worked)

- Medical Aid Bonus – Monthly medical stipend

- Supportive Culture – Work closely with leaders in a collaborative, growth-oriented environment



If you’re excited about building, scaling, and shaping HR in a startup setting, we’d love to hear from you.
