title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to 

2. Subject line: Lead Transactions Coordinator – [Full Name]

3.
 body must include only:

- A short greeting

- A Google Drive folder link

- Your answer to the Detail Check (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named: [Your Full Name] — Lead Transactions Coordinator Application

2. Set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view.”

3. You can organize the folder however you think is best. I will be looking at both what you submit and how you organize it.

4. Include the following:

a. Resume (PDF)

b. Tech and Setup

   - Include a screenshot of your internet speed showing download and upload speeds. 

   - Include a screenshot of your computer specs showing RAM, processor, and OS.

   - Include one photo of your current workspace (desk and computer).

c. Written Answers (one Google Doc)

   - Transactions Coordinator Experience

      - Describe one property management role or company you worked with. Include:

      - Number of properties/units

      - Your day-to-day responsibilities

      - Tools you used 

   - Taking Ownership

      - We already have SOPs and systems, but they’re still improving.

      - What would you focus on in your first 2 weeks to keep operations running smoothly without needing constant supervision?

d. Systems Proof (2–4 screenshots)

   - At least 1 “HQ” or home base view you’ve built (for a founder/team)

      Example: a dashboard, control panel, or main view in ClickUp, Asana, Notion, etc.

   - At least 1 project management board or folder structure you created

      Example: a tool for maintenance tracking, tenant or leasing pipeline, or vendor coordination

   - For each screenshot, add a short caption (this can be in a small Google Doc or directly on the image as text), including:

      - What the system is used for

      - Which tool it’s in (ClickUp, Asana, Google Drive, Notion, etc.)

      - What part you personally designed or organized

   - If you cannot share screenshots from a previous client because of confidentiality, you may recreate a similar structure in a fresh workspace (with fake data) and take screenshots of that instead.

e. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)

   - Who you are and where you’re based

   - Your Transactions Coordinator experience (+team leading)

   - Example of handling multiple stakeholders at once

   - How you personally stay organized



STEP 3 — DETAIL CHECK

title: UGC & Project Manager
description:
What this position is responsible for:



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive UGC & Project Manager to oversee creator relationships and manage the operational flow of UGC campaigns. This role plays a critical part in ensuring that creator partnerships, campaign deliverables, and internal collaboration run smoothly from start to finish. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced digital marketing environment, is detail-oriented, and can confidently coordinate between creators, internal teams, and clients to ensure campaigns are executed at a high standard.



Requirements/Experience:

- 1–3+ years of experience in UGC management, influencer marketing, social media marketing, or digital marketing operations



- Experience sourcing, recruiting, and managing UGC creators or influencers across platforms such as TikTok and Instagram



- Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



- Excellent communication and negotiation skills when working with creators and coordinating with internal teams



- Ability to manage timelines, deliverables, and campaign documentation with a high level of attention to detail



- Familiarity with social media trends, creator ecosystems, and UGC-style content



- Experience reviewing content and ensuring it follows brand guidelines, scripts, and campaign briefs



- Proficiency with project management tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms (e.g., Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Trello, etc.)



- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, delays, or bottlenecks early



- Self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently in a remote environment





Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



UGC Management



- Source and recruit high-quality UGC creators across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and other relevant social media channels to support ongoing campaigns.



- Build, maintain, and continuously grow a reliable roster of creators, ensuring access to talent that aligns with brand positioning and campaign goals.



- Conduct creator outreach and relationship management, including communication, negotiation of deliverables, and maintaining professional partnerships.



- Distribute campaign briefs, scripts, and brand guidelines to creators, ensuring all expectations and creative requirements are clearly communicated.



- Review and evaluate creator submissions to ensure content meets campaign standards before forwarding for internal or client approval.



- Track and document creator performance, reliability, and content quality to inform future collaborations.



- Maintain and organize creator databases, ensuring accurate records of contact details, past performance, and campaign participation.



Project Management



- Coordinate campaign timelines and deliverables between creators, internal team members, and clients to ensure smooth campaign execution.



- Monitor campaign schedules to ensure all deliverables are completed on time and meet required deadlines.



- Organize and maintain campaign assets and documentation, including briefs, scripts, and project files.



- Track overall project progress, proactively identifying potential delays, bottlenecks, or issues that may impact timelines.



- Communicate updates across teams to maintain alignment and ensure all stakeholders are informed throughout the campaign lifecycle.



- Support the overall campaign workflow by ensuring tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities are clearly defined and executed.



Apply today to join our team!



Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP

, TikTok)

, Instagram, and TikTok

title: SEO & Funnel Specialist (GoHighLevel + n8n Experience Required)
description:
We are looking for an experienced SEO and funnel specialist to support our growing digital agency. This role is ideal for someone who has a strong background in search engine optimization and building high-converting funnels, particularly using GoHighLevel and n8n for automations.



Important: This is not a fixed-hours position. Work will be project-based depending on client needs, but we currently have at least two clients who require ongoing SEO work, with additional funnel builds as new projects come in.



Responsibilities

Develop and implement SEO strategies to improve organic traffic and search rankings

Perform keyword research, on-page optimization, and technical SEO improvements

Build and optimize high-converting funnels using GoHighLevel

Create and manage automations using n8n to streamline marketing workflows

Track SEO performance and provide clear reporting on rankings, traffic, and results

Optimize funnels for lead generation and conversions

Collaborate with our team on digital marketing strategies for client projects

Requirements

Proven experience with SEO and measurable results for past clients

Experience building funnels in GoHighLevel

Experience working with n8n automation workflows

Strong understanding of technical SEO, on-page SEO, and content optimization

Ability to analyze SEO data and improve performance

Strong communication and ability to work independently on projects

Application Requirements



Please include the following when applying:



Examples of SEO results you have achieved (rankings, traffic growth, case studies, etc.)

Links or screenshots of funnels you have built using GoHighLevel

Examples of automations you have built in n8n

A short explanation of your SEO strategy when starting with a new client



We are looking for someone who can demonstrate real results, not just theoretical knowledge.

title: Executive & Operations Support
description:
We are building a curated talent pool of elite Virtual Assistants to match with high-growth businesses and busy professionals across the US. This is not a role for someone who waits to be told what to do — we are looking for sharp, self-driven individuals who treat every client's business like their own.

If you spot a problem before it becomes one, draft the
 before being asked, and thrive in a fast-moving environment — we want to meet you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Responsibilities will vary by client placement, but core functions include:

• Inbox & Calendar Management —  Own the inbox, prioritize with judgment, and keep the calendar running without gaps or conflicts.

• Client & Stakeholder Communication —  Draft, proofread, and send professional correspondence on behalf of clients.

• Task & Project Coordination —  Track moving pieces, follow up proactively, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

• Light Financial Support —  Assist with expense tracking, invoice management, and basic bookkeeping coordination.

• Research & Reporting —  Gather information, synthesize it, and deliver it in a clear, actionable format.

• Process Improvement —  Identify inefficiencies and suggest better ways of doing things — without being asked.

• Tools & Systems Management —  Manage platforms such as Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, Trello, Zoom, and others as needed.



YOU ARE A STRONG FIT IF YOU...

• Speak and write English with exceptional clarity — your communication is crisp, professional, and polished

• Take initiative as a default, not an exception

• Are highly organized and nothing slips past you

• Can manage competing priorities without losing your cool

• Are tech-savvy and can learn new tools quickly without hand-holding

• Solve problems independently before escalating

• Are reliable, punctual, and consistent — every single day

• Have experience supporting executives, business owners, or entrepreneurs



REQUIREMENTS

• 2+ years of experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, or in a remote operations role

• Outstanding spoken and written English (a voice screening is part of our process)

• Solid working knowledge of Google Workspace and/or Microsoft 365

• Experience with
 management tools, scheduling platforms, and project management tools

• Light experience with financial tasks — expense tracking, invoicing, or basic bookkeeping

• Stable, high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace

• Available to work US business hours (full or partial overlap required)



WHAT SETS OUR TOP CANDIDATES APART

• You don't just complete tasks — you anticipate what's needed next

• You communicate proactively, not reactively

• You bring solutions, not just problems

• You treat confidentiality and discretion as non-negotiable

• You're not looking for a job — you're looking to build a career



OUR HIRING PROCESS

1. Application & Written Screening — We evaluate communication skills from the very first message.

2. Voice/Audio Review — English fluency and professionalism are assessed here.

3. Skills Assessment — A short practical task relevant to the role.

4. Reference Check

5. Talent Pool Placement — Matched with the right client when a fit opens.



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, you must submit ALL THREE of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Updated Resume (PDF format preferred)

2. Voice Recording (60–90 seconds) — Record using any device and share a link via Google Drive, Dropbox, or 
. In your recording, cover:   

• Your name and brief background   

• Your relevant experience   

• Why you are a strong fit and what makes you different

3. Written Response (150–200 words): "Describe a time you identified a problem at work and solved it before being asked."



?  Applications submitted without a voice recording will be automatically disqualified. This step is non-negotiable and is the first test of your ability to follow instructions.





We review applications on a rolling basis. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds.

title: Capcut / TikTok editor
description:

It'll be mostly just providing scripts (Prompts) to an AI tool and then adding the voice to a capcut video. It's quite easy once you get the hang of it, which we'll train you to do! 



The salary would be $500/month + you'll get bonuses on top of the salary if videos go viral.

- Strong internet connection

- Reliable power and PC

title: Real Estate Video Editor & Content Coordinator — Reels, YouTube, Canva & Scheduling
description:
If you're a skilled video editor who also knows your way around Canva and Meta Business Suite, and you want to work inside a fast-moving real estate brand with a clear system already in place — this is your seat.



What You'll Do: 

Video Editing

- Edit short-form content for Instagram Reels,
, and TikTok-style clips from raw footage

- Edit long-form content for YouTube and property walkthroughs

- Add captions, graphics, music, and branding elements to all video

- Repurpose long-form content into multiple short-form clips

- Maintain consistent pacing, style, and brand feel across all video



Graphics & Design

- Create social media graphics and stat cards in Canva

- Design listing flyers, market update cards, and story templates

- Maintain brand consistency across all visual assets



Scheduling & Posting

- Schedule and publish content across Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and Google Business Profile via Meta Business Suite

- Maintain a content calendar and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

- Pull and organize content assets from shared folders



Light Admin

- Organize and label video files and assets in Google Drive

- Track content status in Airtable or similar

- Flag anything that needs attention before publishing



Who You Are

You are a skilled editor first. You have a feel for pacing, for what makes someone keep watching, and for how to make a talking-head video feel engaging rather than flat.



You don't need to write the content. You need to make it shine.



- Proficient in CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software

- Strong Canva skills — not just templates, actual design instinct

- Experience with Meta Business Suite scheduling

- Organized, reliable, and deadline-driven

- Comfortable working from a content system with clear SOPs

- Reliable internet and available for partial U.S. Central Time overlap



Real estate experience is a plus but not required.



HOW TO APPLY — Read This Carefully

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Basic Info

- Hourly rate request (USD)

- Hours available in U.S. Central Time

- Hours per week you're seeking



2. Video Test — Final candidates will be asked to do a quick 60-second edit 



3. Show Us Your Work

Share a link to your portfolio or two to three examples of video work you've edited — one short form and one long form if possible. Real client work preferred over spec.



4. Software Experience

Brief description of your experience with:



- Video editing software (which ones and how long)

- Canva

- Meta Business Suite

- AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

Build A Gym is a fast-growing fitness equipment company based in Texas. We sell and install commercial and home gym equipment under the BUILT Strength brand, and we're scaling our content. This is a full-time remote role. Footage is delivered via organized Google Drive folders. You download, edit, and upload finished cuts. Two check-in meetings per week over Google Meet. No hand-holding — we want someone who can take a folder of clips and run with it.

- Strong portfolio of Meta 
/Instagram) ads that have run in market

title: Full-Time Administrative Assistant
description:
Company: Higher Results Education Inc.



Company Overview

Higher Results Education Inc. is a Canada-based education consulting company that works closely with colleges and students. As part of our expansion in the Philippines, we are hiring skilled and reliable individuals for long-term, full-time remote positions.



Work Schedule (Non-Negotiable)



60–70 hours per week



Fixed shift: 3:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Manila time)

Daily use of CRMs (GoHighLevel, Monday, or similar)



Sending professional
s and follow-ups

Following SOPs exactly and meeting deadlines



Flagging issues early — no excuses, no disappearing

Proven experience working with CRMs and systems



Comfortable with:



Google Docs, Sheets, Gmail



PDFs, forms, file organization



Stable high-speed internet



Backup internet required (mobile data or second provider)



Backup power source required (generator, power station, or equivalent)



Must be willing to show internet speed, backup internet, and power setup on camera



Quiet, professional work environment



Can commit full-time, long-term to Vancouver hours



System & Reliability Expectations



You will work inside structured workflows and CRMs daily



You must follow systems exactly and learn tools quickly



Internet or power issues are not acceptable excuses

Someone who does not need babysitting



Organized, fast, detail-oriented

Treats this as a long-term career

Path to Senior Admin / Admin Manager



Long-term stability

 the following to

title: Remote, Part-time Online ELA Tutor (Work From Home!)
description:
Brighterly is a sophisticated Ed-tech startup that provides an after-school English Language Arts & Math excellence programs for children from kindergarten to grade 8 studying in the USA. We believe that strong literacy skills shape a child's future and open doors to endless opportunities.



Our goal is to prepare children for a bright tomorrow by developing their reading, writing, listening and speaking skills while fostering a love for learning.



You Will Be:

- Delivering fun and engaging 1-on-1 ELA classes using online applications.

- Participating in lesson development process by creating lesson materials.

- Helping students improve listening & speaking, reading, writing and language arts skills.

- Communicating any feedback regarding lessons and student progress to the office team.

- Providing regular reports on student learning and achievements.

- Tracking and improving class engagement and learning experiences.



What We Offer:

- Flexible working hours – work from home.

- Extensive training on effective online teaching techniques.

- Resources, templates, guidance, and requirements on how to make lesson materials.

- A supportive and professional work environment.

- Ongoing support from our dedicated team.

- The opportunity to contribute ideas and enhance the learning experience.

- Professional growth – improve your teaching skills with mentorship from experienced educators.

- Regular training opportunities for personal and professional development.



What we ask:

- Advanced level (C1+) English with little to no accent.

- A passion for working with young children and making learning engaging.

- At least six months of experience teaching children.

- A strong foundation in English language skills (reading, writing, phonics, comprehension).

- Experience in developing educational materials and adapting lessons to student needs.

- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work weekends and/or weekday afternoons and evenings.

- Ability to work as a self-employed contractor.

- Patience, professionalism, and adaptability to different student needs.

- Punctuality and strong time-management skills.



Please note:

This is a remote work position so you will need your own laptop, a stable internet connection, a good camera and microphone and a quiet place to work from, with a plain background.



Are you looking for a part-time online job?

Apply via this link - only applicants who apply via the link will be considered:

title: Customer Success Manager (Digital Marketing SaaS)
description:
About Us



We are a leading SaaS loyalty, marketing, and customer engagement platform serving retailers and brands across highly regulated industries in the U.S. and Canada. We help businesses strengthen customer relationships through data-driven marketing, automation, and analytics—driving retention, growth, and revenue.



We are seeking a highly proactive Account Manager / Customer Success Manager to own and grow a portfolio of mid-market and SMB retail clients. This is a commercially focused role responsible for driving platform adoption, retention, and revenue expansion while serving as the primary strategic advisor to clients.



The ideal candidate has experience in digital marketing or loyalty SaaS platforms and is comfortable leading ROI-driven conversations that connect campaign performance to business outcomes. This role requires a consultative, data-driven professional who can proactively mitigate churn risk and guide customers toward long-term success.







What You'll Do



- Own and manage a portfolio of approximately
SMB and mid-market retail accounts, serving as the primary relationship owner.

-Drive retention, renewals, and revenue growth through proactive account management and expansion opportunities.

- Lead monthly ROI and performance conversations, connecting
, SMS, and loyalty campaign metrics to business outcomes.

- Proactively monitor account health, identify churn risks early, and execute mitigation plans before renewal cycles.

- Guide customers on digital marketing best practices, campaign optimization, and platform adoption strategies.

- Conduct regular business reviews focused on engagement metrics, click-through rates, and revenue impact.

- Perform root cause analysis on escalations and partner cross-functionally to drive resolution and continuous improvement.

- Act as a trusted advisor to retail clients, delivering a highly consultative customer experience.

- Maintain accurate forecasting, account documentation, and CRM hygiene (Salesforce or similar).



What We're Looking For



- 4+ years in Customer Success, Account Management, or Client Services within a SaaS environment.

- Strong preference for experience with digital marketing,
/SMS platforms, or loyalty technology (e.g., Klaviyo, Iterable, or similar).

- Experience supporting retail or SMB customers is highly preferred.

- Proven ability to drive adoption, retention, and expansion within an existing book of business.

- Strong understanding of marketing performance metrics such as engagement rates, click-through rates, and campaign ROI.

- Demonstrated success in proactive churn mitigation and escalation management, including root cause analysis.

- Highly consultative mindset with the ability to guide customers on best practices and growth opportunities.

- Excellent English communication skills with polished video presence and strong active listening abilities.

- Comfortable managing a high-volume portfolio in a fast-paced SaaS environment.

- Hands-on experience with CRM tools (Salesforce preferred).

- Reliable primary internet plus backup connection required due to heavy video-based client interactions.



Work Setup & Compensation:



- Schedule: Follows U.S. business hours as needed

- Location: Remote in the Philippines

- Rate: Hourly in USD



**Please include a link to your resume and short-introduction video in your message**

title: Paid Social Video Editor – Meta Ads (Women's Jewellery Brand)
description:
We're SAEGE — a fast-growing women's jewellery brand selling globally, with a strong presence on Meta. We create content that actually converts, and we're looking for a talented video editor to join us and help take our paid social creative to the next level.



This is a remote, long-term role with real creative ownership. If you're passionate about video, understand what makes people stop scrolling, and want to grow with a brand that's serious about scaling — we want to hear from you. We want someone who not only is the best paid ad video editor, but we also want someone who can think outside of the box, come up with there own ideas and isn't afraid to test something new and bring something to the table. We want someone who loves video editing for paid ads and completely understands how to make ads that keep people engaged, entertained and that can convert. 



---



???? WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Editing 5–20+ video assets per week across a range of formats including:

- UGC-style ads

- Video mashups

- Hook variations

- Talking head edits

- Short & long form content

- VSLs (Video Sales Letters)



You'll work from raw footage and briefs we provide, delivering polished, scroll-stopping ads built for Meta (Reels & Stories).



---



? MUST-HAVE SKILLS



- Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects or equivalent

- Experience editing paid social ads (Meta/Instagram specifically & TikTok)

- Strong with captions, text overlays and motion graphics

- Can produce realistic AI voiceovers

- Delivers clean, colour-graded footage

- Comfortable delivering multiple aspect ratios (9:16, 4:5, 1:1)

- Reliable, communicates clearly, and can work partially in UK time



---



? BONUS SKILLS (not required but a big plus)



- Experience creating or incorporating AI-generated video

- Basic sound design or audio mixing



---



???? PAY & STRUCTURE



Up to $1,000/month depending on experience and output - happy to discuss further budget if needed for the right person. We're open to discussing how you prefer to work — whether that's a monthly retainer or cost-per-edit. Tell us what works for you. 



---



???? HOW TO APPLY



Send us:

1. A short intro about yourself and your experience

2. Examples of paid social ads you've edited (Meta & Ecommerce preferred)

3. Your preferred working structure and rates



To make sure you've read this in full, your subject line or opening line must include: SAEGETEAM



Applications without this will not be considered.



We're excited to find the right person and build something great together. Let's go. ????

title: On Camera Virtual Receptionist
description:
We are seeking reliable and polished Virtual Receptionists to support our U.S.-based salons. This is a remote independent contractor role for individuals who communicate clearly, stay calm under pressure, and can manage multiple tasks at once. This is an on-screen position, and you are required to be on camera for the full duration of any worked hours with a professional appearance and a quiet, distraction-free workspace. Your on-screen presence is an essential part of the guest experience.



In this role, you will answer and route calls, respond to
s and messages, share basic information with clients, take detailed messages, schedule and adjust appointments, check team availability, update client records, maintain call logs, prepare simple reports, collect feedback through short surveys, and respond to real-time questions from clients and staff. You will follow established scripts and procedures, work across multiple software platforms simultaneously, and remain responsive and engaged throughout your shift while staying on camera with clear audio and stable video.



To succeed in this role, you must speak and write clearly in English, learn systems quickly, remain calm during busy periods, and communicate consistently. Technical requirements include reliable high-speed internet with a minimum download speed of 100 Mbps, a device with at least 12 GB of RAM, a functioning camera and microphone, and a professional workspace suitable for being on screen. You must be available to work U.S. hours, which may include evenings or weekends.



We prefer candidates with experience in customer service, call centers, scheduling, or administrative support, though strong communication skills and a professional on-screen presence are most important. This is a remote contractor role; you will invoice for your hours, maintain your own equipment and workspace, and work independently while following company procedures. If you enjoy customer service, can remain fully present on screen during all working hours, and are seeking a long-term contractor opportunity, we would love to hear from you.

title: Appointment Setter & Community Outreach Specialist (Home Care Sales & Marketing Experience Required)
description:
We are seeking a motivated, personable, and results-driven Appointment Setter & Community Outreach Specialist to join our growing home care agency. This role is ideal for someone with prior experience in the home care industry and a strong background in sales and marketing.



You will be responsible for managing inbound leads from platforms like A Place for Mom, 
, and our website, as well as actively building relationships with local referral sources such as home health agencies, hospices, and assisted living facilities.



The goal is to convert inquiries into scheduled care consultations and develop long-term referral partnerships within the healthcare community.



Only applicants with home care/senior care experience and a background in sales or marketing will be considered.



?



Key Responsibilities:



Inbound Lead Management (60%)

• Respond to incoming calls,
s, and website inquiries from prospective clients

• Qualify leads by asking questions to determine care needs and urgency

• Clearly communicate agency services and benefits

• Schedule in-home or virtual consultations for the Care Manager or agency owner

• Follow up on unconverted leads via calls, texts, and
s

• Keep accurate notes in the CRM or lead tracking system



Outbound Referral Outreach (40%)

• Cold call or visit local healthcare facilities and providers

• Build relationships with case managers, social workers, and referral coordinators

• Schedule meetings between referral partners and agency leadership

• Track outreach efforts in a referral database

• Represent the agency professionally during all interactions



?



Requirements & Qualifications:

• Minimum 1–2 years of home care or senior care industry experience (required)

• Sales, marketing, or community outreach experience (required)

• Excellent communication and follow-up skills

• Comfortable with cold calling and relationship-building

• Tech-savvy with basic CRM,
, and office software tools

• Empathetic and confident phone demeanor

• Reliable transportation for outreach, if required



?



Preferred Skills:

• Ability to quickly establish trust with families and referral sources

• Knowledge of local healthcare systems and senior living options

• Consultative, service-oriented sales approach



?



Performance Metrics:

• Qualified appointments set weekly

• Conversion rate from lead to consultation

• Follow-up consistency

• Referral sources added monthly

• Community meetings completed



?



Compensation & Benefits:

• Competitive hourly wage or salary (based on experience)

• Performance-based bonuses

• Paid training and development opportunities

• Flexible schedule (some remote work may be available)

• Growth opportunities within the agency



?



How to Apply:

To apply, please submit your resume and a 1-minute voice recording briefly introducing yourself and sharing your relevant experience in home care and sales/marketing

title: Video Editor
description:
Overview



Create high-performing video ads for paid campaigns in Spanish. Work closely with the Creative Strategist to produce both short-form and long-form videos (up to 5 minutes) for Meta platforms 
 and Instagram). Deliver approximately 10 videos per week.



Responsibilities

Edit performance-driven video ads for Meta platforms 
 & Instagram) in Spanish

Follow provided scripts in Spanish while adding strong creative execution

Transform scripts, briefs, and references into engaging video content

Capture attention with compelling hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Use Creatify and other AI tools to improve production speed

Track progress and status in a shared Google Sheet

Strong understanding of short-form and long-form ad performance

Experience editing ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

Familiarity with AI tools (ElevenLabs, Heygen, or similar) and editing software such as CapCut

title: Looking for a ninja personal assistant !!
description:
Looking For The best Personal Assistant In The World!



Hi, my name is Keren and I am looking for the best Personal Assistant in the world! I am looking for you to accompany me every day in all of my tasks and duties as an Entrepreneur, manage my calendar,
s, phone calls, and communicate with other department leaders.

title: Real Estate Media Quality Control & Delivery VA
description:
WORK HOURS

Part Time to Full Time Between 5:00pm CST-10:00AM CST - Flexibility needed as project timelines vary.



STARTING SALARY

 $4- $5 per hour based on experience



SUMMARY

We’re looking for someone smart, organized, and excited to grow with us! If you’re a positive, detail-oriented person who loves to learn, takes feedback well, and wants to be part of a close-knit, supportive team — we’d love to meet you. This is a long-term role for someone who’s ready to take on more responsibility over time and become a key part of our journey.



WHO WE ARE

Cornerstone Creative is a christian-led, family-run real estate media company based in Wisconsin. We create amazing photo and video content for realtors, and we’re known for our fast turnaround, friendly service, and high-quality work. Our team is growing quickly, and we’re passionate about doing great work and loving the team we work with. If you’re looking for a place where your ideas matter, you’ll be supported, and you can grow — this might be

the perfect fit.

Manage, review for quality, upload, and retouch photos and video on a daily basis. Follow up with the editing team on project statuses. Maintain communication with the admin team.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Project Management

Retouch photos in Lightroom and Photoshop

Manage all media assets including photos, video, 3D Tours, etc

QC/Review deliverables for quality and accuracy

Communicate effectively with editing teams to complete deliverables (virtual staging, videos, etc.)

Communicate with Admin team effectively



SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

Ability to take on several tasks at once.

Extreme attention to detail.

Excellent English speaking and written.

Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software experience.

Proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Lightroom. *Must have these programs

Preferred proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro/Final Cut Pro/Capcut is a plus.

Fast learner and willing to learn

title: Website Update & SEO Support Specialist for Banking
description:
We are looking for a dependable and detail-oriented Website Update & SEO Support Specialist to support a growing business. This is a flexible hourly role for someone who enjoys keeping website content current, organized, and polished while also helping with SEO-related support. The main focus of the position will be updating website information as changes are needed throughout the year. Workload may increase during busier onboarding periods, so we are looking for someone who can step in where needed and handle updates with care and accuracy.



This role will be supporting a bank environment, so experience working in banking, financial services, or a similar professional setting would be highly valued. Any background in billing, accounting support, or financial administrative work would also be a strong plus, as those skills would be helpful in understanding the nature of the business and supporting related needs when they come up.



The website is managed through Squarespace, so experience with that platform is preferred, though we are happy to train the right person. This is a behind-the-scenes role with no phone work required, making it a great fit for someone who is organized, reliable, and comfortable working independently. We are looking for someone with a positive attitude, strong attention to detail, and a willingness to learn. If you enjoy support work that helps a business stay organized and run smoothly, this could be a great fit.



What we’re looking for:



Experience with Squarespace or similar website platforms

Familiarity with SEO support

Strong attention to detail and organization

Dependable, flexible, and willing to be trained

Comfortable stepping in during busier onboarding periods

Banking, billing, or accounting-related experience is a plus



This is a remote, flexible hourly position with hours that may vary based on workload. If you are looking for a role where you can provide valuable support and help keep things running smoothly behind the scenes, we would love to hear from you.

title: Chief Finance Officer (Remote | Full-Time | Payroll & Financial Management)
description:
Company: Higher Results Education Inc.

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Work Schedule: Monday to Saturday, 6:00 AM – 4:00 PM (Philippine Time)



About Higher Results Education Inc.

Higher Results Education Inc. is a Canada-based education consulting company dedicated to connecting students with the right colleges and programs to help them achieve their academic and career goals. As we continue expanding our presence in the Philippines, we are seeking dedicated, reliable, and ambitious professionals to join our remote team on a long-term, full-time basis.



Our mission is to provide exceptional guidance and support to students while fostering strong relationships with our clients and partners. We are looking for individuals who thrive in fast-paced, results-driven environments and are eager to make a meaningful impact in the world of education.



Job Overview

We are currently looking for a Chief Finance Officer (CFO) to oversee and manage the financial operations of the company. This role is responsible for tracking the company’s finances, monitoring all cash flow (incoming and outgoing funds), managing payroll, budgeting, financial reporting, and ensuring overall financial stability and accuracy.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, trustworthy, detail-oriented, and experienced in handling financial systems for a growing company.



Key Responsibilities

Track and manage all company finances, including money coming in and going out

Monitor and record all financial transactions accurately

Oversee and process employee payroll on time

Manage cash flow, expense tracking, and payment schedules

Prepare financial reports, summaries, and forecasts for management

Develop and maintain budgets and financial plans

Ensure proper documentation of all expenses and financial records

Review financial processes and suggest improvements for efficiency

Support leadership with financial insights and recommendations

Ensure compliance with company financial policies and procedures

Prepare and generate pay slips for all the members.



Qualifications

Proven experience in finance, accounting, bookkeeping, payroll, or financial management

Previous experience as a Finance Officer, Finance Manager, Accountant, or CFO is an advantage

Strong understanding of cash flow management, payroll, budgeting, and financial reporting

High level of accuracy, integrity, and confidentiality

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Excellent organizational and time management skills

Proficient in Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets and accounting or payroll software

Strong communication and reporting skills

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or related field is preferred



What We’re Looking For

Reliable and trustworthy

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Proactive and able to work with minimal supervision

Committed to long-term employment

Comfortable working in a fast-paced and results-driven environment



Why Join Us?

Long-term, full-time remote opportunity

Work with a growing Canada-based education company

Be part of a mission-driven team helping students achieve their goals

Opportunity for growth and career development



How to Apply

If you are interested in this opportunity, please send below details to: 

Updated resume

title: US Cost Estimator
description:
In this role, you will be responsible for conducting market research on construction materials, parts, and supplies. You will maintain contacts with vendors, call potential clients and suppliers, and create presentations. The ideal candidate must have excellent communication skills and strong attention to detail. You will work during U.S business hours and get paid weekly.





Job Responsibilities:



- Conduct detailed cost estimation for construction projects, ensuring accuracy and completeness. (ProEst)

- Perform quantitative surveying to assess project requirements and resources.

- Manage and maintain back-office operations, including documentation and administrative tasks.

- Create and maintain Excel spreadsheets for cost tracking and project management.

- Prepare bid packages and ensure all necessary documentation is included for submission.

- Collaborate with project teams to gather relevant data and insights for accurate estimations.

- Assist in the analysis of project costs and provide recommendations for cost-saving measures.





Qualifications:



- Knowledge of Florida Building codes is a MUST

- Experience using ProEst for accurate cost estimation and project budgeting

- Proven experience in cost estimating, preferably in the construction industry for US clients

- Proficiency in Microsoft Excel

- Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

- Excellent communication and organizational skills.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment and manage multiple tasks effectively.

title: SDR
description:
Role Overview

The SDR plays in managing and overseeing the lead conversion process. You will act as a bridge between the marketing and sales teams, qualifying and converting leads to support our growth objectives



Key Responsibilities Include but not limited too

- Handle both outbound and inbound customer calls.

- Set appointments between brokerages and our sales team.

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date client profiles in the CRM system.

- Demonstrate high-quality customer service by addressing brokerage needs and concerns.

- Meet or exceed individual lead conversion and appointment-setting targets.

- Develop an in-depth understanding of the US insurance industry to engage in meaningful conversations with potential clients.



Key Skills and Qualifications

- At least 2 years of experience in a similar SDR role.

- Proven success in client engagement and lead conversion.

- Experience with CRM systems, preferably Hubspot

- Strong communication skills in English (C1 level minimum).

- A proactive approach with the ability to adapt to rapid changes and ambiguity.

- Goal-oriented with a focus on driving results.

- A customer-centric mindset with the ability to identify and address client needs.

- Collaborative and a team player, capable of working with both marketing and sales teams.



This role is for those who:

- Thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and embrace change with agility.

- Excel in rapidly growing settings, navigating ambiguity with confidence and adaptability.

- Are driven by excellence, always seeking to improve and raise the bar.

- Operate with unwavering integrity, honesty, and strong ethical values.

- Demonstrate consistency, follow-through, and a commitment to high standards.

- Take full ownership of their responsibilities, hold themselves accountable, and seek solutions rather than excuses.

- Go above and beyond, consistently putting in the effort to deliver exceptional results.

- Embrace feedback, personal growth, and continuous learning as essential to their success.



Salary and Compensation

Our compensation structure is designed to reflect that increased responsibility, results, and leadership drive higher pay within our organization.



Apply now to join our team and be part of a journey that makes a difference.





************************************THIS IS A GRAVEYARD SHIFT ROLE*************************************





You can start your application by filling out this Microsoft form:

title: Systems & Automation Operator (Remote)
description:
Systems & Automation Operator (Remote – Philippines)



We are not hiring a typical Virtual Assistant.



We are hiring someone to build and automate systems inside a growing U.S.-based trucking company (ECG Freight).



Our goal is simple:

???? Eliminate manual work

???? Reduce human dependency

???? Build a business that runs on systems



?



???? WHAT YOU WILL DO

 • Identify repetitive tasks across the business

 • Build automations using tools like:

 • Zapier

 • Make (Integromat)

 • n8n

 • GoHighLevel (GHL)

 • Create systems for:

 • Operations tracking (trucks, drivers, dispatch)

 • Alerts and notifications

 • Reporting and dashboards

 • Recruiting workflows

 • Turn manual processes into automated workflows

 • Continuously improve and optimize systems



?



???? THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:

 • You think in systems, not tasks

 • You can take a problem and build a solution without step-by-step instructions

 • You have experience building real automations, not just basic tasks

 • You are proactive, fast, and reliable

 • You can work independently and hit deadlines



?



? THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR:

 • Basic Virtual Assistants

 • Task followers who need constant direction

 • People without automation experience



?



???? REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

 • Zapier, Make, or n8n (at least one required)

 • CRM automation (GoHighLevel preferred)

 • Workflow design and logic building

 • Strong problem-solving skills



?



???? COMPENSATION

 • $1,000 – $1,500/month (full-time)

 • Performance-based increases

 • Long-term growth opportunity



?



???? APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, answer this:



We run 20 trucks using:

 • Vektor (no API)

 • Samsara (GPS tracking)



Problem:

We want to automatically detect:

 • Trucks sitting too long

 • Trucks without loads

 • Delays



Question:

Explain how you would build a system to detect this and send alerts automatically.



Be specific:

 • Data source

 • Logic

 • Tools

 • Output



?



???? WHY JOIN US

 • Work directly with the CEO

 • Build real systems (not just admin tasks)

 • High ownership and growth potential

 • Be part of building a fully automated company

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Summary

We are looking for a Creative Project Coordinator to manage the daily coordination between sales requests and the creative team. This role focuses on organizing incoming work, clarifying requirements, tracking requests, and assisting with task assignments to ensure timely delivery while minimizing bottlenecks.



Key Responsibilities

-Receive project requests from internal teams through
 and chat

-Review and clarify any missing information to ensure project briefs are complete

-Log and track work requests in a project management system (e.g., Smartsheet or similar tools)

-Coordinate task assignments based on team availability, priority, and deadlines

-Monitor project progress, identify blockers, and provide regular updates to stakeholders

-Maintain organized trackers, consistent naming conventions, and clear documentation

-Contribute to process improvements to reduce confusion and speed up delivery



Mandatory Skills

-2+ years of experience in coordination, operations support, or project support

-Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple requests at once

-Excellent written communication skills in English, with a professional tone

-High attention to detail and experience managing structured workflows

-Proficiency with spreadsheets, trackers, and collaboration tools (Teams,
, etc.)

-Ability to prioritize tasks, follow up, and maintain 
ntum with minimal supervision

-Reliable computer setup and stable internet connection



Preferred Skills

-Experience with Smartsheet (or similar tools like Asana, 
, Trello, Jira)

-Experience supporting creative teams (design, motion, marketing, production)

-Basic understanding of creative workflows and file handoffs

Experience creating simple dashboards or enhancing tracking systems

-Comfort working with distributed teams across multiple time zones



Why Join Us

In this role, you'll play a key part in keeping creative projects organized and on track while gaining valuable hands-on experience working closely with a creative team in a fast-paced, high-output environment.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a reliable and effective communicator to join our remote team as a Locksmith Sales Support VA. In this role, you will manage inbound customer calls, converting inquiries into job orders while addressing customer needs in a professional and efficient manner.



Your main responsibilities will include providing accurate information, recommending appropriate solutions, and scheduling appointments, all while maintaining a friendly and customer-focused approach. A background in locksmith services, sales, and experience in a fast-paced, reactive environment is preferred.



Key Responsibilities:

-Answer inbound calls related to locksmith services, providing accurate and timely information to customers.

-Convert customer inquiries into sales by suggesting suitable solutions and scheduling service appointments.

-Use CRM tools to log interactions, update customer records, and track lead progress.

-Adhere to call-handling protocols and use locksmith-specific terminology.

-Manage job orders, including pricing, scheduling, and coordinating technician dispatch.

-Communicate with professionalism and empathy to ensure a positive customer experience.

-Collaborate with dispatch and internal teams to resolve issues and ensure timely service delivery.

-Ensure customer queries are addressed within defined timeframes, meeting service level agreements (SLAs).



Mandatory Skills:

-2+ years of experience in dispatch or locksmith services.

-Experience working in a reactive environment (e.g., handling urgent, time-sensitive service requests).

-Excellent spoken English with a neutral accent.

-Proven sales experience, particularly in converting inquiries into bookings.

-Strong communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to upsell services when appropriate.

-Familiarity with CRM tools and call management software.

-Ability to stay calm and efficient in a high-call volume environment.

-Reliable internet connection and a quiet, distraction-free workspace.

-Attention to detail and adherence to structured processes.



Preferred Skills:

-Previous experience in a call center, dispatch, or customer support role

-Familiarity with lead tracking or ticketing systems.

-Quick to learn new technical or service-related terms.

-Experience working remotely with minimal supervision.

-Knowledge of tools like Syncrorma PBX or custom CRMs (a plus, but not required).



Why Join Us:

This fully remote position offers flexibility, structured support, and the opportunity to work in a performance-driven environment. You’ll be part of a team that values clear communication, continuous improvement, and professional development. With warm leads provided and no cold calling, your focus will be on converting calls into job orders and delivering exceptional service in an organized and supportive environment.

title: Instagram Video Editor. Long-Term Role, Real Team, Real Growth
description:
Location: Remote

Pay: Up to $800/mo to start with a probation period (1-2 months).

No Agencies. Individual Applicants Only Who Want a Full-Time Job. Do Not Apply If This Is Not You.

If you reply with AI, and do not follow all the steps, you will be disqualified.



**Before You Apply Read ALL of this First**



This is NOT an entry level role. We move fast because we're growing fast, and we need someone who can keep up without being managed closely. We're not just hiring for skill. We're hiring for who you are.



We value honesty, hard work, and people who are always pushing to be better in their craft and in their life. If that's not you, this isn't the right place. If it is, you'll fit right in and you'll want to stay. Most people who join our team do.



Who We Are

We're a marketing and content company managing multiple clients on Instagram. We produce high volumes of short form content and we hold our work to a high standard. Our team supports each other, communicates openly, and shows up consistently.



We also believe in taking care of our people. Paid vacation and bonuses are part of working here, regardless of where in the world you are.



Who We're Looking For

An experienced video editor who lives on Instagram. Not someone who uses it... someone who studies it. You know what's performing, why it's performing, and how to replicate it for different brands and audiences.



You think like a content strategist and execute like a pro. You don't wait to be told what's trending because you already know.



Your editing should look and feel like these 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 



If you don't follow accounts like these and actively study them, this role is not for you.



What You'll Be Doing

- Editing short form Reels for multiple clients

- Bringing trend and content ideas to the team proactively

- Handling transcriptions and subtitles with accuracy

- Delivering on time, every time. NO chasing required

- Flagging when something won't perform and knowing why



What You Need

- Proven experience editing short-form content. This is not the place to learn

- A real understanding of Instagram: the algorithm, trends, and what stops the scroll

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve. CapCut is an automatic disqualification

- Strong animation and motion graphics skills. Do not apply if you cannot do this

- Knowledge of audio editing. Compression, EQ, and clean levels are expected, not optional

- Color correction and color grading experience

- Solid English for transcriptions and subtitles. A accuracy matters.

- Ability to handle multiple clients and projects simultaneously without dropping the ball

- Ability to hit deadlines without being followed up on

- Honest, direct communication. We'd rather hear a hard truth than a comfortable excuse



The Opportunity

This starts as a part-time contract at up to $10/hr based on experience, with a probation period during the first 2–3 months.



If you're the right person we will bring you on full time with a guaranteed monthly Salary. We're not afraid to invest in people who earn it. Beyond that, you can expect paid vacation, performance bonuses, and a team that genuinely supports your growth. People who join us tend to stay for a long time because we work hard to create a fun, fair, and fast paced environment for everyone.



How to Apply: We don't hire on resumes alone. You need to show us you can edit.

1. Download the sample assets from 

2. Edit a short form Reel using one of these assets (you only need to edit 1/2 the video so it does not take too much time)

3. Check the audio and touch it up if necessary. Compression, EQ, and levels all matter

4. Submit your resume, portfolio, and edited test video

5. Include a short note on why you're the right fit. Start it with the word "Reels" so we know you read this



Applications without the test edit will not be reviewed. No exceptions.

title: Accountant UK Specific
description:
I am seeking a fluent English-speaking qualified or highly experienced accountant with strong UK practice experience, who has an excellent understanding of UK accounting standards, tax legislation and compliance requirements.



Concrete Accounts is a rapidly growing accountancy firm established in 2022. We are building a high-performing team and are looking for a proactive, detail-oriented accountant who wants to grow with the business long-term.



This role is strictly for candidates with hands-on UK experience. You must have worked with UK-based clients and be confident preparing and reviewing full accounts and tax filings. Please do not apply if you do not meet this requirement. Due to the rapid growth rate of the firm we do not have time to trained candidates on 



You must also be highly proficient in Xero, BrightPay, Dext and Hubdoc, and able to work for at least half of the UK working day (GMT).



I anticipate requiring support for c.40 hours per week. There is scope for the right candidate to grow with this role and become a manager of an outsourced Team.



Key Requirements

Minimum 5+ years’ experience working with UK-based businesses

Strong practical experience in:

Bookkeeping

Quarterly journals and adjustments (accruals, prepayments, etc.)

Preparation of company accounts (FRS 102 / FRS 105)

Corporation tax returns (CT600)

Self Assessment tax returns

Experience working in a UK accountancy practice environment

Confident working independently with minimal supervision

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability

Previous experience working remotely

Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



Bookkeeping (Xero, Dext, Hubdoc)

Payroll (BrightPay and/or Xero)

Quarterly journals and bookkeeping reviews

Preparation of management accounts

VAT returns (Xero)

Preparation of year-end company accounts (FRS 102 / FRS 105)

Preparation and submission of CT600 corporation tax returns

Preparation of Self Assessment tax returns

Supporting with client queries and financial reviews

Joining calls with me for regular updates

Drafting client
s and communications

General administrative and ad-hoc tasks

Skills & Experience

Fluent written and spoken English

A recognised accountancy qualification (or equivalent experience)

Strong understanding of UK tax and accounting regulations

Excellent working knowledge of:

Xero

BrightPay

Dext

Hubdoc

(Sage/QuickBooks is a bonus)

Strong organisation and time management skills

High attention to detail across financial data

Ability to communicate clearly and concisely with clients

Proactive mindset, able to identify and resolve issues independently

Comfortable working within confidentiality and UK data protection standards

Reliable high-speed internet connection

Application Instructions



Please include the following in the first 3–4 lines of your application:



Your qualification

Your most relevant UK-based work experience (company, start date, end date)

Hours you can work per day (GMT)

Software you are experienced with

please also include 'your name | Concrete Bookkeeping' in the header, any applications that do not do this will not be considered.



Important:

You must have strong UK accounting and tax experience across accounts, CT600 and Self Assessment to be considered.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Crypto Alpha Research & Chart Designer
description:

 most important part of this role is design. Every chart you create should look clean, visually striking, and easy to read. Only the key information should be highlighted. Using the right colors, the right timeframe, the right indicators, and the right chart positioning. Every chart should feel like a piece of art.

The Formula:

Visually Attractive Chart + Great Alpha + Being First/Quick = Going Viral



Going viral is the end goal. The formula above is the process. You should have mastered every step of it.





Before You Apply:

- Check our X 

- Ask yourself: can you redesign these charts and make them even better?

- You must have experience in crypto

- You must have a strong eye for design

- You must be hardworking and fast

title: Experienced Performance Video Editor | E-commerce
description:
We’re an eCommerce brand in the supplement space looking for a creative, fast, and reliable Video Editor who knows how to turn raw clips into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven ads for Instagram and
.



This is not a basic editing role. We’re looking for someone who combines strong creative instincts with a performance mindset, and who’s comfortable using AI tools to work faster and test ideas.



What You’ll Be Creating

- Short-form paid ads (10s–1:30s) that feel native to Reels, and Shorts

- UGC-style ads with multiple hook variations to maximize performance

- Mini VSLs (1–3 mins) with clean pacing, emotional storytelling, and B-roll flow

- Performance iterations based on real ad data, not guesswork

- Trend-inspired edits that ride platform culture while staying brand-aligned



AI & Tools (Important)

- Comfortable using AI tools to support creative production and ideation

- Experience with tools like Kling, Veo 3, Nano Banana, Sora, or similar AI video tools is a strong plus

- Able to use AI for B-roll generation, concept testing, visual enhancements, or creative experimentation



Weekly Output & Expectations

- Deliver 5-6 briefs per week (quality over quantity)

- Proactively iterate based on ad performance data & strategist feedback

- Stay on top of TikTok/IG trends and bring fresh creative ideas to the table



You’re a Good Fit If You

- Have proven experience editing direct response ads that convert

- Understand key ad metrics (hook rate, watch time, CTR) and how edits affect them

- Know how to make videos feel native to social media paltforms

- Are detail-oriented, reliable, and fast without sacrificing quality



Compensation & Growth

$1,200 – $1,500/month (depending on experience)

Performance bonuses for winning creatives

Clear growth path into Lead Editor / Creative Strategist

Fully remote – flexible schedule, results over hours



How to Apply

Include your portfolio (short-form ads only — UGC or paid social preferred).

Bonus if you share results (metrics, ROAS, CTR improvements) from ads you’ve edited.



To confirm you read this fully, start your application with “HOOK”



We’re building a performance-focused creative team.



If you’re consistent, creative, and serious about improving ad results, we’d like to see your work.

title: Graphic Designer (Static Image Ads Focus)
description:
**Application Deadline:** April 20, 2026

**Job start date:** April 27, 2026, or May 4, 2026 — choose the date that works best for you.



We’re looking for an experienced Graphic Designer to help us create high-performing image ads at scale. This role is perfect for someone who enjoys fast-paced work, learning new tools, and improving week by week.



### Why Join us (
)



- We grow fast — you’ll learn a lot, quickly

- Long-term mindset — we hire for life (we don’t believe in a hire-and-fire culture)

- 13th month pay at the end of the year

- Performance reviews every 6 months (January & July) with opportunities for raises

- Mentorship and hands-on training with our marketing team

- Access to AI-powered design tools, templates, and guides



### Starting Compensation



- USD $1,000 every 4 weeks

- Payments are made every two weeks, and you’ll need to submit a PayPal invoice.

- Compensation may be adjusted after the Month 1 trial period (see details below)



### Work Environment & Schedule



- This role is remote-friendly, with flexible hours

- Collaborate with the team via 

- Expected working hours are 35–40 hours per week.



### What You’ll Do



- Create high-quality image ads based on provided concepts, copy, and references

- Use our internal tools to design, refine, and fix details (logos, labels, layout issues)

- Continuously improve speed, quality, and creative judgment

- Follow clear processes while contributing your own creative insights



### Requirements



- Experience working with clients or companies in North America

- Minimum 3 years of graphic design experience

- Proficient in Canva and Photoshop

- Open to learning and using AI tools in your workflow



### Bonus



- Experience with AI image generation tools



### **Interview Process**



If your application is selected, you’ll receive an
 within 3 days inviting you to complete a paid test project. The
 will have the subject line: “You’re invited to Graphic Designer - LOCHBY Test Project” and will include detailed instructions on how to complete the task and receive payment.



Due to the high volume of applications, there may be multiple rounds of paid test projects. We’ll notify you by
 if you’re selected to move forward at each stage.



### Trial Period (Month 1)



The first month is a structured trial to help you ramp up:



Weeks 1–2



- Create 20 ads per week.

    

    For reference, our marketing manager can create 20 ads per day because she’s familiar with all the tools—so creating 20 ads per week is definitely an achievable goal, even if you’re not yet familiar with them.

    

- You’ll receive training, documentation, and full references (copy + examples provided)

- Meet with our Marketing Manager three times a week to get all your questions answered

- Focus on learning our systems, tools, and quality standards



Weeks 3–4



- Increase to 30 ads per week

- Focus on speed, accuracy, and consistency

- Weekly feedback sessions with the Marketing Manager to review work and answer questions



At the end of Week 4, we’ll d
 on full-time placement. If you’re not selected, the contract will simply wrap up. If you are hired full-time, you’re in for the long haul—we have a no-fire policy. You’re always free to leave if you want, but we won’t initiate it, and we’ll make sure you always have meaningful work to do.



### Growth Expectations



- Month 2 goal: 120 ads/month

- Month 3 goal: 160 ads/month



This role is about building both speed and creative judgment over time.



### Who This Is For



- You enjoy structured, repeatable creative work

- You want to get really good at performance-driven design

- You’re comfortable working with systems, tools, and clear processes

- You’re excited to learn fast and improve constantly



### Application Instructions



-
 your application to 
 with the subject: Graphic Designer Job Application

- Please send your resume and a portfolio featuring at least 3 image ad campaigns or other relevant design work.

- Include a link to your public profile on Upwork, LinkedIn, OnlineJobs.ph, or any other publicly accessible site that highlights your experience.

- If you’re being referred by someone, please mention the referrer’s name.

description:
We're a growing shoe brand based in the US, focused on creating compelling content that converts. Our marketing runs across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube, and we're looking for a talented video editor who understands the science behind high-performing ads.





The Role



We're hiring a Performance Marketing Video Editor to produce 2 videos per day, each with 3-5 hooks. You'll be creating scroll-stopping content that drives sales—not just pretty edits. This role requires someone who lives and breathes direct response video: hook rate, the first 3 seconds, pacing, visual selection, and everything that makes an ad perform.



You'll be editing:

- UGC-style ads

- Hook variations

- Testimonial-style content

- Lifestyle videos

- Podcast-style clips

- VSLs (Video Sales Letters)



What You'll Do



- Edit 2 high-quality performance videos daily with multiple hook variations

- Source and organize clips efficiently from raw footage

- Work from storyboards while also creating self-driven edits

- Understand what makes an ad convert (not just look good)

- Optimize pacing, emotion, and storytelling for paid social

- Collaborate with our team during weekly calls and feedback sessions



Requirements



? Minimum 1 year of experience in performance video editing (ads, UGC, or direct response style)  

? Strong understanding of direct response marketing principles

- Comfortable working within a larger retention team 
 marketers, designers, copywriters)

Our Core Values



- Uncompromising Excellence

- Extreme Ownership

- Integrity Above All

- Results Driven Focus

- Build, launch, and optimize

Apply today to join our team!

title: Replo Landing Page Developer
description:
We're looking for a Replo Landing Page Developer who will play a critical role in turning high-level creative concepts into conversion-focused, revenue-driving eCommerce experiences. This role sits at the intersection of design, development, and performance, ensuring that every landing page is pixel-perfect, on-brand, and optimized to convert traffic into customers. You’ll be directly responsible for building, optimizing, and maintaining Shopify landing pages that support aggressive growth goals for modern eCommerce brands.



Requirements/Experience:

- Proven experience building Shopify landing pages using Replo

- Strong ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive live pages

- Hands-on experience with Shopify-native functionality, including products, variants, carts, and checkout flows

- Solid understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) principles for eCommerce

- Experience building responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile

- Familiarity with brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards

- Ability to use AI tools to increase efficiency, speed, and consistency in workflows

- High attention to detail with a strong eye for design accuracy and usability

- Ability to manage multiple builds simultaneously while meeting deadlines

- Clear communication skills and comfort collaborating with designers, marketers, and strategists



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:

- Build high-converting eCommerce landing pages in Replo, using Figma designs as the source of truth while ensuring clean, scalable builds that align with performance goals



- Translate Figma files into pixel-accurate, fully responsive Replo pages, ensuring consistency across desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences



- Implement Shopify-native functionality within Replo, including product selection, variants, add-to-cart behavior, and checkout flows that function seamlessly for the end user



- Ensure all pages strictly follow brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards, maintaining visual consistency and professionalism across every build



- Optimize page layouts using CRO best practices, including above-the-fold clarity, strategic CTA placement, trust elements, and friction reduction



- Leverage AI tools to improve development efficiency, speed up repetitive tasks, and enhance overall output quality without sacrificing accuracy



- Collaborate with designers and performance marketers to ensure pages not only look great but are built to support testing, iteration, and measurable results





Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full time position

Target Start Date: ASAP

ta ads,

Long-term, full-time role (we want you to grow with us)

Supportive team culture with real growth opportunities

Work 100% inside Figma with clearly structured projects and feedback loops



Collaborate with marketing, development, and creative tea
mbers daily

Expert-level Figma skills – you’ll live in it

Experience with Meta ad creatives,

Nice to Have

Experience designing for Shopify, WooCommerce or Klaviyo





Motion or video editing skills (but not required)

Flexible working hours – some overlap with EU timezone preferred



Supportive team culture with real growth opportunities

Creative freedom within a structure that delivers results
