title: Sales Representative
description:
Company Overview:

We are a growing digital platform focused on providing engaging online services to users. We are looking for motivated individuals to join our team as Sales Representatives.



Job Description:

As a Sales Representative, you will be responsible for reaching out to potential clients, introducing our platform, and assisting them with onboarding and engagement.



Key Responsibilities:

Contact and engage potential clients online

Handle both inbound and outbound calls

Guide users through the registration process

Assist with onboarding and platform navigation

Proactively find potential clients through social media

Build and maintain client relationships

Meet weekly performance and engagement targets



Requirements:

Strong communication skills

Ability to handle inbound and outbound calls

Initiative in finding and engaging potential clients online

Goal-oriented and self-motivated

Experience in sales or online marketing is a plus



What We Offer:

Competitive commission and incentives

Flexible, work-from-home setup

Opportunity for long-term or permanent position

Training and support provided

title: Experienced Cold Calling Sales Agent  - Night Shift - Base + Commission - Long-Term
description:
Let’s be direct.



This role is only for people with real cold calling and direct sales experience.



If you know how to speak with USA business owners, handle objections, stay confident under pressure, and turn cold conversations into real opportunities, this could be a very strong long-term position for you.



We are a growing software company helping US local businesses get more clients through better websites and digital solutions. Our service solves a real problem, and we are currently looking for multiple cold calling sales agents, so if you meet the requirements, you have a strong chance of being hired.



What you will do



- Cold call US local business owners

- Speak directly with decision-makers

- Pitch our website and digital service offers

- Handle objections professionally

- Book the next step or move the sale forward



What we offer



- $400/month base salary

- Commission on every sale

- No commission cap

- Payoneer payment

- Paid 2 times per month

- Full-time, long-term role

- Clear system, real offer, and serious opportunity



We are hiring many agents right now



Work schedule



Monday to Friday

8 hours per day

US business hours



You must be comfortable working night shifts

Experience working night shift jobs is a big advantage



Important



Work is tracked with a time tracker

You must have reliable internet, a good headset/microphone, and a quiet workspace



Requirements



- Mandatory cold calling experience

- Mandatory direct sales experience

- Experience speaking with US business owners

- Strong objection-handling skills

- Very good spoken English

- Neutral or American-sounding accent

- Confidence, discipline, and consistency

- Previous night shift experience preferred

- This is not for beginners



How to apply

Send your application to 



Include:



Your CV

A short message explaining your cold calling and direct sales experience

A short message confirming you are comfortable working night shifts

The sales tools you have used before (dialer, CRM, VoIP, lead sources, etc.)



***Also required: send 2 Vocaroo recordings***



Recording 1 - around 2 minutes

Simulate a cold call with the owner of a roofing company in Miami who has an old website.

Call them and pitch a new website that can help bring in more clients.

Important: the owner should reject you at first, and you should show how you respond and try to move the conversation forward.



Recording 2 - around 2 minutes

Simulate a cold call with the owner of a roofing company in Miami who does not have a website.

Tell them we already created a free demo website for their business and that we want to show it to them. Your goal is to get their
 address.

Important: the owner should say no the first time, and you should show how you handle the objection and convince them on the second attempt.



These recordings are required so we can evaluate:



Your English level

Your pronunciation and diction

Your microphone quality

Your confidence on calls

Your sales and cold calling ability

How you handle objections in real conversation



Applications without the required recordings will not be considered.



If you are truly good at cold calling and sales, this is a real opportunity to join a growing company, close deals, and build long-term income.



Apply now.

title: editor
description:
Video Editor Needed for VSL Ads 
 & Paid Social)



Budget: $5 per hour

Volume: 4–30 videos per month

Video length: 30–150 seconds

Payment: Direct transfer (bonuses available for strong performance)



About Us

We are a growing e-commerce brand focused on sleep and wellness products. Our main product is a premium ergonomic pillow, and we are actively scaling our paid ads, primarily on
 and Instagram.

Our new website (reference for branding & tone):



We are looking for a reliable video editor who understands VSL-style ads and can help us produce consistent, conversion-focused creatives.



What You’ll Be Editing

VSL-style ads (Video Sales Letter format)

Short to mid-length videos: 30–150 seconds

Content made for
 / Instagram ads

Goal: engagement, clarity, and conversions



What We Provide (Very Important)

You will NOT need to source content yourself.

We provide:

B-roll footage

Voice overs

Scripts

Clear, simple instructions per video

Reference examples & structure

Your job is to assemble, edit, pace, and enhance the video so it performs well as an ad.



What We’re Looking For

Experience editing VSL or direct-response ads

Understanding of:

Hook in first 3–5 seconds

Clean pacing

On-screen captions / emphasis

Simple but effective transitions

Ability to follow instructions precisely

Consistent delivery & communication

You don’t need fancy motion graphics — clarity > effects.



Payment & Bonuses

$10 per finished video

Bonuses available for:

Consistency

Fast turnaround

High-performing creatives

Long-term collaboration possible if results are good

We are a $40/month tool-based company, lean and performance-driven, and we value editors who grow with us.



Ideal Candidate

Has edited ads, UGC, or VSL content before

Understands
 ad creative best practices

Can handle 4–30 videos per month

Looking for ongoing work, not one-off gigs



How to Apply

Please send:

2–5 examples of ad or VSL-style videos you edited

Your editing software

Your availability per month

Confirm you’re okay with $10 per video

Applications without examples will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Agent — EdTech (Private Schools)
description:
About The Math Wiz



The Math Wiz (
) is an online math learning platform for Filipino elementary students (Grades 1–6). Built on Singapore Math methodology and fully aligned to the DepEd MATATAG curriculum, it gives schools a turnkey digital math program — video lessons, interactive quizzes with full solutions, and self-paced learning on any device.





The Role



You will approach private elementary schools in your city and pitch The Math Wiz as a school-wide annual subscription. Schools bundle the subscription into their student fees and earn a margin — so you're not asking schools to spend money, you're showing them a new revenue line.



This is a field sales role. You'll visit schools, meet principals and academic coordinators, and walk them through how the platform works. We provide all materials — a school-facing booklet, pitch scripts, phone scripts, and a step-by-step sales playbook.





Commission Structure



First 12 months: 70% of collected revenue from every school you sign

After: 10% perpetual renewal commission for every year that school stays subscribed



This is not a one-time payout. Every school you close becomes a recurring income stream. Sign 5 schools and you have passive renewal income coming in every year with no additional work.





How Your Commission Is Protected



You won't be pitching one school at a time. You'll be working a pipeline of multiple schools simultaneously, each at a different stage of the sales process. By the time your first school signs, you'll have several others already warmed up and in progress.



This means our incentives are fully aligned. If we don't pay your commission on school #1, you walk — and we lose every other school you've been building relationships with. The cost of not paying you far outweighs the cost of paying you. Your pipeline is your leverage.



On top of that, all commission terms are documented in a formal Sales Agent Agreement before you start.





Example Earnings



One school with 200 students at 800 PHP/student/year = 160,000 PHP collected

Your Year 1 commission = 112,000 PHP

Your renewal commission every year after = 16,000 PHP

Scale that to 5 schools and the numbers speak for themselves.





Requirements



Sales experience (field sales, B2B, or direct selling preferred)

Confident approaching schools and speaking with principals and administrators

Can work independently and manage your own schedule

Has own transportation for school visits

Fluent in Filipino and English





What We Provide



Professional school-facing booklet and sales agent booklet

Phone scripts and in-person pitch scripts

Step-by-step sales playbook with a proven multi-touch approach

Ongoing support and coordination from the founder directly





How to Apply



Apply through this listing. Tell us which city you're based in and briefly describe your sales experience. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a short Zoom call to walk through the opportunity in detail.

title: GHL Certified Admin with Make.com Experience
description:
What This Role Is

Gracchus Partners builds growth systems for businesses that are serious about revenue. GoHighLevel is our execution layer — the platform where strategy becomes automation, follow-up becomes consistent, and client systems run without manual intervention.

We need a certified GHL admin who builds things that work the first time, documents what they build, and understands that a workflow is only as good as the business outcome it produces. This is not a "set it and forget it" role. It's a "build it right, then scale it" role.



Starts Part time and will move to Full time as we Scale



What You'll Do



Build and maintain GHL funnels, landing pages, and forms for client onboarding and lead capture

Design, build, and test multi-step automation workflows — lead follow-up, appointment reminders, nurture sequences, pipeline stage triggers

Configure and manage GHL sub-accounts for individual client deployments

Create automation snapshots that can be deployed across multiple client accounts

Integrate GHL with third-party tools including 
, Zapier, Stripe, and webhooks to extend workflow capability beyond native GHL functions

Audit existing workflows for logic gaps, missed triggers, and drop-off points

Document every build — what it does, why it was built, and how to modify it

Communicate build status and blockers clearly without being asked


 AI employee set up experience





What You Must Have



GoHighLevel certification — required, not negotiable

Proven builds: funnels, forms, and multi-branch automation workflows in production environments

Working knowledge of GHL's pipeline management, conversation routing, and trigger logic

Ability to translate a business process (sales follow-up, client onboarding, appointment booking) into an automated workflow without a step-by-step spec

Strong attention to conditional logic — if/then branches, wait steps, goal completions

Clean written communication. You'll be interfacing with clients and internal stakeholders.





What Sets You Apart



You've built and deployed reusable GHL snapshots across multiple sub-accounts

You can build multi-step 
 scenarios that connect GHL to external platforms — and know when Make is the right tool versus native GHL automation

You understand the difference between a workflow that fires and a workflow that converts

You've worked inside a marketing agency or SaaS environment running GHL at scale

You can spot a broken funnel from a conversion rate, not just a failed trigger

You think in systems, not tasks





Compensation

Commensurate with experience. Performance upside available as the firm scales.



To Apply

Send your résumé and a screenshot or Loom of a GHL funnel  build you're proud of.

Not a list of tools you know. Not a description of what you "can" do.

Show the build. Walk us through what it does, what business problem it solves, and what you'd do differently if you rebuilt it today. That's the filter. It tells us more than any résumé line ever will.

Generic applications are not reviewed.

title: Full Time Leasing and Customer Experience Coordinator
description:
About Us

Mayco Real Estate Services was established in 2015 with a focus on managing and leasing residential properties the right way.  We are seeking to add a permanent tea
mber to join us as a Leasing & Customer Experience Coordinator.  

From the beginning, our goal has been simple:

 Create a place where people love to live.

We believe that strong, stable performance comes from consistent execution over time—not shortcuts or quick fixes. That means:

Responding quickly

Communicating clearly

Following through on what we say we’ll do

Addressing problems before they grow

We are a performance-driven company that values:

Ownership – If you see it, you own it until it’s resolved

Accountability – Results matter, and actions should reflect that

Consistency – Doing the right things, the right way, every day

Smart Execution – Solving problems effectively and efficiently

Over time, we have built a stable and growing portfolio by focusing on these principles. Our success is a direct result of maintaining high standards and continuously improving how we operate.  

We are not a large corporate organization with layers of management. We are a focused, hands-on team where each person’s work directly impacts performance, resident experience, and company reputation.  We treat our tea
mbers as professionals and expect the same in return.

We are continually refining our systems, processes, and expectations so that the right people can succeed by consistently doing the right things.



Resonate

You take pride in doing things the right way, even when no one is watching.

You are proactive by nature. When you notice something needs attention, you don’t wait—you step in, take action within your guidelines, and keep things moving forward.

You don’t let things fall through the cracks. When you see something that needs to be handled, you feel responsible for it until it’s fully resolved.

You are consistent. You understand that results don’t happen by a
—they come from doing the right things, the right way, over and over again.

At the same time, you know that actions are only as valuable as the results they produce. It’s not enough to go through the motions—you pay attention to outcomes, recognize when something isn’t working, and adjust your approach to improve performance.

You communicate clearly, professionally, and with care. You understand that how you respond to someone—especially when there’s a problem—matters just as much as solving the problem itself.

You are naturally organized and pay attention to details others might miss. You notice when something is off, and you take the initiative to investigate or ask questions.

You are comfortable working within structure and clear expectations, but you don’t need constant direction. You can manage your responsibilities, prioritize what matters most, and stay productive without someone checking on you throughout the day.

You care about people. Whether it’s someone looking for a home or a resident with a concern, you treat them with respect, responsiveness, and professionalism.

You don’t just complete tasks—you take ownership of outcomes.



Role

Leasing & Customer Experience Coordinator

You are responsible for maximizing leasing performance, delivering exceptional customer experience, and ensuring that no opportunity or issue is left unattended.

This is a permanent, full-time, results-driven role where consistent execution and strong follow-through directly impact performance.



Responsibilities

1. Leasing & Lead Management (Primary Focus)

Respond to all inbound leads:

Calls, texts, guest cards, and
 inquiries

Confirm automated responses are sent correctly

Send a warm, personal follow-up message within ~5 minutes when possible

Move prospects through the pipeline:

Inquiry ? Conversation ? Showing ? Application

Follow up consistently and professionally (without being excessive)

Ensure no lead is missed, ignored, or forgotten



2. Customer Experience & Problem Ownership

Acknowledge all resident communication promptly

Take ownership of every issue until fully resolved

Communicate expectations clearly and proactively

Ownership Standard:

Identify next step

Take action or assign action

Set follow-up reminder

Re-check after expected resolution

Confirm resolution with resident

No issue is considered complete until the resident confirms it is resolved.



3. Unit Health & Performance Monitoring

Perform a Unit Health Check immediately upon listing

Continuously monitor unit performance and activity

If performance is below expectations:

Verify listings are active across all platforms

Confirm pricing, photos, and details are correct

Identify potential issues

Recommend actions

Units should never sit without active monitoring and intentional action.



4. Marketing & Social Media (Secondary / Time-Boxed)

Create and post 2–3 social media posts per week

Manage
 Marketplace listings

Assist with advertising campaigns (if capable or trained)

Suggest content ideas based on research and trends

Marketing is secondary to leasing and customer service performance.



5. Administrative Support

Assist with move-in and move-out workflows

Coordinate utility turn-ons and turn-offs

Track and report KPIs daily and weekly

Maintain accurate and organized records

Support additional administrative tasks as needed and time allows



6. Reputation & Reviews

Identify opportunities to request Google reviews

Encourage satisfied residents to leave feedback

Help strengthen company reputation over time



Results

You will be evaluated based on measurable performance.

Primary Metrics

Days on Market

Total Occupancy (Occupied Units)

Lease Renewal / Retention Rates

Resident Satisfaction (as measured)

Online Reputation (Google Reviews and similar platforms)

Supporting Metrics

Lead ? Showing Conversion Rate

Showing ? Application Conversion Rate

Follow-up consistency

Issue resolution tracking

Unit performance monitoring



Requirements

Must Have

Strong written and verbal English communication

High attention to detail

Ability to follow structured processes

Reliable internet and work environment



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience in leasing, property management, or customer service

Experience with CRM systems

Experience with social media or advertising



How You Operate

You will be trained on specific situations where you can act independently.

If the situation fits within your training ? take action

If it does not ? escalate for guidance

Regardless of escalation:

 ? You remain responsible for tracking the issue until resolution

Over time, training and documentation will expand, allowing you to operate more independently and reduce the need for escalation.



What This Role Is Not

This is not a passive, task-only role

This is not a “wait to be told what to do” position

This is not a role where problems are handed off and forgotten





Work Schedule & Availability

Standard schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time (US)

You are expected to be consistently available and responsive throughout working hours

Weekend Check-In:

A brief check-in is required once per day on weekends to review and address any urgent issues

This is not a full workday, but ensures nothing urgent is missed and residents are supported

Holiday Check-In:

On holidays, you are expected to check in periodically to identify any urgent issues

On major holidays, if an urgent issue arises, escalation to the appropriate tea
mber is sufficient



Responsiveness Standards

Text messages: response within 1 business hour

s and
 messages: response within 4 business hours

Phone calls and texts received before 3:30 PM: returned the same day

Consistent, proactive communication is a core expectation of this role. Most days are manageable when systems and follow-up are handled properly.





Compensation & Structure

Full-time, long-term position

Stable monthly salary: $1,000 USD

Performance-Based Bonuses

Monthly bonuses tied to clearly defined performance metrics

Bonus structure is simple, transparent, and based on measurable results

Each metric is weighted individually, typically ranging from $50–$100 per metric

Strong performance across all metrics can significantly increase total monthly compensation

Performance metrics are designed to be achievable and within your control based on consistent execution.

Retention & Longevity Incentives

Retention bonus at 90 days

Additional opportunities for increased compensation as responsibility and performance grow

Additional Benefits

13th month bonus

Technology fund for equipment upgrades and replacements

Paid time off with annual payout for unused days (up to defined limits)

Recognized holidays

This is a long-term role within a stable and growing company. Strong performance will lead to increased trust, expanded authority, and additional earning opportunities over time.

We treat our tea
mbers as professionals and expect the same in return.



???? Why This Role Matters

This role sits at the center of our day-to-day operations.

You are the first point of contact for prospective residents and a key point of contact for current residents. The way you communicate, follow up, and handle issues directly impacts:

How quickly our units lease

How long residents stay

How residents feel about living in our properties

Our online reputation and long-term growth

Leasing performance and customer experience are not separate—they are directly connected.

A missed message, delayed follow-up, or unresolved issue can cost us a lease or damage our reputation. On the other hand, fast response times, consistent follow-up, and strong ownership create better outcomes across the board.

This role is critical to:

Improving leasing performance

Increasing occupancy

Retaining residents

Strengthening our brand and reputation

When this role is executed well, it creates measurable impact across the entire business.





Application Instructions

To apply, complete the following:

Describe a situation where you were responsible for solving a problem over multiple days. How did you ensure it was fully resolved?

A prospective tenant messages you about a property but stops responding after your first reply. What specific steps would you take next?

Include the phrase: “Own the outcome” at the top of your application.

This role plays a vital part in ensuring smooth operations by managing customer inquiries, scheduling irrigation services, coordinating with field technicians, and maintaining organized job records. The Administrative Assistant will serve as the primary office support role, enabling the business owner and technicians to focus on field operations and service delivery.

title: PV (Pharmacovigilance) Quality Assurance Assistant
description:
The Quality Assurance Assistant provides administrative support to the Quality Assurance (QA) department. Responsibilities include delegating administrative tasks related to various aspects to support the quality assurance processes and associated functions. Assist with updating and maintaining systems, procedures and work practices to a level that will pass international quality assurance audits in accordance with the specifications of ICH GCP, SA GCP, FDA and other relevant guidelines.



Essential Functions:

• Assist with relevant preparation for planned audits of Company documents and systems.

• Assist with maintenance of relevant tracking databases, as required.

• Provide general administrative support to the QA team, as required.

• Assist with frequent reviews of national and international regulatory websites, to stay abreast of updates on general clinical research guidelines.

• Other ad hoc tasks associated with QA functions, as required.

• Assist with administrative tasks and responsibilities in other departments, as required.



Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Computer and word processing skills (Microsoft Office).

• Self-motivated, positive attitude.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

• Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively.

• Good English language and grammar skills.

• The ability to work unsupervised / independently.

• Excellent team player with team-building skills.

• Adequate knowledge of relevant Company SOPs, ICH GCP and SA GCP guidelines.



Position Requirements:

Education: National Senior Certificate (Grade 12) or its international equivalent as a minimum.

Preferred Job-related Experience: Adequate experience and a high level of administrative competency, preferably demonstrated in a clinical research setting.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: PV (Pharmacovigilance) Clinical Trial Safety Reporting Administrator
description:
Position Summary:

The Clinical Trial Safety Reporting Administrator is a full WFH remote setting and is responsible for ensuring timely, accurate, and compliant submission of individual case safety reports (ICSRs) related to clinical trials. This role supports pharmacovigilance and clinical operations teams by managing safety documentation, coordinating with stakeholders, and maintaining regulatory compliance in accordance with ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other global regulatory requirements.



Key Responsibilities:

• Coordinate the collection, tracking, and submission of ICSRs and periodic reports to partners, regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators.

• Maintain safety reporting logs, ensuring data accuracy and completeness.

• Monitor safety reporting timelines and escalate delays or issues to appropriate stakeholders.

• Collaborate with clinical teams, CROs, and vendors to ensure proper documentation and reporting of safety events.

• Assist in the distribution and submission of safety-related documents, including Development Safety Update Reports (DSURs), line listings, and other deliverables as required.

• Support audits and inspections by providing documentation and responding to queries related to safety reporting.

• Ensure compliance with applicable global regulatory requirements and internal SOPs.



Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Nursing, Pharmacy, or a related field.

• 1–3 years of experience in clinical trial safety reporting, pharmacovigilance, or clinical operations.

• Knowledge of MedDRA and WHO Drug Dictionary coding.

• Knowledge of ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other relevant regulatory guidelines.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: Experienced Video Editor (Long Form Youtube 2+ Hour Sleep Content)
description:
My name is Niko, and we're expanding our network of YouTube channels in the sleep and relaxation niche.

We produce ultra long-form content (2-3 hours) covering historical time periods, these videos can be about philosophy, interesting facts but they are all optimised for people to fall asleep to.



Important: If you're manually editing these videos without any AI automation, this role potentially isn't for you unless you have experience doing this already at scale. This is because at 2-3 hours per video, manual editing is usally too slow unless you're exceptionally fast. Ideally you already have a workflow that uses AI tools to pull in images, generate visuals, or automate parts of the process (Claude, fal.ai, ElevenLabs, Kling, ComfyUI, etc.).



Examples of the type of editing we want:




/watch?v=UOQSDNjFtdA - AI video intro transitioning into sleep animation style


/watch?v=vGOb1DzSorg - Oil painting animation mixed with photorealistic period imagery



We're building a portfolio of high-performing channels designed to reach millions of viewers globally, and we're looking for a Video Editor who understands storytelling, pacing, atmosphere, and retention — not just cutting clips.This isn't a one-off project — there's strong long-term upside as we expand.



Content Style:

-2-3 hour immersive videos

-First 5-8 minutes: AI-generated video clips and b-roll to hook viewers

-Remainder: Parallax/Ken Burns style animations on AI-generated or period-accurate imagery

-Calm, slow-paced storytelling

-Ambient sound design

-Content designed for relaxation and sleep



Position Details:

-Full-time: 40 hours per week (Monday to Saturday) - Happy for you to pick your own daily hours as long as submissions are complete

-Expected Output:  1-2 videos per day ( starts at 1 video then scales to 2 when you have your workflow, we will provide the scripts and voice-overs the final submissions will be 2-3 hour long videos

-Monthly Salary: $400 USD + incentive bonuses ($500 USD per month if you can also edit high performing thumbnails)

-Regular performance-based pay reviews

-Long-term role with growth potential



Ideal Candidate Has:

-Passion for YouTube and storytelling

-Experience editing sleep/relaxation or ultra long-form content

-Good sense of pacing and retention

-Strong communication and reliability

-Ability to follow structure and deliver consistently

-AI automation workflow for video production



How to Apply:

-Start your message with your favourite animal

-Send 2–3 examples of your work in this niche (sleep/relaxation/long-form content)

-Briefly describe your workflow — what tools and automation do you use?

description:

CRM systems

Organise client information, jobs, and scheduling

title: Product manager @ vidrush.ai
description:
VidRush is an AI-native video production platform that replaces an entire video team with coordinated AI agents.



Creators turn a simple idea into a fully produced, long-form video—research, script, voiceover, visuals, motion graphics, and rendering—in under an hour. No timelines. No editing headaches. Just intent ? finished video.



We’re building a new way to create video that feels more like writing than editing, and we’re already seeing strong traction from serious creators and media teams.



If you’re excited about AI, creator tools, and building category-defining products from first principles, you’ll fit right in.



The Role



We’re hiring a Product Manager to streamline execution and product delivery across multiple teams, including both standard development and R&D/AI work.



You’ll work directly with founders and engineering leads to:



define strategy and priorities



translate that strategy into clear requirements



manage cross-team execution in Jira



enforce accountability, visibility, and predictable delivery



help the team ship high-quality work faster without chaos



This role blends classic product thinking with strong Product Ops / Delivery instincts.





What You’ll Do



Strategy & Prioritization

Help define the product strategy for the next 4–12 weeks



Translate company goals into a focused roadmap



Make tradeoffs and say “no” when necessary to protect velocity





Requirements & Planning

Write clear, concrete feature requirements before development starts



Align frontend and backend expectations early to avoid mismatches late



Define ownership: who’s responsible for what, and what “done” means



Execution & Accountability

Own Jira: maintain a clean backlog, run sprint planning, and drive follow-through



Track progress and surface blockers early (before a task stalls for weeks)



Improve team velocity and visibility across time zones



Managing R&D / AI Work

Structure exploration work using “spikes” and experiments



Reduce endless trial-and-error by defining:



why the experiment exists



what success looks like



how long it runs before a decision is made



Keep research aligned to strategy rather than constantly chasing new trends



Team Process

Establish lightweight rituals that actually help (standups, planning, retros)



Create meeting structures that work across time zones (e.g., two-pass sync + notes)



Improve internal documentation and communication flow



What We’re Looking For (Most Important)

Strong experience shipping product in fast-moving environments



Excellent at writing requirements that eliminate ambiguity



Confident prioritizer: can protect focus and reduce roadmap chaos



Highly organized and execution-driven: you push work to completion



Deep Jira experience (backlog hygiene, sprint planning, workflows)



Able to coordinate distributed teams across time zones



Great communicator: you align stakeholders without creating friction



Comfortable working with technical teams, including AI/R&D workflows



Nice to Have

Experience with creator tools, media products, or video workflows



Experience managing hybrid teams (product + R&D + engineering)



Strong background as a business analyst or product ops lead



Experience building internal systems/processes from scratch



How We Work

Small team, high ownership — you’ll drive outcomes directly



Lightweight process: crisp requirements, fast iteration, measurable results



Strong bias to action and clarity



We value execution, not performative process

title: LinkedIn Content Writer & Visual Storyteller
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, creative LinkedIn Content Writer who can build a powerful personal or brand presence on LinkedIn, one that stops the scroll, earns trust, and drives real engagement. This isn't a copy-paste content mill role. You'll be crafting 5 high-quality posts per week that combine authoritative writing with visually compelling, data-driven infographics and model-style graphic design.



What You'll Do

You'll write and publish 5 LinkedIn posts daily, each crafted to educate, provoke thought, or inspire action within a specific niche. Every post must feel like it came from a credible expert, not a content scheduler. Alongside your writing, you'll design or direct infographics, carousel frameworks, and model-style visual breakdowns. Think clean hierarchy, bold typography, and data visualization that makes complex ideas instantly digestible.



You'll research trending topics and industry conversations to stay ahead of the curve, develop a consistent voice and editorial calendar, A/B test hooks and formats, and analyze post performance to continuously refine the content strategy.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 years of experience writing professional content for LinkedIn, with a portfolio that proves you can drive engagement, not just impressions. You understand what makes a LinkedIn hook work in the first three lines, and you know how to structure a post for maximum dwell time and comments.



On the design side, you're comfortable in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Express and can produce infographics that look like they belong on a top-tier thought leader's feed. You have a strong eye for layout, color, and information hierarchy. Bonus points if you've grown a LinkedIn account from scratch or ghostwritten for executives or founders.



Non-Negotiables

Consistency is everything here: 5 posts per week, every week, on schedule. Each piece of content must be original, well-researched, and free of generic filler. You take ownership of results and aren't waiting to be managed.



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Performance bonuses tied to engagement growth and follower milestones.

title: Interior documentor
description:
interior Designer (ArchiCAD + InDesign) | Full-Time | Philippines (9am–6pm PHT)

Mid–Senior Level | 2-Month Contract (Initial Engagement)



We are a Melbourne-based architecture and interior design studio working on high-end residential projects. Our work is calm, refined and highly resolved, with a focus on restraint, material quality, and spatial clarity.



We are looking for an experienced interior designer to join our team remotely on an initial two-month contract.



This is a production-focused role. You will take direction and turn it into clear, resolved, well-presented work.



About the Role



You will work across multiple residential projects, producing interiors documentation to our standards from early concept through to documentation and presentation.



You must be able to think through drawings, take direction, and recognise when something needs to be clarified.



Responsibilities



• Develop interior layouts, joinery, and material schemes from direction

• Produce interior documentation in ArchiCAD under direction

• Translate markups and sketches into clear, buildable drawings

• Prepare finishes and FF&E schedules in Excel

• Prepare high-quality presentations in InDesign

• Maintain consistency across drawings, schedules, and presentations

• Identify gaps, inconsistencies, or risks and raise them early



Requirements



• 4+ years experience in interior design (residential preferred)

• Strong ArchiCAD skills

• Strong InDesign skills (non-negotiable)

• Strong Excel skills (required)

• Experience with joinery, wet areas, and finishes

• Ability to read and understand architectural drawings

• Excellent written and spoken English (non-negotiable)



Bonus (not essential)



• Experience with Programa (favourable)

• Experience working with Australian or international studios



Hours



• Full-time: 9:00am – 6:00pm Philippine time (Monday–Friday)

• Remote role (Philippines-based)



Contract Terms



• Initial 2-month contract

• Time is tracked and paid based on accurately recorded hours

• Daily time tracking is required

• Workload and priorities are allocated and managed by our team



To Apply



Please follow these steps carefully. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

 1. Write a short introduction (max 150 words)

 2. Attach your portfolio (PDF or link)

 3. Include your hourly rate

 4. Record a short video (1–2 minutes) answering:

• Your experience with ArchiCAD, InDesign, and Excel

• The type of projects you have worked on

• Why you are a good fit for this role

 5. Provide a copy of your academic transcript / school results

 6. Provide at least two professional references with contact details

 7. Start your application with: “I can think through drawings”



Screening Process



Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test task.

title: Ecommerce Multimedia Designer (Remote with flexible hours)
description:
Founded in 2018 and headquartered in The Netherlands, GTE is on a mission to build the most efficient global direct-to-consumer infrastructure and become the world’s largest e-commerce company—powered by a collective of successful, scalable brands. By end of 2026, we’re aiming to achieve $500 million in revenue and operate over 50 thriving online stores worldwide.



With a team of 160+ top-tier remote e-commerce professionals across the globe, we blend local brand experiences with cross-border logistics, ensuring every customer feels connected—no matter where they are.



At our core, we value hard work, freedom with responsibility, constant improvement, and a mindset of positivity. We believe in building a high-performance, remote-first culture where honesty, excellence, and creativity drive everything we do—because the future of work is global, and we’re building it together;





We’re on the lookout for a Multimedia Designer to join our expanding team and drive our company’s growth!





The Challenge

We’re looking for a Multimedia Designer who can bring speed, creativity, and AI-driven efficiency to our creative team. This role will support in producing product images, website graphics, and assist with AI video creation. The challenge is to deliver high-quality output quickly, reduce the need for revisions, and leverage AI tools effectively to maximize efficiency.



The Impact

By creating better creatives, you’ll directly help our ads and products sell better. With higher production levels at higher quality, your work will enable our media buyers, site managers, and the wider team to move faster and perform more effectively.







We would love to hear from you if…

- You have hands-on experience creating AI product videos and use AI tools daily with advanced techniques for video and image production.

- You bring strong graphic design skills and can deliver high-quality visuals quickly.

- You’re experienced in video editing (After Effects, CapCut) and AI video prompting (JSON, problem-solving).

- You’re proficient with Flora, Kling AI, and JSON prompting techniques.

- You’re AI-obsessed, work independently, and have a sharp eye for detail.

 -You’re comfortable in Figma (Auto Layout, Components, Variants).

- You consistently balance speed with quality of work.

 





System Requirements:

- Windows: i5 13th Gen or above, 16GB RAM or above.

- Mac: M2 or above.





Couple of the notes about the role

- This role is an Independent Contractor position, offering flexibility, autonomy, and the opportunity to manage your own schedule while making a meaningful impact on our operations.

title: Customer Service Rep (Must have strong English)
description:
Customer Service Representative



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Schedule: U.S. Eastern Time zone business hours



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a growing e-commerce and retail fashion brand based in Atlanta, GA. We offer premiu
n's and women's clothing, suits, accessories, and footwear through our online store and physical retail locations. We are a fast-paced, customer-first company that values quality, responsiveness, and attention to detail in everything we do.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a Customer Service Representative to serve as the primary point of contact for our customers across
, chat, social media, and phone. This is a full-time, remote position based in the Philippines, supporting our U.S.-based operations during Eastern Time business hours.



The ideal candidate has a proven track record of delivering outstanding customer service, communicates with excellent English and proper grammar, and takes pride in representing a brand professionally. You will be trained on all tools and systems, but you must come in ready to communicate clearly, solve problems independently, and go above and beyond for every customer interaction.



RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, social media (Instagram,
), and phone in a timely, professional, and friendly manner

2. Assist customers with order status, shipping questions, returns, exchanges, and product information

3. Process orders, returns, refunds, and exchanges accurately using the company's e-commerce platform

4. Resolve customer complaints and issues with empathy, patience, and a solutions-oriented approach

5. Maintain and update customer records and order notes in the company's systems

6. Monitor and respond to online reviews, comments, and direct messages across social media platforms

7. Edit and resize product photos for the online store, social media, and marketing materials using photo editing tools (Canva, Photoshop, or similar)

8. Assist with product listing updates, descriptions, and content uploads on the e-commerce platform

9. Escalate complex or unresolved issues to management with clear documentation and context

10. Proactively identify patterns in customer questions or complaints and suggest improvements to processes, FAQs, or product listings

11. Support other administrative and operational tasks as assigned



REQUIREMENTS



Must-Have Qualifications



1. 2+ years of customer service experience, preferably in e-commerce, retail, or fashion

2. Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with proper grammar, spelling, and punctuation

3. Proven track record of delivering exceptional customer service and resolving issues effectively

4. Professional, warm, and brand-appropriate tone in all written and verbal communications

5. Experience editing photos for product listings, social media, or marketing (Canva, Photoshop, Lightroom, or similar tools)

6. Strong attention to detail and ability to maintain accuracy across orders, records, and communications

7. Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

8. Reliable internet connection and quiet, professional home workspace

9. Available to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Preferred Qualifications



10. Experience with Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms

11. Familiarity with social media management and responding to customer engagement on Instagram and

12. Experience with customer service tools such as Zendesk, Freshdesk, Gorgias, or similar

13. Background in fashion, retail, or apparel



KEY TRAITS WE'RE LOOKING FOR



1. Exceptional Communicator: You write and speak with clarity, warmth, and professionalism. Your grammar and tone are consistently polished.

2. Customer-First Mindset: You genuinely care about the customer experience and go the extra mile to make things right.

3. Detail-Oriented: You catch errors before they reach the customer, whether in an
, a product listing, or an order.

4. Problem Solver: You think critically, take initiative, and don't wait to be told what to do when something needs to be fixed.

5. Reliable and Consistent: You show up on time, meet deadlines, and deliver quality work every day.

6. Eager to Learn: You're comfortable being trained on new tools and technology and pick things up quickly.



TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGY



You will be fully trained on all tools and platforms used in this role. Familiarity with any of the following is a plus but not required:



1. E-commerce platform (Shopify or similar)

2. Photo editing tools (Canva, Photoshop, Lightroom)

3.
 and communication tools

4. Social media platforms (Instagram,
)

5. Customer service and ticketing systems



HOW TO APPLY



Interested candidates should submit their resume and a brief cover letter highlighting their customer service experience and English communication skills. Please include a sample of any photo editing work if available.

title: Programmer
description:

We are looking for a highly skilled, proactive, and solution-oriented professional with strong experience in IT systems, automation, CRM implementation, web development, and digital process optimization. The ideal candidate should be able to support and improve our internal operations, communication systems, workflow organization, and digital infrastructure through practical and scalable technical solutions.

• strong experience in business process automation, CRM systems, integrations, and web-based solutions 

• proven ability to build, implement, customize, and maintain CRM systems 

• experience in connecting CRM platforms with advertising channels, lead forms, websites, landing pages, and communication tools 

• experience in building and optimizing mailing systems, automated
 flows, lead nurturing systems, and customer communication pipelines

• experience in creating bots, automated workflows, and internal tools that improve business efficiency 

• strong understanding of sales funnels, lead management, customer data flows, and performance tracking

Technical skills and knowledge:

• strong knowledge of CRM platforms and related setup, customization, and integration 

• strong understanding of automation platforms and workflow logic 

• experience with API integrations between CRM, ad platforms, websites, forms, and communication systems 

• good knowledge of website development, frontend/backend logic, and web administration

 systems, mailing automation, SMTP setup, deliverability, and campaign flows

Preferred technologies, languages, and tools:

Key responsibilities:

 automations, and communication sequences

title: SENIOR VA — EU B2B, MARKETING & OPERATIONS
description:
SENIOR VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — B2B MARKETING & OPERATIONS

ShoulderSink ApS | Remote | Part-time (50%) with path to full-time by end of 2026

 

 

ABOUT US

 

ShoulderSink is a small Danish B2B company. We make mobile hand hygiene solutions for commercial vehicles — our product is installed in 50,000+ vehicles across Europe. Small team, clear strategy and growing fast across key European markets.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

You work directly with the founder across three areas:

 

Operations (25%): Track our plans, flag slipping deadlines, ask the right questions, keep things moving without being asked.

 

Marketing (35%): Build the monthly content calendar. Draft posts using AI tools. Schedule and publish on LinkedIn,
 and Instagram across several languages. Track META ad campaigns in Germany and the Netherlands.

 

Projects (40%): Build prospect lists, execute approved
 outreach, log everything in Pipedrive CRM, support influencer programmes and event preparation.

 

This is a close working relationship. You will have daily contact with the founder and a weekly video status meeting. You need a minimum 2-hour overlap with European/UK business hours (CET).

 

 

WHAT WE NEED

 

- C2 written English — non-negotiable. German or French would be a plus.

- 3+ years as a VA or coordinator in a B2B environment

- Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT or similar) to draft and refine content

- Experience with LinkedIn,
, Google Sheets and Gmail

- CRM experience — Pipedrive preferred

- Proactive communication style: you flag problems before they become crises, not after

- Available for daily contact and weekly video check-in during EU/UK business hours

 

 

WHAT WE OFFER

 

- $600/month at 50% hours

- Performance bonus after 6 months — based on personal and company KPIs

- Possibility of full-time position by end of 2026 for the right person

- Direct, daily access to the founder — fast decisions, no corporate layers

- A real senior role with genuine responsibility — not a task list

- Stable company, clear processes, documented strategy

- Confidentiality agreement required before onboarding

 

 

PLEASE APPLY VIA THIS PLATFORM

 

Please include:

- A short cover note (max 150 words) — why this role, why you. Be specific. Generic applications will not be considered.

- One concrete example of a time you flagged a problem proactively before it became an issue

- Which AI tools have you used, and for what tasks? Give one specific example.

- Your CRM experience — which platform, and what was your role?

- Your available hours and CET overlap

- Your personal situation and workspace setup

title: Backend Architect / Staff Engineer
description:
Backend Architect / Staff Engineer



Company: TruthScan 

Location: Fully Remote (Global) 

Hours: 100% Flexible



About TruthScan 



We help enterprise companies detect AI fraud at massive scale. As AI-generated content and sophisticated fraud tactics multiply, our systems act as the ultimate line of defense. We are a small, elite, fully remote team, and we are currently entering a hyper-growth phase.



The Challenge 



We are looking for a world-class engineer to sit squarely at the intersection of deep backend engineering, DevOps, and systems architecture. Our current immediate mandate is to scale our architecture 20x to 100x in the next six months to seamlessly serve millions of requests per minute.



You will be given full autonomy. We don't care when you work or how you structure your day, as long as you are highly results-driven and can execute at the highest level alongside our current lead backend engineer.



What You Will Do



Support the architectural roadmap to scale our systems to handle millions of requests per minute.

Bridge the gap between application code, database performance, and cloud infrastructure.

Optimize our data ingestion, processing pipelines, and query latency.

Build observability and alerting to ensure our high-availability targets are met.

Act as a multiplier for the engineering team—mentoring other developers and elevating our overall technical standards.



The Tech Stack



Primary Language: Python (Deep expertise required. Familiarity with Go, Rust, or Node.js/TypeScript is highly desirable).

Data: PostgreSQL, Supabase.

Infrastructure & Cloud: AWS, DigitalOcean, Vercel.

Observability & Search: DataDog, OpenSearch.



Who You Are



A Systems Thinker: You don't just write backend endpoints; you understand how the code, the database, and the infrastructure interact under extreme load.

Battle-Tested: You have successfully scaled systems to millions of RPM before and have the scars to prove it. You know what breaks at scale and how to prevent it.

Highly Autonomous: You thrive in environments with zero micromanagement. You can take a high-level business goal and translate it into a deployable architectural reality.

A Pragmatic Problem Solver: You know when to engineer a custom, complex solution and when to leverage existing tools to get the job done faster.



Compensation & Perks



Top-Tier Pay: We compensate extremely well. Because we are a global, fully remote company, we do not list a single static number, but we pay at the top of the market localized to your country of residence.

True Flexibility: 100% remote, work whenever you are most productive.

Impact: You will be a foundational pillar of a company fighting on the front lines of the AI revolution.

title: Hiring & Recruitment Pipeline Manager (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
**About the Role**



We're a growing DTC brand in the hair tools space and we're looking for a sharp, organised full-time Hiring & Recruitment Pipeline Manager to run our creative talent hiring operation end to end.



You'll own our entire hiring pipeline — from publishing job posts and screening applicants, to keeping our Notion database updated and scheduling assessments. Our goal is to always have a warm bench of ready-to-hire creative talent, and you'll be the person who makes that happen.



This role reports directly to the founder. If you're someone who likes building clean systems, stays on top of details, and communicates proactively — this is for you.



**Your Responsibilities**



- Post and manage job listings on Ecom Talent, Upwork, [OnlineJobs.ph](http://OnlineJobs.ph), and LinkedIn

- Set up Typeform screening questionnaires for each role; collect equivalent data via messages on platforms that don't allow external links

- Screen incoming applications and flag qualified candidates

- Keep our Notion hiring pipeline accurate and up to date at all times

- Coordinate and schedule paid candidate assessments and intro calls

- Maintain a warm bench of 3–5 vetted candidates per creative role

- Track a running list of potential poach targets from top DTC brands



**Roles You'll Be Hiring For**



- Video editors

- Creative strategists

- Graphic designers

- Copywriters



**Requirements**



- At least 2 years of experience in recruitment coordination, HR admin, or talent operations

- Strong written English — you'll communicate with candidates directly

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Comfortable using Notion, Typeform, and job platforms like Upwork and LinkedIn

- Proactive — you don't wait to be told when something needs fixing

- Experience hiring for creative or digital roles is a big plus



**Details**



- Full-time: 40 hours/week

- Remote

- Salary: $5–$15/hr depending on experience

- Start: ASAP



**How to Apply**



Send your application with answers to these 4 questions:



1. How many open roles have you managed at one time?

2. What tools have you used to track candidates and manage pipelines?

3. Have you hired for creative roles before (editors, designers, copywriters)? Give an example.

4. How would you set up and maintain an always-on hiring pipeline from scratch?



Applications that don't answer these questions will not be reviewed.

title: Cold Calling Sales Rep | Full-Time | High Income Potential | Night Shifts
description:
Let’s be honest.



Cold calling is not for everyone.



But if you enjoy picking up the phone, speaking with business owners, handling objections, and turning “not interested” into real deals - keep reading.



We are a growing software startup helping local US businesses get more clients through modern websites and digital services. Our offer works. Business owners need it. We are proving this every day. And we’re now looking for experienced cold callers who know how to sell.



THIS IS WHAT YOUR DAY LOOKS LIKE



You log in.

You start calling US local businesses.

You speak with decision-makers.

You pitch a clear and proven service.

You handle objections.

You close or book the next step.



That’s it.



No micromanagement.

No random lead lists.

No confusion.



Just selling.







*WHY THIS JOB MAKES SENSE*

title: Customer Service Manager (DTC eCommerce)
description:
FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM, EXCLUSIVE ROLE ONLY

No part-time work, agency setups, or side commitments.



We are a fast-growing supplement brand looking for a Customer Support Manager who is genuinely obsessed with efficiency and continuous improvement. This is not a role for someone who just wants to maintain the status quo or follow a manual. We need a leader who looks at a process and immediately thinks of three ways to make it faster, smarter, and better.



You will be responsible for building and scaling our support operations. We want someone who takes deep pride in ownership, turns chaos into systems, and ensures our customer experience is a competitive advantage. If you are a builder who thrives on fixing broken workflows and implementing high-level strategy, we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do



* Optimize & Implement: You will be the architect of our CS roadmap, constantly auditing and improving systems to ensure we stay ahead of our growth.

* System Ownership: Beyond just managing tickets, you will create, improve, and maintain our entire library of SOPs, macros, and internal documentation.

* Problem Identification: You will proactively identify patterns in customer friction and work across departments to solve issues at the root.

* Tech Stack Management: Take full ownership of our tools (Gorgias, Shopify, etc.), ensuring all automations, rules, and integrations are running at peak performance.

* Accountability: Own the department KPIs (CSAT, Resolution Time, Efficiency) and use data to drive every decision you make.

* Hiring: Hire, promote, and remove underperformers to maintain a high-output, accountable team culture

* Lead by Example: Set the standard for communication and problem-solving, eventually leading the hiring and training as the team scales.



Qualifications



* 5+ years leading customer service teams of 15+ in a fast-paced eCommerce environment

* Obsession with Improvement: You must be able to demonstrate how you have personally improved a system, workflow, or department in a previous role.

* Shopify Expert: Strong hands-on experience with Shopify and its ecosystem of apps.

* Tool Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar platforms, specifically in building out automations and complex workflows.

* Strategic Thinker: Ability to translate raw data into actionable process changes.

* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with the ability to lead with authority and clarity.

* Commitment: Willingness to commit full-time and exclusively to our brand for the long term.



This Role is Not for You If:



* You view this as "just a job" rather than something you take personal pride in building

* You need step-by-step direction and shy away from strategic decisions

* You're uncomfortable holding people accountable or addressing underperformance

* You present problems instead of solving them

* You want a comfortable, predictable 9-to-5 job



Click here to apply : 
/jobs/
customer-support-manager

title: Data Solutions Analyst (3+ years experience)
description:
We are looking for a highly analytical and client focused Data Solutions Analyst to join our team. In this role, you will serve as a key bridge between our clients and our data systems. Translate business needs into actionable data solutions. 



You’ll work hands on with large datasets, build and optimize queries, develop dashboards, and ensure data accuracy across our platforms. This position is ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex data problems, communicating clearly with both technical and non technical stakeholders, and taking ownership of work from the initial request through final delivery.



Key Responsibilities

Client & Communication

_Communicate directly with clients via
 and occasional calls to support data-related requests

_Translate client needs into actionable data tasks.  Provide clear status updates and deliver results in a timely manner.

_Maintain a strong service mindset. Focused on responsiveness, professionalism, and problem resolution



Data & Technical Work

_Write and optimize custom queries in Google BigQuery

_Build and maintain structured tables for downstream analytics and reporting

_Develop and manage dashboards in Looker Studio for clients and sales

_Integrate and retrieve data from APIs using tools like Postman

_Support data pipelines and ensure data accuracy and reliability



Problem Solving & Operations

_Troubleshoot data issues and identify root causes efficiently

_Independently investigate and resolve inconsistencies across different datasets

_Take ownership of problems from identification through resolution



Internal Collaboration

_Communicate clearly with internal stakeholders (product, data, sales, operations)

_Develop a strong understanding of data pipelines and end-to-end data workflows

_Work independently while staying aligned with team priorities



Required Skills

_Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a logical and structured approach

_Proficiency in SQL and experience with BigQuery and PSQL

_Experience building dashboards and reports (Looker Studio or similar)

_Familiarity with APIs and tools like Postman

_Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively

_Strong written and verbal communication skills

_Strong understanding of data normalization and standardization best practices, including:

___Structuring data for scalability and performance (e.g., separating dimensions vs facts)

___Creating consistent naming conventions and controlled vocabularies

___Eliminating redundancy and avoiding conflicting data definitions

___Designing datasets that support reliable downstream analytics and reporting



Preferred Experience

_Minimum of 3 years experience

_Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field

_Experience in the electronics component or EMS supply chain

_Familiarity with BOM data, part numbers, or sourcing workflows

_Experience working with large datasets (millions of rows)



What Success Looks Like

_Delivers accurate, client-ready data outputs without constant oversight

_Quickly diagnoses and resolves data issues

_Builds dashboards and tables that are actually used (not just created).  Focused on valuable insights to our customers.

_Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

_Takes initiative and improves processes without being asked

MDT Timezone



The Opportunity

EETech is a growing systems integrator with our own proprietary commerce technology. We are currently hiring two Senior Technical Project Managers to join our overseas team. Our development environment is highly mature, featuring strong, autonomous developers and excellent architects. Because our technical team operates with a high degree of independence, this role is not about micromanagement. Instead, we are looking for professionals who excel at meticulous tracking, capacity visibility, and clear reporting. We are currently managing resources between Azure Boards and 
, and we need project managers who can keep this data flawlessly organized so our US leadership always has an accurate view of project

health.



You will be stepping into two main roles,

? Track 1: Client Implementations, managing the pipeline of third party software integrations and standard digital presence projects.

? Track 2: Core Platform and Launches, managing the internal development roadmap for our proprietary EETech Commerce software, alongside managing the specific client projects launching on that platform.



Key Responsibilities

Visibility and Tracking

? Maintain absolute data integrity within Azure Boards and 
 so that a task is always accurately reflected for US leadership.

Agile Facilitation and Unblocking

Cross Functional Coordination

? For the Client Implementations track, ensure third party tech integrations map perfectly to the Statement of Work signed by the US Success Leads.

? For the Core Platform track, balance the competing priorities of internal platform upgrades, requested by the architects, against custom feature requests needed for upcoming client launches.



Client Engagement & Communication

? Engage directly with clients as needed to gather requirements, follow up on deliverables, and keep projects moving forward

? Communicate clearly and confidently with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, translating complex concepts into plain English

? Represent the project team professionally in client-facing interactions and ensure a positive, solutions-oriented experience



Required Qualifications

? 4+ years of Technical Project Management in software development.

? Proven experience managing capacity and resource planning in a matrix environment, specifically handling shared technical resources across implementations, maintenance, and internal SaaS projects.

? Highly organized with a proven ability to build manual capacity trackers in tools like Excel or 
 while we evaluate dedicated resource software.

? Ability to understand web architecture enough to comprehend what our senior developers and architects are building, and translate that into plain English updates for US stakeholders.

? Experience thriving in an environment where you are trusted to manage the process while letting the engineers manage the code.

? Deep expertise in Azure DevOps, specifically Azure Boards, and modern tracking tools like 
.



Preferred Traits

? Comfortable engaging in client-facing interactions and building strong working relationships

? A proactive, go-getter mindset with a positive attitude toward problem-solving and ownership

? Strong sense of accountability and ability to push initiatives forward without constant oversight

? Naturally curious, with a desire to learn, grow, and continuously improve



(Application Note: Please reply to this posting with your favorite color in the first line so we know you read the full description.)

title: ** Short-Form Video Editor ** (Ad Creatives & Founder Storytelling)
description:
INTRO:

Are you a creative, detail-oriented editor with a passion for visual storytelling and conversion-driven ads? Do you enjoy the challenge of translating a brand's vision into captivating short-form video content?



I’m Rico, the founder of Lampiece, where we create unique, personalized lamps. My brand is built on authenticity, a personal touch, and the journey of building a business. I am looking for a reliable, intermediate-to-advanced Video Editor to help me scale our content.



Currently, we need 1 Social Media Video and 1 Video Ad Creative per week, with the goal of increasing this output gradually as we grow.



Example of the style we're going for:

- https://www.tiktok.com/@moodsamsterdam/video/7488762893501058326



WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON:

You will receive detailed editing briefs and raw footage to create two distinct types of content:

- Social Media Videos (Storytelling): Founder-led content focusing on my business journey. This requires an authentic, engaging storytelling style.

- Ad Creatives (Conversion-Driven): Direct-response ads using various formats like UGC, mashups, and founder ads.



Note on Language: The final output for all videos will be in both English and Dutch. Don't worry if you don't speak Dutch! You will be provided with clear English instructions and detailed briefs making it very easy to create the Dutch versions (including matching the subtitles).



OUR PERFECT MATCH HAS:

- 2+ years of experience editing either social media videos or ad creatives (experience in both is a major plus!).

- Intermediate to advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects (No CapCut).

- Strong skills in making engaging basic cuts, adding dynamic subtitles, and integrating simple motion graphics.

- A keen eye for pacing, visual aesthetics, and social media platform specifications (TikTok, Instagram Reels, Shorts).

- A proactive attitude and the ability to follow a detailed creative brief.



COMPENSATION:

This is a freelance role, and you will be paid on a per-video basis. As the brand grows, your weekly volume and earning potential will grow with it.



HOW TO APPLY:

To ensure you have read this entire post, please include the word "LAMP" at the very beginning of your application subject line or message. Please send us:

- Your resume

- A link to your portfolio specifically showcasing your short-form video editing skills (please point out which are ads and which are organic social media videos).

- Bonus points: Include a brief proposal on how you'd capture our brand's authenticity and unique charm in video form.

title: Cold Caller & Sales Closer Cleaning Services UK
description:
We are looking for an experienced Cold Caller with a background in the cleaning industry. The primary goal of this role is to contact residential and commercial clients and successfully book them for cleaning services.



Key Responsibilities:

• Make outbound calls to residential homeowners and commercial businesses

• Introduce and promote our cleaning services

• Convert leads into booked cleaning appointments

• Schedule and confirm bookings for residential and commercial cleaning services

• Maintain accurate records of calls, bookings, and customer information

• Follow up with prospects to secure bookings and repeat services



Requirements:

• Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or outbound sales

• Previous experience working with a cleaning company (residential and/or commercial)

• Strong communication and closing skills

• Ability to confidently handle objections and turn leads into bookings

• Goal-oriented with a results-driven mindset

• Basic computer skills; CRM experience is a plus



Application Requirement:

• Applicants are required to record a self-introductory and share their experience working in a cleaning company using vocaroo: 
/



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience in B2B (commercial) and/or B2C (residential) sales

• Familiarity with cleaning service offerings, pricing, and scheduling

• Track record of meeting or exceeding booking or sales targets



Key Performance Indicator (KPI):

• Number of cleaning appointments successfully booked

• Conversion rate from calls to confirmed bookings



Work Setup:

• Remote

• Full-time

title: SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT COORDINATOR — ECOMMERCE (ORGANIC GROWTH FOCUSED)
description:
VIDEO INTERVIEW IS MANDATORY — DO NOT APPLY IF YOU WILL NOT SUBMIT A VIDEO. TEXT APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED 



SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT COORDINATOR — ECOMMERCE (ORGANIC GROWTH FOCUSED)



We are hiring someone to take ownership of our social media execution and organic growth.



This is not a basic posting role. You are responsible for planning, coordinating, and executing content that drives engagement, traffic, and sales — aligned with our website and
 marketing.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Build and manage a monthly content calendar aligned with Australian and New Zealand holidays, events, and sales opportunities

• Plan posts around key sales periods and ensure alignment across social media, website, and
 campaigns

• Schedule and publish content consistently

• Work directly with our team and
 specialist to ensure all messaging is aligned

• Use provided raw content, customer reviews, and assets to create engaging posts

• Contribute ideas based on what is performing



ORGANIC GROWTH — NON NEGOTIABLE



You are responsible for growing the page.



• Increase real followers (no fake growth)

• Improve engagement

• Drive traffic to the website



Before starting, you will audit our current social media and identify:

• What is working

• What is not

• What needs to change



You will then complete a 1-month trial.



You must show:

• Measurable growth

• Clear improvements in engagement and/or followers

• Evidence-based decisions



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Strong understanding of the Australian market and seasonal trends

• Experience managing ecommerce social media accounts

• Ability to think in campaigns, not random posts

• Strong communication and reliability

• Someone who takes ownership and executes



HOW TO APPLY — VIDEO REQUIRED



You must answer ALL 5 questions below in a short video (2–5 minutes total).



If you do not submit a video, your application will not be reviewed.



QUESTIONS



1. If you were starting from today, how would you grow our Instagram page in the next 30 days? Be specific.



2. What Australian or New Zealand events, holidays, or sales periods would you plan content around in the next 60 days and why?



3. How do you d
 what content to post — not guess, but based on data or logic?



4. Show or describe one social media post you would create for our brand and explain why it would perform.



5. What is your process for turning followers into actual customers, not just likes and views?



Optional:

You may include an example post you would create for our brand using our website as reference.



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: E-commerce Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a data scraping specialist who understands how to collect, organize, and maintain useful data from e-commerce platforms.



This role is focused on gathering product, pricing, competitor, seller, and marketplace data from platforms such as Shopee, Lazada, and other online selling channels. You should be comfortable working with structured data, handling large product catalogs, and delivering accurate, clean outputs that can support business decisions.



What you’ll handle



Collect product, pricing, seller, review, and competitor data from Shopee, Lazada, and other e-commerce platforms

Extract and organize data in a clear and usable format

Monitor changes in listings, pricing, stock, promotions, and marketplace activity

Build and maintain scraping workflows for recurring data collection

Clean, structure, and validate data before delivery

Work with our team to improve data quality, speed, and reliability over time



What we want



Strong experience with data scraping and web data collection

Experience scraping e-commerce or marketplace platforms

Good knowledge of Python and scraping / automation frameworks

Must know how to use Claude Code and work with it effectively

Comfortable using developer tools needed for data scraping and automation

Ability to deliver clean, accurate, and well-structured datasets

Understanding of product pages, seller listings, reviews, pricing, and marketplace data points

Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully

Reliable communication and consistent delivery



Tools you should know



Python

Scrapy

Playwright, Selenium, or Puppeteer

BeautifulSoup

APIs and JSON data handling

Git and GitHub

Claude Code

Browser developer tools

CSV, Excel, or Google Sheets

Databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite

Basic proxy and session management is a plus

Docker or server deployment knowledge is a plus



How to apply



Send:

“Data Pro”

one direct portfolio link

to your best scraping, automation, or data extraction work



Accepted platforms:

GitHub, Upwork, personal portfolio, or case study links



Please do not send Google Drive, Dropbox, or other file-sharing links.



About us



We are an e-commerce business selling through marketplaces such as Shopee, Lazada, eBay, and our own website. We are building for long-term growth and want someone who is serious about improving, contributing, and growing with the company.



Compensation can be reviewed after 12 months based on performance, consistency, and overall contribution.
