title: Social Media & Content Marketing VA (Full-Time, Bonuses + Growth)
description:
We are an established Australian trade services business looking for a full-time Social Media and Content Marketing VA.



This role is responsible for building and executing a social media strategy across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube. You will audit our existing channels and content library, develop a strategy grounded in real analysis, create and schedule content daily, manage comments and DMs, and report on performance each month. The business owner appears on camera - everything else is yours to own and execute.



If you have worked in digital marketing, content creation, social media management, or at a marketing agency - and you can point to specific accounts you have genuinely grown from a smaller base - we want to hear from you.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, stable role with a long-established Australian business

* Starting salary of PHP 33,500 per month during probation, increasing to PHP 35,000 per month after probation

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

* Coordinate with the owner for his on-camera video appearances - brief him on what is needed and handle everything else

* Respond to all comments and DMs daily across all platforms

* Pre-qualify or redirect social leads to the sales team where appropriate

* Track performance monthly and report clearly to the owner

* Provide content and UX input on two business websites (supporting role)



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience growing social media followings from a smaller base - you must be able to show numbers, not just titles

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE



* HubSpot or CRM experience

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Flexible hours

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.



==============================



HOW TO APPLY



* Click "APPLY FOR THIS JOB" button on this job post

* Fill in the Subject field (this is required, but it will not affect your application outcome)

* Optionally, you may write a message

* Click Send

* Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process

. As we refine our systems, creative direction, and performance, this role will grow—giving you the chance to develop alongside the division.

title: Prop Firm Trader (FX / Futures / Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team of elite traders.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Commercial Lines Insurance Quoter

We are looking for a Commercial Lines Insurance Quoter to assist our agency with quoting and remarketing commercial insurance policies. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, experienced with insurance carrier portals, and comfortable handling various types of commercial risks.

* Compare rates across multiple carriers

* Enter and verify client and risk information in quoting systems

* Assist agents with new business quotes and remarketing

* Prepare and present quote comparisons and summaries

* Maintain accurate records of quotes and client information



Requirements



* Minimum of 3 years experience quoting commercial lines insurance

* Familiarity with insurance carrier portals

* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple quotes and deadlines

* Organized and reliable



Preferred

title: Personal Lines Quoter / P&C Insurance Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a US-based Property & Casualty insurance brokerage looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to help our team run personal lines insurance quotes and manage client data.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Run personal auto, home, and renters insurance quotes through carrier portals (e.g., Progressive, Travelers, and others)

- Accurately input client information from dec pages and applications into quoting systems

- Compare rates across carriers and present options clearly

- Follow up on missing information needed to complete quotes

- Maintain organized records of quotes, clients, and policy data

- Communicate with clients and/or the internal team via
 or messaging platforms

- Assist with other general insurance admin tasks as needed



REQUIREMENTS:

- Prior experience in P&C insurance quoting or insurance VA work is strongly preferred

- Familiarity with US personal lines insurance (auto, home, renters)

- Strong written English communication skills

This is a long-term, full-time remote position. We're looking for someone who is dependable, fast, and committed to growing with our team. If you have insurance experience and want a stable remote job, we want to hear from you!

title: Marketing Video Content Creator (Video Editor)
description:
Location: Remote

Schedule: Day Shift (PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



We’re looking for a creative and detail-oriented Marketing Video Content Creator with a strong focus on video editing to produce engaging content across different marketing channels. If you enjoy bringing ideas to life through video and understand how content supports marketing goals, this role might be for you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



You will create and edit video content for:

title: Civil Engineer
description:
Civil Engineer

Working Schedule: Monday – Saturday

Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

Salary Offer: ?25,000 – ?35,000 (depending on experience)



About the Role

Huayu KJ Supply & Leasing Corp. is seeking a motivated and responsible Civil Engineer to join our growing operations team. In this role, you will oversee site coordination, project monitoring, and documentation of construction activities and material deliveries to various project sites, ensuring accuracy, efficiency, and proper record management.

The role requires close coordination with project engineers, site supervisors, drivers, warehouse personnel, suppliers, and clients to ensure construction materials are delivered and utilized according to project requirements and schedule.

In addition to site coordination, the Civil Engineer will assist in project planning, reporting, and client coordination. Strong communication and professional presentation skills are important for maintaining smooth project operations and ensuring client satisfaction.

Work assignments depend on current project deployment. When assigned to a project, you will be deployed on-site to monitor progress and coordinate site requirements. If there is no active project assignment, you will report to our Head Office in BGC, Taguig to assist with documentation, coordination, and project support tasks.

Our projects are currently located in Batangas, Laguna, Tarlac, Gapan (Nueva Ecija), and Bulacan, depending on operational requirements.



What You'll Be Doing

• Monitor construction activities and ensure work is carried out according to plans, specifications, and timelines

• Coordinate with project managers, contractors, suppliers, and site personnel to ensure smooth project execution

• Review and verify construction material requirements such as aggregates, cement, steel, and other building supplies

• Ensure accuracy of delivery documents including Delivery Receipts (DR), trip tickets, and site acknowledgment forms

• Conduct site inspections to monitor project progress and ensure compliance with project standards

• Prepare and maintain project documentation, reports, and site records

• Assist in planning, scheduling, and coordination of construction activities

• Coordinate with logistics and warehouse teams to ensure timely delivery of required materials

• Identify and report project issues, delays, or discrepancies and assist in resolving them promptly

• Communicate project updates, requirements, and concerns to management and clients when necessary

• Ensure compliance with company procedures, safety regulations, and quality standards

• Support project engineers and supervisors in daily site operations and coordination tasks



What We're Looking For

• Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering

• PRC License is an advantage.

• Preferably with 2–5 years of experience in construction, site engineering, or project coordination

• Strong organizational and documentation skills

• Good communication and coordination skills with project teams, suppliers, and clients

• Ability to communicate professionally with management and project stakeholders

• Knowledge of construction processes, materials, and project coordination

• Must be willing to travel and be assigned to project sites in Batangas, Laguna, Tarlac, Gapan, Bulacan, or other locations as required by the company

• Must be willing to work both on-site and at the Head Office in BGC when not deployed to a project

• Must know how to drive and possess a valid driver’s license (highly preferred)

• Familiarity with construction materials, project documentation, and site coordination is an advantage



What We Offer

At Huayu KJ Supply & Leasing Corp., we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. We offer competitive compensation, government-mandated benefits, and opportunities for career growth within the construction supply and engineering industry.

Accommodation arrangements depend on the employee’s project assignment. Accommodation will be provided when the Civil Engineer is deployed to an active project site outside the office location. When there is no active project assignment and the employee is reporting to the Head Office in BGC, Taguig, accommodation will not be provided.

As a Civil Engineer, you will play an important role in supporting infrastructure and construction projects by ensuring proper coordination, monitoring, and implementation of project requirements.



About Us

Huayu KJ Supply & Leasing Corp. is a growing company engaged in the supply and trading of construction materials, including aggregates, cement, steel, ready-mix concrete, and other essential building products. The company also provides construction support services and equipment leasing to support large-scale projects across Luzon.

We are committed to delivering quality materials, reliable service, and strong project support to our clients in the construction industry.

title: Marketing VA — AI-Powered Generalist | Women's Health & Digital Marketing Brand
description:
Marketing VA — AI-Powered Generalist | Venture Studio



About Us

We are a venture studio building multiple brands and business projects simultaneously across women's health, digital marketing, and direct-response advertising. Our projects move fast, span multiple industries, and require people who can keep up with a high-output environment where priorities shift and new challenges appear constantly. We are a small, lean team and every person on it carries real weight.

About the Role

We are looking for a Marketing VA who is sharp, resourceful, and genuinely good at using AI tools to get real work done. This is not a role where you execute a fixed list of tasks every week. We bring problems to the table and we need someone who can figure out how to solve them — using research, AI, good judgment, or all three. The projects you will work on are live, real, and growing. There is significant upside for someone who performs well, as we have multiple ventures at different stages and the right person will grow with us across all of them.

What You Will Be Working On

The work covers a wide range of marketing and business support activities. On any given week you might be researching competitor funnels and ad strategies, helping build out content briefs for video productions, drafting copy for campaigns, supporting logistics for live community events, organizing strategy session outputs into actionable documents, sourcing vendors, or assisting with the coordination of a multi-format content universe that includes real shoots, real talent, and real deadlines. We work across Meta advertising, short-form video content, telehealth marketing, direct-response copy, and
 — and the scope continues to expand as new projects launch.

You will be given context, pointed at a problem, and trusted to come back with something useful. The better you get at understanding how we think and what good output looks like in our world, the more responsibility you will be handed.

What We Are Looking For

The single most important thing we need from you is judgment. Specifically, the ability to use AI tools and actually evaluate what comes out. We use Claude and other AI tools heavily across our work, and the quality of that work depends entirely on whether the person reviewing the output can tell the difference between something sharp and something that just sounds okay. If you cannot make that distinction, the tools are useless. If you can, you become one of the most valuable people on the team.

Beyond that, we need someone who is fast, curious, and willing to figure things out rather than wait to be taught. You do not need to be an expert in every area we work in. You need to be the kind of person who, when handed something unfamiliar, digs in and works it out. Strong written English is non-negotiable. Comfort with Google Workspace, communication tools like Slack or WhatsApp, and a basic familiarity with how Meta advertising works are all helpful. Canva, any content scheduling platform, or prior experience in a digital marketing environment are a bonus.

We are a real team doing real work with real results. This is not a dead-end support role — it is an entry point into a studio that is actively building ventures with meaningful upside, and we promote from within based on performance.

Hours and Availability

We are starting this as a part-time engagement with a clear path to full-time as the workload and trust develop. We need at least a few hours of overlap with US Pacific Time each day. We move quickly and responsiveness during working hours matters — this is not a purely async role.

How to Apply

Tell us about a time you used an AI tool to solve a real work problem. Walk us through what the problem was, how you approached it, and how you evaluated whether the output was actually good. We are not grading you on having the perfect answer — we are looking for evidence that you think critically about the tools you use and do not just accept whatever comes out.

mbers ramp quickly

title: Social Media Marketer
description:
We are hiring a new Social Media Strategist for our Agency and you will help us to create viral Reels and manage the accounts of our clients to grow them to higher numbers and scale our agency. We 4x our revenue last month and with this foundation we want to scale even higher now, so we need an experienced Social Media Marketing Strategist to maintain the quality for our clients. If you already have experience with Social Media (Short Form Content on Instagram Reels), you are creative, know how to create video concepts that go viral and how to analyse viral videos, this job is perfect for you.



Why you should work with us:



- You start with established personal brands - The client(s) you will work with, have proven concepts, so you can build on a solid foundation and use the style of their existing videos to develop even better concepts.

- AI Implementation - AI is becoming more and more relevant and we are already using AI for many different areas, especially for content (picture/video) creation, so you are up to date with AI for social media while other companies don’t use AI at all. So you are 3 steps ahead.

- Different projects - Step by step you will work with different accounts / clients so you can be creative in different areas.

- Long Term partnership - We are only looking for long term employees, so you will work with us for a long time and have a stable income with a growing agency.

- Established Agency - Our agency is active since 2022, so we gained a lot of experience in all fields of social media, so you will learn from our experience which will help you to improve your social media skills.

- Clear guides and onboarding - You will clear instructions on how to do you work in a detailed onboarding and training. Combined with your own knowledge we will make sure to have the best results.



Your specific task:



You have 3 daily main tasks to focus on, besides that you will get more different tasks over the time when we see that you’re doing a great job:



1. Market Research - You go through the market and find viral Reels / Trends from other creators that have potential to go viral for our clients

2. Concept Creation - Based on your research you create the specific video concepts that our content team / clients should create.

3. Analyse our videos - Not only looking for new concepts is important but also analysing our own accounts and videos, finding winning patterns and implementing these information in the concept creation.



Other potential tasks in the future that give you more responsibility:



- Team Management - We have a big team for reposting content, where we need support with employee onboarding, technical setups and video creation

- More clients - Depending on your workload you will work with more of our clients and help with more different concepts

- Implementing complete new ideas - Your main task is to improve our current system but we always have new ideas, new concepts and new strategies that we need to implement and test with our existing systems.



What we expect and need from you:



- Experience with Social Media / Short Form video creation. Not only uploading simple posts for companies but actual experience and skills in video conception for content that goes viral and analysing viral videos.

- Experience in the Online Marketing Space. This is not a beginner job and you should know how social media is used in the business world.

- 7 Days / week. This is a well paid job, so we are looking for a high performing employee.

- Fluent English (speaking & writing) since our clients are mainly from USA.



Salary and Perspective:



Since we are looking for the best employee for this job, we start with a salary of $800 per month. In the future there is a chance for more if you do a good job and you help us to reach our company goals. Depending on your skills and results you can get more responsibility and more projects.



If you’re looking for a long term job, then message me here with the code word “smms” in your application :)

title: Instagram Influencer Outreach Specialist
description:
We’re a fast-growing DTC brand looking for an experienced Instagram Influencer Outreach Specialist to help us consistently find and contact creators, then secure collaborations where we send our product for free in exchange for one or more Instagram Stories.



This is a hands-on role focused on research + outreach + follow-up + tracking. We need someone who has done influencer seeding/outreach before and can show past results.



What you’ll do



Find Instagram creators that match our criteria (followers, engagement, niche, audience location, content style, etc.).



Qualify accounts (spot fake followers/engagement, check consistency, content quality, audience fit).



Reach out via Instagram DM and/or
, follow up consistently, and close deals.



Confirm deliverables: # of stories, posting date/time window, tags/mentions, link requirements (if any), and any usage permissions (if needed).



Collect shipping details and coordinate with our team for product sending.



Track everything in a spreadsheet/CRM: contacted, responses, follow-ups, accepted, shipped, posted, notes, results.



Creator criteria



We will start with baseline criteria (e.g., minimum followers + engagement) and adjust/expand criteria over time as we learn what performs best.

You must be comfortable iterating criteria and improving targeting weekly.



Requirements (must-have)



Proven experience doing Instagram influencer outreach / product seeding (must have done this before).



Strong communication and negotiation skills (English).



Organized: can manage high-volume outreach + follow-ups without dropping threads.



Ability to evaluate creators quickly (fake engagement detection, audience fit, content quality).



Comfortable using Google Sheets/Airtable/Notion for tracking.



Nice-to-have



Experience in DTC / e-commerce and story-based campaigns.



Familiar with influencer tools/databases (optional).



Ability to improve outreach scripts and test different angles.



KPIs / Expectations



Daily: 30–80 qualified creators contacted (depending on quality and niche).



Weekly: X collaborations confirmed and scheduled (we’ll set targets together).



High follow-up discipline (most wins come from follow-ups #2–#5).



Compensation



Hourly or monthly retainer (based on experience)



Optional performance bonus per confirmed post or creator deal closed



How to apply



Please include:



A short intro + your availability/timezone



Proof of past IG outreach work (a brief case study or summary)



Metrics from past outreach (e.g., response rate, deals closed/week, typical deliverables)



A sample list of 10 creators you would target (links + follower count + engagement estimate)



A short DM script you would send to a creator



Answer: “How do you quickly spot fake engagement?”

title: Integrator / Head of Operations & Execution — DTC Supplement Brand (7-Figure)
description:
Job Title: Integrator / Head of Operations & Execution — DTC Supplement Brand (7-Figure)

Salary: $2,000–$3,000/month + Profit Share Bonus

Hours: Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time after 3 months

Timezone: GMT+1 to GMT+4 (European / Middle Eastern business hours)



About Us

Parmint is a 7-figure DTC supplement brand specializing in internal body freshness. We sell directly to consumers through high-converting funnels,
/Meta ads, and
 marketing. Our core product helps people feel confident from the inside out — and we're growing fast.

We're looking for an Integrator — someone who can take the founder's vision and turn it into reality. You'll be the operational backbone of the company: building systems, managing people, executing strategies, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.

This is NOT a virtual assistant role. This is a leadership position for someone who wants to help build and run a real company — with skin in the game through profit sharing.



What You'll Do



Operations & Systems: Create SOPs, workflows, and processes from scratch. Build the operational infrastructure that allows the company to scale without the founder being involved in every decision.

Team Management: Help identify, hire, and manage tea
mbers (video editors, customer service, copywriters, media buyers). You'll be their point of contact and make sure everyone delivers on time and on quality.

Marketing Execution: Oversee the execution of
/Meta ad campaigns,
 sequences (Klaviyo), quiz funnels, landing pages, and creative production. You don't need to be the one running ads — but you need to deeply understand how DTC marketing works so you can manage people who do.

Project Management: Keep all moving parts organized. From ad creative production to product launches to customer service escalations — you make sure things get done.

Financial Oversight: Help track budgets, manage invoices, reconcile expenses, and keep the founder informed on financial health.

Strategic Support: Provide input on decisions, flag problems before they become crises, and bring structure to the founder's ideas.





Required



You've worked inside a DTC brand or agency (ideally $1M–$10M range). You know what a funnel is, how
 ads work, what Klaviyo does, and why AOV, LTV, and ROAS matter.

You've built or managed systems, processes, or teams in a previous role.

English fluency (written and spoken) — non-negotiable.

Available during GMT+1 to GMT+4 business hours.

Self-starter: you see a problem, you flag it, you propose a solution, you execute.

Detail-oriented and patient. You double-check everything and care about doing things right.



Nice to Have



Experience in a supplement or health brand, especially marketing health products on Meta.

Hands-on experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, ClickFunnels, or similar tools.

Spanish or Italian language skills.





Compensation



Base: $2,000–$3,000/month (based on experience and location)

Bonus: 5–10% of net profits after 3-month trial period

Growth: This role grows into a full COO position as the company scales





How It Works

Month 1–2 (Part-Time, ~20 hrs/week): You'll audit Parmint's operations — ads, funnels,
, team, customer journey — and present an action plan with prioritized SOPs. This is our mutual test.

Month 3 (Decision Point): If the plan is solid and execution is strong, we move to full-time and profit sharing kicks in.

Month 4+ (Full-Time): You build systems, hire and manage the team, and run day-to-day operations. The founder focuses exclusively on growth strategy.



How to Apply

Send an
 to [YOUR
] with the subject: "Integrator — [Your Name]"

Include:



A short intro about yourself (2–3 paragraphs max). Who are you, what have you done, why does this role interest you?

Your experience with DTC/e-commerce brands. What brands did you work with? What was your role? What results did you achieve?

A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit. (Mandatory — applications without a video will not be reviewed.)

Your salary expectation (monthly, USD).



No generic cover letters. No AI-generated copy-paste applications. We read every application personally.

title: Growth Manager — E-commerce / DTC

What you'll do:

 campaigns, and funnels

Run A/B tests across pricing, post-purchase flows, and subscriptions

Coordinate with our video editor, ads team, and VA to keep projects moving

Analyze data: returns, refund rates, subscription cohorts, ad performance

Research competitors using spy tools and ad libraries

Solve problems as they come up — disputes, rejected ads, domain issues

Keep me accountable and organized (deadlines, Loom documentation, weekly schedules)





You're a fit if:

You learn fast and figure things out without hand-holding

You're comfortable with Meta ads, Klaviyo, Shopify, and spreadsheets

You're proactive — you see a problem, you fix it or flag it

You can work 40 hours/week with overlap in US/EU hours

Experience in DTC, supplements, or direct response marketing

title: COO Ecommerce Direct Response

/Meta ads, and build the operating machine behind profitable growth. You’ve done it before (not just watched it happen) and you know exactly what works in dropshipping—and what doesn’t.



What you’ll do



Store Launch & Ops: End-to-end setup (Shopify or similar), payments, policies, supply chain, SLAs, and KPI governance.



Growth & Ads: Own strategy and hands-on management for
/Meta (plus Google/TikTok a bonus); budget scaling, ROAS/CPA control.



Funnel & CRO: A/B testing for landing, checkout, upsells; drive AOV, LTV, and conversion rate improvements.



Product Operations: Product selection, margin analysis, pricing, demand forecasting, suppliers & logistics.

Compliance & Payments: Work with gateways, antifraud, chargebacks, and platform policies.



Requirements

Advanced
/Meta Ads execution (account structure, creative strategy, tracking, scaling). Solid grasp of Google Ads.



Clear judgment on what to avoid in dropshipping (products, timelines, policies) and what to scale.



Strong CRO experience and financial acumen (unit economics, P&L ownership).



Owner mindset: speed, accountability, detail-orientation.



; professional English required. (Other languages are a plus.)

title: Senior Video Editor (US-Based Brand | PST Schedule)
description:
About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Video Editor / Creative Strategist (Performance-Based Pay + Free Courses Included)
description:
The Role

You'll start by editing short-form video ads (UGC-style, direct response) using scripts, AI tools, and briefs we provide. Over time, you'll develop into a full Creative Strategist — learning how to research markets, develop angles, and build ad concepts from scratch.

Schedule & Time Zone

We don't care when you work — as long as your daily output is delivered and you make the Saturday strategy call. You manage your own hours.

Daily output: 1 ad concept with 3 video variations.

You'll use AI and structured prompts for scripting and iteration, upload deliverables to Google Drive, log everything in our tracking sheet, and join weekly strategy calls. This is a system — you follow the process, use the frameworks, hit your output, and you earn.

How You Get Paid

You earn 2.5% of the first $10,000 in spend generated by each ad concept you create.

That's up to $250 per winning concept.

At 5+ concepts per week, you're getting 20+ shots on goal every month. You don't need every concept to win. You need a few. And as your skill improves, your hit rate goes up — and so does your income.

There is no monthly cap. The more winners you produce, the more you make.

Revenue is tracked transparently in a shared sheet and payments are made bi-weekly.

And we offer $
fixed salary on top for anybody delivering promising work reliably.

What You Get Beyond Pay

Access to premium direct-response and copywriting courses (valued at thousands of dollars) — included free as part of the role

Hands-on training in performance creative strategy — the same skillset US agencies charge $5K–$15K/month for

AI-powered workflow — you'll work with cutting-edge AI tools for scripting, ideation, and review

A real path to growth — you're not stuck editing clips forever. You're building a skillset that compounds

Most editing roles pay you to stay in the same place. This one pays you to get better. You'll understand how ads are built, why they work, and how to create them from scratch. That knowledge compounds whether you stay with us long-term or go on to build something of your own.

This Role Is For You If…

You can edit video cleanly and quickly (Premiere, DaVinci, CapCut — whatever you're fast in)

You want to learn direct-response marketing, not just push pixels

You're reliable, consistent, and can hit a daily output target

You're excited by the idea of getting paid based on results, not hours

You want a long-term role where your earning potential grows as you grow

This Role Is NOT For You If…

You want a fixed salary with no performance component

You're not comfortable with a learning curve

You can't commit to consistent daily output

Final Notes

This is a performance culture.

You get rewarded for speed, output, and results.

If you want to make more, produce more, test more, win more.

The system is here to make sure your pay scales with your impact.

To Apply

Fill out this short form below and link any past work (ads, reels, edits — anything that shows you can cut video).

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 355 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Client Success Manager
description:
About XP Strategy

XP Strategy is an Amazon Ads Verified Partner agency founded by Abe Chomali. Since 2016, we've helped hundreds of brands and sellers scale profitably on Amazon through data-driven advertising and strategic account management. Our team works across a wide range of categories and account sizes - from emerging brands to established multi-ASIN portfolios.



We believe that great results start with great communication and strong organization. Our culture emphasizes transparency, ownership, and collaboration - every tea
mber plays a vital role in creating success for our clients.



Why Join XP Strategy

At XP Strategy, you’ll join a results-oriented, collaborative team that values clarity, accountability, and growth. You’ll work directly with clients who trust our expertise, while collaborating closely with experienced PPC specialists who deliver world-class results.



If you thrive on organization, communication, and helping clients win — we’d love to meet you.



The Role

The Client Success Manager (CSM) is the bridge between XP Strategy’s internal PPC team and our clients. This role ensures that communication, expectations, and performance stay aligned across all active accounts. You’ll act as the client’s primary point of contact, translating goals and insights into clear tasks for the PPC team, tracking progress, and ensuring timely delivery of results.



This position is ideal for someone with solid Amazon PPC knowledge who enjoys building relationships, managing projects, and keeping teams organized and accountable.



Key Responsibilities

* Serve as the main point of contact for assigned clients, managing ongoing communication and updates.

* Coordinate work between internal PPC specialists and client teams, ensuring clarity on goals, timelines, and deliverables.

* Review PPC reports and performance data to translate insights into next steps or strategic recommendations.

* Track milestones, deadlines, and recurring tasks through ClickUp or similar project management systems.

* Lead or join client calls to provide updates, gather feedback, and maintain strong client relationships.

* Identify potential issues early and proactively work with the team to resolve them.

* Maintain organized account documentation and communication logs.

* Support the continuous improvement of client onboarding and retention processes.



Qualifications

* 2+ years of experience in Amazon PPC or e-commerce account management (agency experience preferred).

* Strong understanding of Amazon Ads metrics and campaign structures.

* Exceptional communication and organization skills - must be comfortable managing multiple accounts and priorities.

* Ability to analyze data and communicate insights clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.

* High level of professionalism and responsiveness in client interactions.

* Comfortable working independently in a remote, fast-moving team environment.



Preferred / Nice-to-Have

* Amazon Seller Central / Campaign Manager

* Helium 10, AdLabs, Data Dive, or similar analytics tools

* ClickUp or comparable project management platforms

* Looker Studio (Google Data Studio)

* Slack, Zoom, and other remote communication tools



If you're interested, please don't forget to attach your updated CV in PDF format.

title: Amazon PPC Specialist
description:
About the Role:

We're looking for a highly experienced Amazon PPC Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you'll take ownership of the day-to-day ad management for multiple Amazon seller accounts - including strategy, campaign builds, bid optimization, reporting, and ongoing performance improvement.



You'll work closely with our account team to execute on client goals, join client calls to provide expert insight, and collaborate on strategic roadmaps to drive growth.



Internship / Trial Period:

This position will begin with a paid 60-day internship (trial period) to ensure mutual fit. During this time, you will receive compensation while demonstrating your skills, adapting to the role, and integrating with the team. At the end of the 60 days, your performance will be reviewed. Successful candidates will transition to a full-time role under a standard employment agreement.



What You’ll Do:

* Manage Amazon PPC campaigns across multiple accounts (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display).

* Perform ongoing keyword research and bid management.

* Build and optimize campaigns using flat files and internal tools.

* Monitor performance, analyze reports, and create custom reporting dashboards.

* Collaborate with account managers to align PPC strategy with client business goals.

* Join client calls as needed to provide PPC updates and answer questions.

* Proactively identify opportunities to improve results and reduce wasted spend.



What We’re Looking For:

* 3+ years of experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns (agency experience preferred).

* Proven ability to manage multiple accounts and prioritize effectively.

* Strong understanding of Amazon Ads, keyword strategy, campaign structure, and optimization best practices.

* Proficiency with reporting tools, keyword research platforms, and flat files.

* Exceptional English communication skills (verbal and written) — this is a client-facing role.

* High level of organization, attention to detail, and accountability.



Bonus Points For Experience With:

* Amazon DSP

* Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC)

* Google Data Studio (Looker Studio).

* AI prompting and automation tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Scale Insights, or similar).



If you're interested, please don't forget to attach your updated CV in PDF format.

title: Lead Researcher & Data Entry Specialist
description:
We are building a high-output lead generation operation and need a detail-obsessed researcher who can dig deep on target prospects, find accurate contact information, and keep our data spotless inside Google Sheets and our CRM. This role has two equally important sides: the investigative side (finding and verifying the right person and their contact details) and the operational side (inputting data accurately, consistently, and at volume without cutting corners).



If you take pride in a perfectly organized spreadsheet, love tracking down hard-to-find information, and can do focused repetitive work without errors — this role is built for you.



The two sides of this role

Part 1 — Lead research

Research target prospects using LinkedIn, company websites, Apollo, Hunter, and other tools



Find the correct decision-maker at a company (title, department, seniority level)



Verify
 addresses using tools like NeverBounce, ZeroBounce, or
 pattern matching



Collect supplementary intel: company size, industry, recent news, tech stack, social media presence



Flag contacts that are likely outdated, incorrect, or low-quality before they enter the pipeline



Part 2 — Data entry & operations

Input all researched data accurately into Google Sheets following our exact column structure and naming conventions



Clean and deduplicate existing lists — remove duplicates, fix formatting, and standardize entries



Upload verified leads into our CRM or cold
 platform on a set schedule



Track research progress daily and submit a simple end-of-day report with leads completed, issues flagged, and blockers



Maintain data integrity — zero tolerance for sloppy entries, missing fields, or inconsistent formatting



What we're looking for

Obsessive attention to detail — you catch errors others miss and you care about clean data



Comfortable with repetition — you can process 50–100+ leads per day accurately without losing focus or quality



Resourceful researcher — if a contact isn't on Apollo, you know how to find them another way



Proficient in Google Sheets — comfortable with filters, basic formulas (VLOOKUP, IF, COUNTIF), and maintaining large datasets



Familiar with at least one of: 
, 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, RocketReach, or Clay



Proactive communicator — you flag problems early instead of silently inputting bad data



2+ years experience in lead research, VA work, data entry, or a similar operations role



Tools you'll work with

Google Sheets





LinkedIn

NeverBounce / ZeroBounce



Google Drive

Slack / Loom

Nice to have

Experience with CRMs (HubSpot, GoHighLevel)

Familiarity with Instantly or Smartlead

Basic Zapier / Make automation

Web scraping basics

Experience supporting a sales or outbound team

What we offer

Competitive salary: $500–$900/month based on experience and output quality



All tools and subscriptions provided — you won't spend a peso out of pocket



100% remote with a structured daily workflow — no guessing what to do



Clear SOPs and onboarding training provided from day one



Long-term, stable role — we're building a team, not filling a temp position



How to apply

We review every application carefully. To be considered, please include all of the following and your 
 handle.



1.

A sample of past research work — a screenshot or exported spreadsheet showing leads you've researched (you can blank out sensitive info)



2.

List the tools you've used for lead research and data entry, and briefly describe how you used each one



3.

Answer this question: "A prospect's
 bounces and you can't find their correct address on Apollo or Hunter. Walk me through exactly what you'd do next."



4.

Start your message with "Detail-first researcher ready to go" so we know you read this fully

title: Cold Email Specialist & Automation System Builder
description:
Looking for a cold
 expert to own our entire outbound lead generation function. This is not a basic copy-paste job. We need someone who can strategize, build, and manage a high-performance cold
 system from the ground up — including technical infrastructure, copywriting, list building, and ongoing optimization.



If you have built cold
 systems that consistently achieve 40%+ open rates and 5%+ reply rates, and you know the difference between SPF, DKIM, and DMARC — we want to hear from you.



What you'll be doing

Build the full system: Set up and manage sending infrastructure including domain warming, mailbox rotation, and
 service providers (Instantly, Smartlead, or similar)



Write high-converting copy: Research ICPs and craft personalized cold
 sequences (3–5 steps) with strong hooks, clear CTAs, and follow-up cadences



Build and verify lead lists: Source, clean, and validate targeted prospect lists using tools like Apollo, Hunter, Clay, or ZoomInfo



Automate and integrate: Connect tools via Zapier, Make (Integromat), or n8n to automate list imports, reply tagging, CRM updates, and lead handoff



Track and optimize: Monitor KPIs (open rate, reply rate, positive reply rate, meetings booked), A/B test subject lines and copy, and report weekly



Manage deliverability: Monitor inbox placement, maintain sender reputation, and resolve spam/blacklist issues proactively



Must-haves

3+ years of hands-on cold
 experience with proven, documented results (open rates, reply rates, meetings booked)



Proficient in at least one sending platform: Instantly.ai, Smartlead, Lemlist, or Woodpecker



Deep knowledge of
 deliverability: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain age, warm-up protocols, and inbox vs. spam placement



Experience with lead sourcing tools: 
, Clay, 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or ZoomInfo



Automation experience with Zapier, Make, or n8n to connect tools and build hands-off workflows



Excellent English copywriting skills — you can write like a human, not a robot



Nice to have

CRM experience (HubSpot / GoHighLevel)


 proficiency

AI personalization at scale

Basic Google Sheets / data skills

Experience with B2B SaaS or agencies

Looker Studio / reporting dashboards



How to apply

To be considered, your application must include all of the following — applications without these will not be reviewed:



1. 

Screenshot or report showing your best cold
 campaign results (open rate, reply rate, meetings booked)



2.

A sample 3-step cold
 sequence you've written — include the subject line,
 body, and follow-ups



3.

Brief description (5–7 sentences) of a cold
 system you built — tools used, how it was automated, and results achieved



4.

Start your message with the phrase "Cold
 expert reporting for duty" so we know you read this listing carefully.



5. leave your 
 below.

title: Compliance Business Development VA — Healthcare / Legal Industry
description:
Job Title: Compliance Business Development VA — Healthcare / Legal Industry

Job Type: Full Time | Remote | Start Immediately

Salary: $700 – $1,100/month depending on experience



READ THIS ENTIRE POST BEFORE APPLYING. We hire detail-oriented people. If you apply without reading, you will not be considered.



We are a US-based compliance consulting firm that helps healthcare businesses navigate federal regulatory requirements. We launched in response to a major federal enforcement action and we are growing fast. We need one sharp, highly organized, self-directed VA to own our legal coordination, business development outreach, and compliance research from day one.



This is not a data entry job. This is not a social media job. This is a professional role that requires someone who can read legal documents, write professional
s in perfect English, research businesses and contacts independently, and represent our company in outreach to attorneys and professional services firms.

If you have a background in law, compliance, healthcare administration, or business development — read on. This role was built for you.



What You Will Do:

Coordinate with our outside US attorneys — scheduling, document preparation, follow-up, tracking outstanding items

Research and build a list of healthcare attorneys and law firms across California, Texas, Florida, and New York — names,
s, phone numbers, firm size, practice area



Send professional outreach
s to law firms on our behalf introducing our white label compliance review services — we provide the script, you execute and track responses

Research credentialed healthcare compliance professionals on LinkedIn — retired CMS auditors, former hospice compliance officers — and send outreach messages using our provided templates

Track the status of our US trademark application and coordinate with our trademark attorney on document requests

Monitor daily news for anything related to hospice compliance, CMS enforcement, Medicare fraud — compile a brief daily summary and send to leadership



Research healthcare trade associations and industry conferences relevant to our business and compile a list of speaking and membership opportunities

Maintain a master tracker in Google Sheets of all outreach sent, responses received, and follow-up dates — updated daily

Draft professional correspondence, summaries, and reports as directed



You Are the Right Person If:

You have at least 2 years of experience working for a US-based law firm, compliance company, healthcare company, or professional services firm as a VA or administrator

Your written English is excellent — not good, excellent. You can write a cold
 to a US attorney that sounds like it came from a US professional.

You are comfortable reading legal documents and summarizing key points

You are organized to the point of being obsessive — nothing falls through the cracks on your watch

You take initiative — when you are not sure what to do next, you figure it out and report back rather than sitting idle

You have experience with Google Workspace, Google Sheets, and LinkedIn

You are available during US Pacific Time business hours — at least 6 hours of overlap Monday through Friday



You Are Not the Right Person If:

You are looking for simple repetitive work

Your English needs heavy editing before it can be sent to a client or partner

You have never worked in a legal, compliance, or healthcare environment

You need to be told what to do every hour



This Role Grows With Us.

We are hiring this VA now as we launch and scale. As our business grows and we bring on a US-based Director of Compliance, this VA transitions into the Director's assistant — managing their calendar, tracking their outreach pipeline, and supporting their work. That means job security and career growth for the right person.



To Apply — Do All of the Following or You Will Not Be Considered:

Send your application to 
  with the subject line: Compliance VA — [Your Full Name]

In the body of your
 include:

One paragraph describing your background and why this role is a fit for you specifically

One paragraph describing the most complex professional task you have handled as a VA — be specific

A sample cold
 written as if you are reaching out to a healthcare attorney in Los Angeles introducing our compliance review services for hospice operators. Write it from scratch — do not copy a template. This is your audition.



Your LinkedIn profile link or attached resume

Your available hours in US Pacific Time



Voice Recording Required:

This role includes phone and video communication with US-based attorneys and professional partners. Please include a 60-second voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right person for this role. You can record using any free tool such as 
 and paste the link in your
. A clear professional speaking voice with strong English pronunciation is important for this position. This is not about accent — it is about clarity and confidence on a professional call.

title: Video Editor for Ads & VSL (CapCut | AI Tools | Long-Term)
description:
We are a growing e-commerce brand in the pet niche looking for a dedicated and motivated Video Editor to join our team long-term.



We offer a starting salary of $4.00/hour + performance-based bonuses, so strong work and results are always rewarded. If things go well and we see consistent performance, we're happy to review and increase the salary together over time. Our goal is to build a long-term partnership with someone who wants to grow together with our brands.



To ensure we find the right fit, we ask applicants to complete a short test assignment. This helps us understand your editing style and how comfortable you are with the tools we use.

title: Brand Protection Specialist (DMCA)
description:
Who We Are



Mira Organics is a fast-growing health and wellness eCommerce brand that scaled from zero to seven figures in just two months. We sell a nerve relief lotion designed for people aged 50 and above living with neuropathy and we are genuinely making a difference in people's lives every day.

We move fast. We build systems. We protect what we build.

As we scale we are seeing copycat stores, unauthorized listings, and content theft appear across multiple platforms. We need someone who knows exactly how to find and eliminate them without us having to explain the process.



The Purpose of This Role



Your job is simple, protect the Mira Organics brand online.

You will monitor the internet for unauthorized use of our brand, products, images, copy, and content. When you find something that should not be there you will take action to get it removed through DMCA claims, platform takedown requests, or direct outreach, using an authorization letter from the Company to act on our behalf.

This is a role where your expertise leads the way. You will be given full authorization to act on behalf of Mira Organics and we trust you to own the process end to end.



What You Will Do

Monitor the following platforms regularly for brand violations, copycat stores, unauthorized listings, and stolen content:

 and Instagram — ads, pages, and posts using our brand without authorization

TikTok — videos, ads, and accounts misusing our brand or product

Google — search results, websites, and landing pages copying our content

YouTube — videos using our footage, copy, or brand without permission

Forums and community sites — Reddit, Quora, and similar platforms

eCommerce platforms — Shopify storefronts and similar DTC sites (Alibaba, Aliexpress, Frugoo, Ebay etc)

Amazon — a quick weekly scan for copycat listings or unauthorized brand use. Anything flagged gets passed to the team right away. A small but valuable layer of protection that keeps us covered across every channel.



Take action on violations by:



Filing DMCA takedown requests on behalf of Mira Organics

Submitting platform-specific IP infringement reports

Removing unauthorized listings from eCommerce platforms

Contacting website owners and hosting providers for content removal

Documenting all violations and actions taken in a clear tracking sheet

Maintain a weekly brand protection report covering what was found, what was actioned, and what is still pending.



What We Are Looking For



Required Experience:

Proven experience filing DMCA takedown requests and IP infringement reports

Hands-on experience removing content from
, TikTok, YouTube, Google, and similar platforms

Experience identifying and reporting copycat stores and unauthorized eCommerce listings

Familiarity with platform-specific IP enforcement tools and processes

Strong written English for drafting takedown notices and correspondence



Character Traits We Hire For:



You are proactive — you find problems before they are reported to you

You are thorough — you do not stop at one platform when something is flagged

You are organized — you track every violation and every action taken

You are autonomous — we will give you the authorization letter and you will take it from there

You take ownership — this is your area and you run it



This Is NOT For You If:



You need step-by-step instructions on how takedowns work

You have never filed a DMCA claim or platform IP report before

You are unfamiliar with how copycat stores operate online

You are not comfortable working independently without close supervision



Hours and Location



Fully remote

Work from anywhere. 

Flexible hours 

We care about results, not your clock. Part-time to start with potential to grow as the brand scales.



How to Apply



To confirm you have read the full post please include the following in your application message:

Your resume

2 to 3 examples of successful takedowns or brand protection actions you have handled platform, type of violation, and outcome

Your salary expectations

title: Math Teacher in Online school
Executive Support Assistant
description:
Chilli Pilates is one of the UK’s fastest-growing boutique fitness brands — 14 studios, a growing team of

instructors, and a mission to make premium Pilates genuinely accessible. We’re building a world-class

remote operations team in the Philippines to power our growth, and we need someone exceptional to join

us.



This role sits at the operational heart of Chilli. You’ll keep instructor data accurate, ensure studios are

stocked and early-morning cover coordination sorted before the UK day begins. You’ll work alongside a

close peer — another Executive Support Assistant — and the two of you will be fully cross-trained so you

can step into each other’s shoes seamlessly. If you love variety, thrive on detail, and want to be part of

something that’s genuinely growing — read on.



What you’ll do

???? Cover Coordination — 6am–9am London time, Mon–Fri

• Monitor cover needs across all Chilli studios every day; reacting to sickness and lateness notifications from the instructors

• Call on available instructors to step in for cover and alert members of any delays or cancellations

• Manage same-day and next-day emergency cover requests

• Ensure the data the cover app uses is accurate

• Hand over clearly to the team at the end of each shift



???? People & Scheduling

• Instructor onboarding admin: system access, onboarding checklists, onboarding coordination across all business areas

• Leaver administration: system updates, leaver checklist, onboarding coordination across all business areas

• Maintain the employee database as the single source of truth

• Update instructor schedules and the cover app; implement changes for leavers, studio openings, and timetable revisions

• Collate and prepare payroll inputs; investigate payroll queries within agreed SLAs

• Holiday credits: process dashboard credits for FT instructors on leave

• Xmas scheduling: coordinate the annual Christmas schedule distribution across all studios

• Support leaders with people-related admin and communicate schedule updates to instructors



???? Facilities & Studio Operations

• Uniform stock management: collate orders, manage stock, send acknowledgements to instructors,

monitor stock levels

• Utility coordination: chase monthly meter readings from all studios, input to tracking sheet, flag

inconsistencies, support renewal processes

• Retail stock management: monitor the stock system for minimum levels, trigger orders and

communicate with our supplier re manufacture and delivery

• Studio stock management: monitor the stock check system for minimum levels, assist in the

coordination of distribution, liaise with stock checkers and deputies

• New studio setup: arrange utility accounts for new openings (electricity, waste, broadband)

• Monthly rates payments coordination and ad hoc facilities projects



???? Sales & Marketing Admin Support

• Run reports for the marketing lead

• Sales and prospect materials: monitor and reorder stock of leaflets and handouts across studios



What we’re looking for

• Available from 6am-9am London time, Monday to Friday — this is non-negotiable

• Experience across operations, HR admin, people coordination, or facilities — ideally more than one

area

• Google Workspace and Sheets native — formulas, filters, and keeping data clean

• Strong written English — clear, professional communication with UK-based staff

• Calm under pressure — the cover shift moves fast and requires good judgement

• High attention to detail — scheduling and data errors have real consequences for studios and

instructors

• A genuine team player — you’ll work hand-in-glove with your peer assistant and be ready to step

into their shoes when needed

• Self-starter who takes ownership without being prompted

• Bonus: experience with Mindbody (MBO) or a similar scheduling platform



Availability:

20–40 hrs/week. This role will begin as part-time and will eventually add hours as we progress. Must be available 6am–9am London time (GMT/BST) Mon–Fri for the cover shift, plus broader availability for admin tasks.

title: Performance-Based Sales Rep (Remote) – Focus on Client Retention

Closing deals matters, but retention matters more.



Bonuses are tied to how long your clients stay

Strong follow-up and relationship management directly increase your income

What We’re Looking For

Sales experience (phone or chat closing)

Strong follow-up discipline

Organized and detail-oriented

Fast response time

Reliable internet and good headset

Performance-driven mindset

Not For You If

You only care about quick commissions

You avoid client communication after the sale

You need constant supervision

Bonus Points If You Have

Experience in car sales or lead generation

Experience managing client accounts

Experience with CRM tools

Experience in retention or customer success roles

Why Join Us

Warm inbound leads (no cold lists)

Proven system already generating demand

Long-term earning potential through retention

Opportunity to grow into account manager or sales leader

Direct communication with decision-makers

How to Apply



Send a message with:



Your sales experience

A video recording introducing yourself

Your best monthly sales result

An example of how you retained a client or handled a difficult situation

title: Virtual Assistent for VSL

Here's how we work: We provide the video scripts and also supply AI-generated video clips for B-roll footage. Your job is to take all provided materials (scripts, AI B-roll, assets) and craft polished, professional video sales letters that match the script perfectly — scene by scene. If additional footage or visuals are needed, we expect you to create or source them yourself, whether through AI tools, stock footage, or other creative methods.



What we're looking for: We need someone who can take a script and raw materials and turn them into compelling, scroll-stopping VSLs — consistently and efficiently. You should have strong experience in video editing, scene composition, pacing, and storytelling for direct-response / e-commerce video ads.



Requirements: – Proven experience creating VSLs or long-form video ads (1–10 min) – Strong skills in video editing software (e.g. Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut Pro, or similar) – Experience working with AI-generated video content and integrating it seamlessly – Ability to independently source or create additional visuals when needed – Understanding of pacing, transitions, and visual storytelling that sells – Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to deliver consistent quality



Current workload: Approximately 2 hours per day (Mon–Fri), with plans to scale up to part-time or full-time as we grow.



Pay: $4–$20/hour depending on your skill level and portfolio quality.



How to apply: Please start your message with: BLUE APPLE and end it with: ORANGE BANANA.



In your application, include a Google Drive link with at least 2 VSL videos you have personally created. Applications without video samples will not be considered.
